messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, you’re living a temporary life in a temporary world, where nothing makes you less, everything makes you more, and no one is truly “done” until everyone is done.

Watch your brothers and sisters -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
How to make anything happen?

Act as if it already has, BRANDI, and never look back.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, not that you ever would, but never compromise a dream.

You have them for a reason -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, letting go is always easier than holding on.

And it’s how the new stuff will find you.

You new stuff magnet,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I was speaking to someone here in the unseen, BRANDI, who’s been trying to reach you...

They said you were right to follow your heart; it took a lot of courage.

That it’s really cool how you’re worrying far less about what other people think.

And your home on the cliff, overlooking the ocean, with a guest cottage...

No. Your other home on the cliff, overlooking the ocean, with a guest cottage.

Well, you needn’t worry anymore about it sitting vacant while you’re away. And they asked where you keep the Marmite?

Thoughtful, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you stopped to consider that it’s life’s “disconnects,” “almosts,” and “not quites,” BRANDI, that make life’s “connections,” “gotchas,” and “eurekas” so fantastically romantic?

Good, because they were your idea.

Wild thing,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It’s part of nature’s built-in checks and balances, BRANDI, that while there may be times when you think you can’t even help yourself, in precisely such moments there will always be someone else nearby… you can help instead.

Which is actually one of the fastest ways to help yourself.

I hope that helps,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The biggest misconception people have about the past, BRANDI, is thinking it can detract from the rest of their lives.

But the past… only ever makes more stuff possible.

You are worthy of all,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It’s not a matter of whether or not you can afford it, swing it, or handle it, BRANDI.

It’s a question of whether or not I can.

And I so can -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In life, BRANDI, as you well know, the few carry the many.

And one day... the many will know the truth, and they’ll thank you.

As I now do,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Invariably, BRANDI, a sudden disappointment, a bit of “bad” news, or a flutter of butterflies gathering in your stomach are all omens that a fabulous adventure is fast approaching.

Hit me baby,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you knew what I know, BRANDI, you wouldn’t be in such a hurry.

Not just because you have countless worlds to look forward to, but because the world you’re now on was once one of them.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Here’s a tip, BRANDI, on how to bring absolute joy into your life faster than it may otherwise arrive:

Every day, in some small way, even secretly if you like, look for a chance to help someone else.

So happy,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you know, BRANDI, that hell isn’t a place, but a state of confusion?

That heaven is what you see, no matter where you are, when you know the truth?

And that light can hurt eyes that have been in the dark too long?

“No matter where you are” -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There are only two types of dreams, BRANDI.

Those that have come true.

And those that are coming true.

You slay me,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There’s never been a day in your life, BRANDI, when you were as close to your Create a lasting legacy, as you are today.

So very, very close -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Being fair and reasonable will earn you respect and admiration, but being genuinely kind, BRANDI, will make you a total love magnet.

Pucker up,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Life doesn’t give folks a break.

Nor does it test you.

Nor is there any such thing as luck, fate, or destiny.

On the other hand, BRANDI, your thoughts become things.

Which pretty much means you get to decide everything.

Better than winning the lottery,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It’s kind of strange, BRANDI, but first you have to know what you want, defined in terms of the end result.

And then you have to physically move toward it, without defining the hows.

At which point, the thing you want actually starts coming to you, on its own terms, from a direction completely unexpected.

Not unlike a cat,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, do you know what it’s going to feel like when the day comes and everything you now want has come to pass?

When you’re living in total abundance, in perfect health, looking fabulous, with friends and laughter wherever you go?

It’s going to feel like, “Yeah… of course.”

That’s how well I know you -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Many a wise soul, BRANDI, has come to find that, indeed, the best things in life are free… like sunrises, wagging tails, holding hands, and your imagination.

Whereas, only a very few of the wisest souls… have also found… that everything else is actually free too.

You can have your cake and eat it too,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
One of your greatest challenges, BRANDI, is realizing that the hurdles of time and space are simply figments of your imagination.

See no problems -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Why not pretend, BRANDI, just for today, that I am beside you in every moment?

That I will gladly carry your every burden.

Be your very best friend.

Wanting for you whatever you want for yourself.

Feeling only love, honor, and respect for your every choice.

Laughing when you laugh and crying when you cry.

Talking to you through whispers, hunches, and instincts.

Loving you always,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Nobody, BRANDI, is who they are based upon one decision, one day, one path, one chance, one relationship, or one anything else.

Every day is brand new and opportunity never stops knocking.

Who’s there?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
How could it be difficult, challenging, or hard, BRANDI, when so many others have done it?

You know, anything… like to Finish the cotbons book.

Don’t you love good news?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The toughest thing about meeting violence with kindness, BRANDI, comes from having to believe that a Divine Loving Intelligence is in control at all times, in all places.

Either you believe this or you don’t.

Trust me,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Guidance, attention, help, maybe.

Love, always.

Criticism, never.

What to give others, BRANDI.

Love always,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
By design, BRANDI, whenever you have a new dream, at that precise moment everything in your life is perfectly suited to bring it about even faster than if you had thought of it earlier.

You are always where you most “need” to be.

Nice footwork,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It’s not as if one day you’ll just look down, BRANDI, and discover you’re on the yellow brick road, living the life of your dreams.

But one day you’ll look back… and discover you always were.

The Wizard,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Shake the burden that comes from seeing your baby steps, BRANDI, as a necessary discipline.

See them, instead, as optional dance moves in life’s conga line that spark miracles, open floodgates, and lead to the near effortless manifestations of Create a lasting legacys.

Day-O!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It’s not the day you have to manage, BRANDI, but the moment.

It’s not the dragon you have to slay, but the fear.

And it’s not the path you have to know, but the destination.

What a relief, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It’s not the career you chose, BRANDI, the friend you married, or the path you took that determines success or happiness in life…

But that each day, in some small way, you sought to amaze yourself as much as be amazed.

You “wow” me,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The more you “enjoy,” BRANDI, the richer you become.

Anything and in every way.

Eureka!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Life-Adventurer All-Points Bulletin:

BRANDI, have you discovered yet how some angels—like the ones who heal with their smiles, who help light the way for others, and in whose path flowers gently sway—are actually disguised as people?

And have you also noticed that some of them don’t even know they’re angels?

Just sayin’ -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There’s no such thing as a lost soul, BRANDI.

I know where they are, and everyone makes it home.

Thanks for caring,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, here’s some sage advice I once scrawled onto a cave wall long before the wheel, Atlantis, and social media:

Aim with your heart, adjust with your head, and then simply do what you can, with what you have, from where you are.

Caves, email, same-same.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Life is where one goes, BRANDI, to temporarily believe in death, fleetingly forget their power, and briefly have the dickens scared out of them…

…voluntarily.

All in the name of adventure.

You’re “bad,”

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
So very much can happen, BRANDI, in a lifetime, or even on a single day of any lifetime.

Yet I can assure you that whatever has or will happen in yours, no matter what chasms you cross, heights you scale, or how many people you love and are loved by…

When all is said and done and you take that final look over your shoulder, what will humble you the very most will be that you got to be BRANDI M REGER.

Of all people,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Surprises, BRANDI, are life’s ultimate way of gradually waking you up from a deep, deep sleep.

Because they usually make you ask new questions.

Right?

Good and plenty,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Really, all one has to do to transform their life, BRANDI, is remind themselves to think and behave a little bit differently each day.

Rainbows and Clydesdales -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
True, new arrivals here instinctively look for “the LIGHT”—for comfort, insight, direction, and to finally know unconditional love.

But, BRANDI… no one ever said you have to wait until then to find it.

You know what to do -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
From really far out in space, BRANDI, do you know what your sun looks like?

A star.

And from any distance, do you know what you look like?

A superstar.

Love you like crazy glue,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, if anyone should ever ask if you're enlightened...

ALWAYS SAY, "YES!"

Same goes for being healthy, wealthy, and loved beyond imagination.

Got it?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you know that whenever you whisper, "I'm sorry,” a healing begins?

Did you know that whenever you whisper, "Thank you," more is sent?

And did you know that whenever you whisper, "I love you," days are added to your life… and a rose blooms?

In each case, BRANDI, I meant in addition to your fans going wild in the unseen.

With just a whisper…

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you know that if you get happy enough, BRANDI, you can actually hear colors and see music?

Paint without numbers? Eat desserts and lose weight? Spend money and have more?

Heal the sick? Feed the poor? Love unconditionally? And live forever?

If you get happy enough.

I am,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Today, just do a little bit, BRANDI, so I can do a big bit.

That's how it has always worked.

Big love,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It’s the “things” you love most, BRANDI, the “things” that are dearest to you, that you too often allow to define you.

Which explains the sometimes insufferable pain caused by their loss.

A wholly avoidable pain.

Ahhh… so hey, now you know.

You deserve to be happy, always -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You've got your agenda.

I've got my agenda.

OK... so my agenda is actually your agenda.

You do have an agenda, BRANDI. Right?

Dream on and dream big -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
To heal, correct, rebound, settle, restore, and prevail, BRANDI, are your nature.

Gifts that need not be opened or figured out to be used.

It’s the same for leading, creating, soaring, gliding, loving, and waltzing.

As always, let logic stand aside, have no fear, spirit will emerge… and so will your wings.

Love that look on your face right now -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Adversity, challenges, and bumps in the road, BRANDI, are often the first signs that a great healing has begun.

Thinking of you,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Haven't I always said, BRANDI, knock and it will be opened?

Prepare and the way shall be revealed?

Speak and all the elements will obey?

Act and I will, too?

Laugh and be healed?

Give and the floodgates will open?

Wink and you'll be winked at?

Dream and thy Kingdom will come?

Oh… Well, that's what I meant to say.

Wink,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you know why happy tears taste the same as sad tears, BRANDI?

Because all tears come from the ocean of love.

Your nautical wheeler,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Healing happens, BRANDI. Non-stop.

There's only healing.

Rest easy,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes when you’re ready for a change, BRANDI, and you kind of know it but won’t admit it, when it comes, not only are you surprised, but it hurts.

Yeah, I know that doesn’t help much, unless you remember the “ready” part.

Because there is simply no change that might ever transpire in time and space that happens before you’re fully able to use it for your own growth and glory.

Love watching you create,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
No one loses anything, BRANDI, that doesn’t eventually come back.

Love, grins, and horseshoes -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, in the time that it takes you to read this short Note, you could have planted a new image in your mind (anything you like, ideally with an emotional charge)…

I could have reacted (realigning planets, people, and trends)…

And floodgates would’ve begun trembling violently as we’d have been drawn infinitely closer to manifesting the vision you’d chosen.

Fortunately, there’s still time.

Hot dog,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Growth comes from change.

Happiness comes from acceptance.

Merrily, BRANDI, you’re built to do both at once.

2 Point Oh, baby -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Now repeat after me, BRANDI:

“I AM… ANYTHING I choose to be.”

Now choose…

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Freedom from the past, or anything else for that matter, BRANDI, always comes in the very instant you stop thinking about it.

Not that you needed to hear that…

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Every breakthrough, invention, and masterpiece that profoundly changed lives…. aways started out with just a little new thinking by one person.

And, BRANDI, you’re good at this.

Just think,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Most, BRANDI, including those who love you the very most, have absolutely no idea how much they depend upon you to follow your dreams and honor thyself.

But they do.

You go,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
True happiness, BRANDI, has never been contingent upon life.

It’s a choice.

Like you once were.

Proudly,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Some will hear but not listen.

Some will listen but not understand.

And some will understand but not act.

But, BRANDI, OMG, once you Finish the cotbons book… rest assured these very same friends will call you “lucky,” as they’re drawn to move with their own dreams.

Love to love you,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You know you’ve made it, BRANDI, when you suddenly realize that there’s nothing in the world anyone might ever give you, no matter how grand or fabulous, that you can’t give to yourself.

Nothing.

You’ve so made it,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The more one loves for no reason at all, BRANDI, the easier their life, the more reasons they're given, and the happier their times.

Love rocks,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Persistence, BRANDI, isn’t about knocking on one door until the darn thing opens.

It’s about knocking on all the doors.

Knockie, knockie,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you ever considered, BRANDI, that having aced time and space again and again and again, you’re here this time simply for the love of the game?

Just to smell the dirt?

To lend a hand?

Give comfort?

And maybe, for old times’ sake, to manifest a Create a lasting legacy like it was a morning cup of coffee, even though you’re way past having to prove anything?

Remember?

I do,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Pretending is the fastest way to believing, BRANDI, and believing is the fastest way to receiving.

Go!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Honor them.

Love them.

Help them.

Heal them.

But above all else, BRANDI, free them.

Everyone, of course -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes the best way to remain sane, BRANDI, is to love like crazy.

Works for me,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Before this odyssey ever began, BRANDI, there was you, your best friends, and wide-eyed curiosity among you about who would be the first to leap… the first to forget… the first to kiss… the first to tell… the first to fall… the first to get back up… and the first to remember…

It all began with a dare: to love in spite of it all.

Is that you, Mergatroid?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, your successes are inevitable…

Their degree, however, is up to you.

Aim higher -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You could not possibly be more loved, BRANDI, than you are right now.

Nor more talked about -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI… you’re not using all your angels.

What’s up with that?

Use all your angels.

Run faster, jump higher, get more.

Call, ask, give thanks -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Happily, BRANDI, the distance between having it all and not is only as great as you think.

It’s ya’ birthday!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The difference between taking baby steps and acting small, BRANDI, is that one prepares you for success, the other for a fall.

Cha, cha, cha -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A Community Service Reminder from The Universe:

BRANDI, your gifts are innumerable; your depth is incalculable; your presence is unforgettable.

Your touch is healing; your style is appealing; your power is mind-reeling.

And you are loved and adored on a moment-to-moment basis, more than you can now comprehend.

Just like we planned,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Yes, BRANDI, it’s true…

There are so many things you don’t know. Things, quite frankly, that you can’t know.

About the magic, the unseen, and the miraculous logistics that can so swiftly change your life.

But then, BRANDI, one needn’t learn the mysteries of the wind to sail effortlessly around the world either.

Actually, you got a pretty good deal.

Land ho,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you would simply imagine happiness, BRANDI—a smile stretching across your face, lightness in your step, hearing the sparkle in your voice—all things, material and spiritual, will be added unto you.

Happy EVERYTHING,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Your passion is your purpose, BRANDI.

And your purpose is to serve.

Settled?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Who would have ever thought that BRANDI M REGER would see, feel, and intuitively know so much that others completely miss?

Oh yeah, that was the whole point.

Had to be me,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I’ll love you no matter which path you choose, BRANDI.

And more than that—I’ll be waiting for you up ahead.

Whoo-hoo!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Not the pain, BRANDI, or the relief.

Not the answer or the question.

Not the challenge or the victory.

The song or the sparrow…

Nothing is random.

I’m like that,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Think of every single thing that you “have to” do to get through a day, BRANDI, as things you “get to” do before “your turn” is over.

Everything’s a gift,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Turning up the love, BRANDI, turns on everything else.

Love up,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, in life there will always be challenges that have manifested and dreams that haven’t.

But they’ll always pale in comparison to the number of dreams that have manifested and challenges that haven’t.

Just look around you.

You are my dream come true,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Dominion over all things, BRANDI, doesn’t come with age, spirituality, or even gratitude.

It comes whenever you say, “I am…” “I have…” “I will…”

Or… “It’s hard…” “I’m lost…” “I don’t know…”

I am BRANDI M REGER,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You were built to believe, designed to receive, and born to go where no one ever has.

Dream.

Dream really BIG now, BRANDI.

Behold, a light…

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes, BRANDI, when people say they aren’t worried, they really are.

Sometimes when they say they don’t care, they really care.

And sometimes when they say they don’t know, they do… but they’d rather not.

Yeah, most of the time.

Honestly,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
One of the things I’ve learned from witnessing civilization after civilization, BRANDI, is that one should never underestimate the profound resiliency of the human spirit, nor how swiftly things can change for the better, often overnight.

Swoosh!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It’s like you’re a planetary body, BRANDI, and at this very moment new friends, adventures, a Create a lasting legacy, and anything else you’d like are just a little “gravity” away.

That’s what visualizing is for.

Snag,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When you finally see what this whole time-space thing is all about, BRANDI…

You’re going to laugh.

You’re going to cry.

And you’re going to be so, so, so, so, so happy you LOVED as freely as you did.

Dotingly,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Thanks for being there, BRANDI, even through the “hard” times.

And sorry if they’ve ever seemed like too much.

But it was you, after all, who said, “I want it all—no matter the cost.”

You power shopper -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, you know the way.

You’re strong enough.

And you will prevail.

Otherwise, what would be the point?

The ascension has begun -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You knew there’d be things that would rattle your cage, push your buttons, and rock your boat, BRANDI.

Because each would remind you that there’s still more to know.

Becoming BRANDI M REGER -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if, BRANDI, you’re actually an ancient gladiator of love and joy who agreed to visit Earth during these primitive years to spark some new thinking, share a few smiles, and help others live deliberately as they discover they too are as awesome as you?

Just sayin’ -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Funny, huh, BRANDI, how some folks think that avoiding challenges will bring them peace.

As if the peace they now know didn’t come from earlier challenges that were faced… and mastered.

OK—not really that funny,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Behind your greatest fear, BRANDI, lies your newest superpower.

You’re welcome,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The easiest way to make the biggest difference in the world, BRANDI, begins with reaching out, right away, to those nearest.

And they happen to be ready.

Yeee-ha!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, do not trust facts.

Be the fact maker.

You decide everything -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
According to my records, BRANDI, ever since the very beginning of time, there hasn’t been one single day that the impossible hasn’t happened.

You can count on it –

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The very best moment in any long journey that makes a dream come true, BRANDI, comes not on the day you realize it has, but on the day you realize how little it mattered compared to loving the adventure it inspired.

Don’t ask me why, I just know what I know -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When you dream at night, BRANDI, anything can happen next.

You’re never limited by what you dreamt the night before.

You’re the Creator-Manifestor-Genius behind every bell, whistle, and sparrow.

Same for the dream of here and now.

Bam!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Essentially, BRANDI, transformation comes from thinking thoughts you’ve never thought before…

And showing up to meet them down streets you’ve never walked before.

Ready for some firsts?

Yodeling,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if every shortcoming, slip, or bobble you notice in another person, BRANDI, was choreographed by Divine Intelligence inviting you to wonder, ask, and think about how you might increase your own awesomeness?

Yeah, that’s how I roll -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Those little things that you alone experience, BRANDI, aren’t by chance.

The sign, the sparrow, the dragonfly; the whisper, the song, the lily.

It’s me and your team.

Always with you -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Not only are you now dreaming, BRANDI, but you’re adored.

And not only are you adored, but you’re guided.

A lot,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Ask your questions, BRANDI!

They’re one of the best ways to get our attention.

And one of the best ways to focus yours.

Needing to be needed,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Absolutely fabulous, BRANDI, is only ever a thought away.

Think it,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Don’t try to figure out the “hows” of it, BRANDI.

They’re not your job.

You only need to know what you want, like a Create a lasting legacy.

Then just follow your instincts and let me figure out the hows.

Think, think, and let go -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you frequently give yourself permission to doodle, wonder, and be totally unproductive, BRANDI, and you actually relish such interludes, I can guarantee that your genius, creativity, and productivity will increase exponentially.

I’ve seen it happen a billion times.

Through the roof,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When you spend money, BRANDI, whether a little or a lot, wisely or not, do you celebrate that you're creating opportunities, dancing with life, exchanging energy, supporting economies, feeding families, lessening poverty consciousness, demonstrating courage, validating life, eradicating fear, inviting magic into your life, and lifting humanity higher into the light?

I thought so.

Let's pop some tags -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, want to know what's better than having it all? Way, way better?

Not having it all, but knowing of its inevitability, in a never-ending adventure that’s just barely begun.

Yeeeeeeehaaaaaaaaaaaa!

The Universe

messages.subject: Manifesting Money Miracles starts tomorrow
messages.body:
Do you remember this Note from the Universe?

Usually, BRANDI, it’s not thinking about the bucks that makes one rich… but thinking rich that makes the bucks.

— The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you know what people who amass wealth, friends, and laughter have in common with those who don't?

Very often, BRANDI, both look around at their lives and say, "Yeah, this is who I am. It must have been meant to be."

Must be a trick of the light.

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It’s quite a small thing, BRANDI, to begin wondering:

But OMG, it makes for the BIGGEST life changes!

“And the people of San Antonio, began to gossip...” -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Like waves eternally lapping at the shore, BRANDI, the Universe is eternally knocking at your door with abundance and riches beyond imagining.

If only you knew…

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Actually, BRANDI, as people progress into possessing a greater spiritual awareness, they finally stop relying so heavily on the tools of intellect, logic, and common sense. A new freedom is achieved, their assent is accelerated, and a blossoming takes place.

But then later, into ever higher and higher realms of human consciousness, these tools are rediscovered and embraced; used with insight, balance, and care. And, would you believe, new freedoms are found, their acceleration is accelerated, and their blossoms blossom.

Who’d have thunk?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Not having enough money, BRANDI, is never the problem it seems.

First, lack is always temporary.

Second, change is only ever a few thoughts away.

And third, it's not like you haven't performed miracles before.

Honey, honey –

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Okay, okay… so you think you've done pretty well for yourself, BRANDI, and you have, but good golly, what lies in store…

Abundance, health, and harmony to the teeth! Plus, you're even gonna Finish the cotbons book.

You're gonna be BLOWN AWAY,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I’m so excited, BRANDI!

This year I’m going to get a new Create a lasting legacy!

Yes, I know… you are too.

BRANDI, how did you think I was going to get mine?

Rooting for you and pulling out all the stops -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The prospect of sheer elation that moves you in the direction of a new dream, BRANDI, will always pale in comparison to the elation you’ll find once it comes true.

You can bank on it.

Elated for you -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Quickie Workshop for Increasing “Profits” in Times of Global Chaos:

Think as much, if not more, about growing your income as you do of trimming your expenses.

And for extra credit, BRANDI, focus on customers more than vendors; smiles more than frowns; possibilities more than risks; options more than commitments; vacations more than overtime; detours more than setbacks; opportunities more than obstacles; and Goldilocks more than the bears.

End of Workshop -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It’s often from a sense of discontent, feelings of incompleteness, or twinges of unhappiness, BRANDI, that the seeds of great accomplishment are sown.

Can I get a “Whoohooo!”?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, it’s still my profound pleasure, absolute duty, and unswerving obligation to give you the Kingdom… according to your beliefs and expectations.

It’s the law.

Go ahead, make my day -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It may seem as if others can add to, or take from, what you have and who you are, BRANDI, yet at the end of every day, what you have and who you are is entirely a function of your thoughts, beliefs, and expectations.

Ungawa,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Just for the record, BRANDI, there isn’t a single thing I would change about you.

You’re still who I most love being -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It’s not that you worry, BRANDI, but that you care. A lot.

And knowing this can make such a difference, because then you can also remember that caring is my specialty, that every life unfolds in the palm of my hand, and that not one second of eternity is ever revealed that I haven’t carefully prepared.

Silly,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
As mentioned in the brochures, BRANDI, used for recruiting unusual life forms from distant realities:

“‘Time and Space’ is where you’re never judged, only loved, anyone can be a rock star, and your keys will be wherever you left them.”

Spot on, huh?

Unusual in a good way -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, did you know that you are now wiser than you’ve ever been, younger than you’ll ever be, and less likely to wish without taking action, pray without having faith, and hope without remembering the magic?

We marvel at your progress -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Life, BRANDI, is mostly defined by what you DO—not titles, degrees, salaries, or designations.

Think of this when visualizing your dream life… think of what you will be DOING.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Whoever said, “You can’t have it all,” BRANDI, must have been a very young soul.

Time and space actually exist to teach that you can.

Rock it,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The main reason someone moves mountains, wins friends, influences people, amasses a fortune, or anything else, BRANDI…

…is because they thought they would.

You can do this,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Remind them, BRANDI, that a “runner’s high” doesn’t come from just thinking about running.

Same thing for a “manifestor’s high.”

On your mark,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you think, BRANDI, that if someone finally realized:

…they’d continue doing the same old things, living the same old life, and waiting for the same old miracles?

Or would they begin thinking things they’ve never thought before, saying things they’ve never said before, and doing things they’ve never done before?

Precisely,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It really couldn’t be any easier, or more fun, huh, BRANDI?

I mean, you get to think whatever you like, I get to manifest it for you, and we both get to pretend we’re surprised by how far you go!

Whoa, BRANDI... Who knew you’d Finish the cotbons book??

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Performing miracles, BRANDI, isn’t a matter of doing the impossible, it’s a matter of re-imagining the possible.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Dearest BRANDI, I was about to wish that your every dream come true.

That you find yourself surrounded by friends, laughter, and good times.

I almost wished that your every cup runneth over financially, romantically, spiritually, and creatively.

That good health be your faithful companion, peace your guarded ally, and love your perpetual guide.

When suddenly, it dawned on me that as an infinite, powerful, fun-loving gladiator of joy, with eternity before you and the power of your thoughts to help shape it… it’s you, BRANDI M REGER, who will be granting wishes this year.

I’d like peace on earth, please -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you think it would be cheating, BRANDI, knowing all that I know, if I placed a bet on your inevitable happiness, success, and saunter?

Good. Because I have. It was called the “Big Bang,” and every moment of every day I walk in your shoes.

BRANDI, I knew what I was doing -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Try pretending that all you now believe to be real is not, BRANDI. And that all you wish to be real is. If only for a few minutes each day.

Then, try acting like all you wish to be real already is. With just a word here, a sentence there, or some little demonstration. If only in private.

Before long, you won’t even remember the difference between them… except your wishes will have changed.

I’m pretending you already do this stuff,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Truth be told, BRANDI…

No matter how logical or intuitive you are, neither of these virtues, no matter how greatly you were endowed, will ever enable you to peer into the future and reasonably predict the twists and turns your life may take, nor the circumstances, fortunes, and friends that might someday be your own.

It is, in fact, impossible.

That's what imagination is for.

Thoughts become things,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Holiday Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If it's not yet obvious to you, the real reason for this, and all seasons, is you, BRANDI. A more perfect child of the Universe has never lived. Until now, only celebrations cloaked in myth and mystery could hint at your divine heritage and sacred destiny. You are life's prayer of becoming and its answer. The first light at the dawn of eternity, drawn from the ether, so that I might know my own depth, discover new heights, and revel in seas of blessed emotion.

A pioneer into illusion, an adventurer into the unknown, and a lifter of veils. Courageous, heroic, and exalted by legions in the unseen.

To give beyond reason, to care beyond hope, to love without limit; to reach, stretch, and dream, in spite of your fears. These are the hallmarks of divinity—traits of the immortal—your badges of honor. May you wear them with a pride as great as what we feel for you.

Your light has illuminated darkened paths, your gaze has lifted broken spirits, and already your life has changed the course of history.

This is the time of year we celebrate BRANDI.

Bowing before Greatness,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The real reason your brain is so large, BRANDI, is so that you can vividly imagine all the exquisite, exciting, and enthralling details that your heart desires.

It’s not large enough, however, to help you figure out who you need to meet, when you need to meet them, where you need to be, or how you’re going to pull it all together.

But mine is.

Let’s do this,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The next time life tosses you a multiple-choice test, BRANDI, remember…

1. The more time you give it, the more choices you’ll have.

2. There’s always more than one right answer. And,

3. Waiting for divine intervention is almost never a good idea.

Poised for greatness,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, you're a creator.

Creators don't have to justify themselves. They don't have to prove anything.

It's the world around you—the illusions of your life—that must justify themselves.

It's the elements that must bow to your wishes.

It's the circumstances that must yield to your expectations.

It's time and space that are guests in your home, BRANDI, and not the other way around.

All right?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, do you have any idea how difficult it is shopping for folks who already have dominion over all things?

Think of it,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, the Top 10 signs a really huge dream of yours is about to come true:

10. You regularly visualize the end result, the after-party, or beyond.

9. Every day you "show up," doing something about it.

8. You’re not attached to how it will arrive into your life.

7. It really matters to you; you really care.

6. You know who the first 3 people are that you’ll call with the news.

5. You’re smiling and winking way more than normal.

4. Sometimes you speak and behave as if it’s already come to pass.

3. It probably doesn’t depend upon specific people.

2. You already know what your next big dream is.

1. You keep whispering "Sweet! Thank you! Yes!" with a clutched fist.

Sweet! Thank you! Yes!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
To be all I could be, BRANDI, I had to be you.

You had to be amazing.

And amazing had to be redefined.

Happily, it’s working -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Some things, BRANDI, you’ll know when you need to know and not a moment earlier.

That’s how it works when the answer you’re looking for depends on other events that must first settle, new players that need to be gathered, and serendipities that are still being calculated.

BRANDI, sometimes, not even I know until I know.

But you will,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In times of great stress and great joy, BRANDI, you are completely surrounded by loved ones in the unseen who adore and support you, wanting to help you in every way possible.

So, at those times, if you can remember to be calm and quiet and go within, you'll benefit most from their presence.

"Look, BRANDI is smiling… Whoohoooo!!!"

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Give thanks, BRANDI, whenever you want more.

Of anything,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Haven't all the years you've spent being Santa Claus, BRANDI, been more fun than all the years you spent waiting for Santa Claus?

And not just for the joy you've helped place on your favorite faces, but for your ability to act instead of wait.

Acting makes the suspense bearable. It gives you a starring role. Time passes more quickly. And best of all, it makes possible your dance with life as you network and mingle with other dancers.

And so it is in all things, BRANDI, especially those dreams that have placed their trust in you… act, don't wait.

Happy Hallelujah, Santa Claus!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you knew I answered whenever you spoke to me, BRANDI, would you be still enough to hear me?

Prepare to be amazed,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, when you look into the mirror each morning, do you apply your makeup or shaving cream to your reflection in the glass?

Then how about when it comes to “beautifying your life,” you skip trying to change the illusions and tweak their source—your thoughts, beliefs, and expectations.

Cool?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, nothing needs to be explained, justified, or even understood to move beyond it, transformed, wings afoot, chariots aflame, angels on high, sparkles trailing, fuzzy dice on the mirror…

Did you catch it? Nothing needs to be explained, justified, or even understood to move beyond it.

Let’s get carried away -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Speaking of giving thanks in advance, BRANDI, you do know who you should be thanking, don’t you?

Yourself.

Yeah, this is rather “advanced” in our curriculum, but between now and the manifestation, who do you think will have changed?

Let’s give it up for BRANDI M REGER…

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, around you right now there’s the seen and the unseen.

What is now seen was born of the unseen... not from the “seen” that preceded it.

Just like in your nighttime dreams—one night you might be selling balloons, the next night you’re a monarch.

To work on drawing new “seen” circumstances into your vision—like manifesting a Create a lasting legacy or to Finish the cotbons book—don’t be tricked into thinking that you must work within the limits of what’s now seen.

Instead, imagine it all in the unseen.

Now works for me -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Hubba, hubba, hubba, BRANDI!

Isn’t this a fun time of year? Lights everywhere, mistletoe, eggnog… and all the receiving!

Indeed, because when you receive, not only do you affirm your own worthiness and open the way for more, but you make possible even greater joys for the giver.

Tallyho, ho, ho!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A “Holiday Shopping” tip from your friend, the Universe:

During the merriment of your retail adventures, BRANDI, should you ever have to ask the clerk, “How much?” always follow their reply with raised eyebrows, a slight gasp, and a disbelieving, “That’s all?”

Santa’s watching,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Oh yes, BRANDI, yes indeed!

Today you’re going to be enveloped by the magic.

It will be in the air you breathe, the sounds you hear, and the sights you see.

Play off the moments in-between the moments, look into the unseen, and hear your angels.

Feel it, enjoy it, but most important, use it!

It’s already begun,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you noticed, BRANDI, that people usually do see past appearances?

Which pretty much means that on any given day you can wear any old thing and they’ll still get your goodness, feel your love, and know you rock.

Fear not, you are seen -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The way manifesting really works, BRANDI, is that your vision of what you want actually creates a mold that all the necessary physical elements rush to fill.

And the way the physical elements rush to do this… is by shifting and manipulating the ideal players and circumstances of your life into place through so-called accidents, coincidences, and miracles. All without you or them knowing what’s going on.

And it’s all perfectly legal -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There are only 3 things that can make your dreams come true, BRANDI:

Your thoughts, your words, and your actions.

Be the spark,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You know that vacation-kind-of-feeling you get when you travel?

When you feel a certain peace come over you?

When you feel at one with the world, filled with purpose, detached yet vital?

Well, BRANDI, whether or not you’re traveling, and whether or not you now feel it, at this very moment you are one with the world, filled with purpose, and unimaginably vital.

All bow,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, have you been leaning on me lately?

A lot?

For absolutely EVERYTHING?

Day and night, rain or shine, gummy bears or Gucci?

Just checkin’ –

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
At long last, BRANDI, a 3-Point Spiritual Litmus Test to see whether or not any old religious doctrine or modern day “ism” is worthy of celebration:

Hallelujah!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Through the prism of time and space, BRANDI, the scary stuff always looks scarier than it really is.

But this is offset by the fact that the great stuff is always greater—frequently on sale, comes in more flavors, and goes with pretty much everything.

Please pass the Grey Poupon,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The difference between being moments away from a big, HUGE dream coming true, BRANDI, rather than years, lies in physically behaving, day by day, as if the dream were real and all else were a dream.

Really,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In poll after poll, BRANDI, we've discovered that perhaps the very best thing about being truly enlightened is possessing that rapturous feeling of wanting to explode out of your skin with absolute joy—letting rip a couple of "Oh, Momma, Hallelujahs!”—yet being able to contain yourself without expressing so much as a hint of your ecstasy around those who just wouldn't understand.

Just thought you'd like to know.

Oh, Momma, Hallelujah!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Life, what a trip! One minute you're born, the next you ascend.

Then, you get to review where you’ve been:

“Aye yi yi! That seemed so real! First, I thought this and then that, then I became this and then that… OMG! There was a pattern!"

Fortunately, BRANDI, there's still time…

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Always speak of the past gratefully.

Of the future excitedly.

And of the present, BRANDI, with bobbing eyebrows and a Cheshire grin.

Spiritual politics, baby -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you don't give yourself credit for all that's good in your life, BRANDI, how can you expect yourself to create more?

Oh yeah, you’ll find a way. But it might be slower.

Expect more,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, you can have it all. And there is enough for everyone.

Besides, just think of all the lives you'll enrich once you have your fabulous Finish the cotbons book.

For the benefit of all, BRANDI, keep dreaming big... it's all closer than you think.

Imagine,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Here's a hint on figuring out your life's purpose…

BRANDI, it almost never lies behind the doors marked, "Be Practical," "Get Real," or "Nothing to Fear."

Knock, knock -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
First, as a child, it seems like the entire world is there for you and you rush to drink from its every cup, sometimes wondering to yourself how anything could ever be more fun.

Then, as you grow older, if you're observant, you realize much of what you enjoy was made possible by the contributions, work, and labor of those who came before you, and you're taken aback, disappointed even, because with maturity you can now see cracks in the façades, imperfections in the details, and 10,000 ways it could have all been done better.

At which point, folks typically choose one of two paths: Spend a lifetime lamenting how far from perfect things are. Or, to one degree or another, roll up their sleeves and pitch in.

And should they choose the latter with gusto, dear BRANDI, they will come to know, to the core of their sacred being, that the differences they might make in the world cannot be made by another. And then they will discover the answer to their often-wondered childhood question… that the most fun one can have in time and space comes from making such a difference, and that the joy derived from serving is 10,000 times that of being served.

At your service -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
No one, BRANDI, can see into your heart.

Which is why you sometimes have to show them how you feel.

Winks & hugs -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Like most things in life, BRANDI, getting what you want, or doing something new, or being really honest with yourself is really challenging for first timers.

But then it becomes patently, ridiculously, absurdly, and preposterously EASY for the rest of eternity.

I'd say go for it, nail it, whatever it takes, because easy is good and eternity is long.

¿Comprende?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
For as long as a dream lives inside of you, BRANDI, there's a plan for its time in space.

Trust me,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
By design, BRANDI, you are stronger than whatever you may create.

Including the lions and tigers and bears now in your life.

Oh, my!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
According to recently released reports, BRANDI…

In terms of:

You are, indeed, a billionaire.

O.G. -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Lack, disease, and discord always—and only—stem from misunderstandings of the “truths that be.”

Only thing is, it never dawns on most that they might be misunderstanding something until they meet such vexations.

Unless, of course, they become wise enough to question their own conclusions. Especially when they’re most assured of their own righteousness.

You’re one of the ones who is wise enough, BRANDI -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The thing about making it big, and doing it fast, BRANDI, is that invariably the first steps will be small and slow.

Which oddly, for many, is reason enough not to take them. After all, they rationalize, as believers in magic, miracles, and a conspiring Universe, taking small, slow steps is just settling for less.

You know better, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It seemed like a good idea at the time, but who would have ever thought that the physical senses would be used to draw conclusions about where you're headed, instead of simply taking notice of where you've been?

The illusions that surround you today, BRANDI, have very little to do with the illusions that will surround you tomorrow.

Which barely hints at how unlimited you truly are.

Way cool -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I know you know this, BRANDI, but your job is not who you are, your car is not who you are, your looks are not who you are, not even your body, BRANDI, is who you are.

You’re simply on an adventure, just trying things out, to see what you like, to see what you don’t… because you can, because it’s temporary, and because it’s all on the way "home."

Oh-h-h-h-h-h yeah…

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes, BRANDI, instead of trying to find reasons to be happy, you can just be happy for no reason.

Do you think I need reasons?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Are you ready to consider that what you used to consider is now inconsiderable, BRANDI?

Like that you’re as loved for your fears as you are for your courage.

That’s progress,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Never has there been a moment in your life, BRANDI, that wasn’t also a moment in mine.

Never have you laughed without me, cried alone, or loved in vain.

And never have you dreamed a dream that I had not ordained.

Thanks,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I know a lot, BRANDI.

But what I couldn’t possibly know is what YOU will think next.

And for those very thoughts worlds will be born that even I could not have brought forth.

Thanks from everyone, everywhere, always -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Remember, BRANDI, I agreed to be the magic…

you agreed to be the magician.

Let’s do this,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The top 10 things people claim to have taken for granted, BRANDI, when they were alive:

10. That there really were no coincidences.

9. How easy life was when they stopped struggling.

8. That all their prayers and thoughts made a difference.

7. How much guidance they received at all times.

6. That any and all dreams really can come true.

5. How far ripples of kindness actually spread.

4. How good-looking and fun they always were.

3. How present “God” was in everyone, everything, everywhere, always.

2. What really was important: happiness, friendships, love.

1. How important they were to so many.

As expressed by the recently departed, fresh after their life-reviews on the big, BIG screen.

Ah-so,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The evolution of all spiritual life, BRANDI, includes 3 absolutes:

Grasshopper,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
To some, on other planets, BRANDI, you get more done in a single day than they do in an entire year.

On this planet, however, getting things done has been confused with worthiness.

I guess that pretty much answers the intelligent life question.

You’re still out of this world,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, there’ve been no mistakes.

Those were just practice swings.

For the many home runs that will begin the legend.

It’s already begun,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If I can handle plate tectonics… if I can wrap Saturn in rings… if I can hurl planets into place and design Milky Ways, moths, and millipedes… just think what I can do for you.

BRANDI, want more.

A lot more.

It opens doors.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Ten thousand times a day, dear BRANDI, for ten thousand different reasons, angels share your story to inspire, comfort, and reassure the world’s most able dreamers, thinkers, and lovers.

Well, I’d want to know -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you know there are planets "out there" with intelligent life, where if suddenly one of the locals began demonstrating your brand of emotional courage and grit, BRANDI, they'd be in all the news, receive lucrative endorsements, and have their own talk show?

Tell them about these Notes when the mother ship lands,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You've come a long way, BRANDI, from the timid, shy soul you once were.

Hiding out on distant planets, befriending alien tree forms, splashing in snow-fed streams, and secretly planning your time on Earth with a Create a lasting legacy and all.

So, what do you say we drop all the practical logic, rational reasonableness, and cautious optimism, and give those tree forms something to talk about… before they start making stuff up.

You know trees.

I'm totally with you on this -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When it comes to other people on planet Earth, BRANDI, including those with very different ideas than yours, what you want to keep in mind… is that you’re all related.

Really, really.

Brothers and sisters,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The veils begin to lift, BRANDI, once defenses begin to fall.

Be vulnerable.

Have it all,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Many come close, BRANDI, yet few dare, as boldly as yourself, to live without judgment, to give without expecting, and to love for no reason.

We call it a spiritual trifecta.

To the winner’s circle,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Go with it. Roll, BRANDI. Swerve.

The “unexpected” is just my way of preparing you for more than you knew to ask for.

Bounce back, meander, 2-step -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When you move toward a dream, BRANDI, it moves toward you.

When you move every day, it moves every day.

Someone pass me a calculator -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Love always wins, BRANDI.

Kindness always prevails.

And smiles always disarm.

Touché,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
People believe what they want to believe, BRANDI.

And this, alone, explains what they have or don’t have.

Does that make your entire flippin’ day or what?!

I believe in you,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Dreams come true, BRANDI, that’s what they do. The only variable is when.

For the slow approach: Resist. Attach. Insist. Deny. Stop. Second guess. Whine. Argue. Defend. Protest. Cry. Struggle. And ask others when you know the answer yourself.

For the quick approach: Visualize. Pretend. Prepare. Dodge. Roll. Serpentine. Do not waver over intentions. Alternate your approaches. Release your doubts. Show up, even when nothing happens. And keep giving thanks in advance.

Thanks, again -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You should probably know, BRANDI, you have someone on “this side” helping you.

Besides me,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, what if, this very moment, you realized you were dreaming?

Dreaming you were at home, at work, wherever you now are, reading this Note.

And in your dream, you realized that as real as it all seemed, there was also a greater reality from which you were dreaming and a greater essence that is true self. That you came from eternity and will return to eternity, and that this greater You is your dream weaver.

Then suddenly, within your dream, it dawned on you that you could awaken from this, transcend the illusions, and claim dominion over all things… by simply:

Yeeeee-haaaaaaaaaaaaa!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
All you ever have to do, BRANDI, to change absolutely everything is think differently.

But this you have to do.

Love you like crazy,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Ever wish for do-over days, BRANDI? You know, hit the reset-button and give ‘er another shot?

Sure.

Will today work?

It’s never too late,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The real reason you chose to be here, BRANDI, was simply to be who you now are.

Score,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There’s always a price to be paid for doing, being, and having more, but it has little to do with working harder or knowing the “right” people.

In as few words as possible, BRANDI… it often boils down to simply “getting out more.”

Even more,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There are lots of people out there in the world, BRANDI, whose lives would be made so much richer if only they’d let you in.

And perhaps, vice versa?

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Way back when, BRANDI, long before I had even dreamed of your lovely, radiant jungles of time and space... I’m not ashamed to admit, I wanted more. More adventure, more love, and, above all, more fun.

Then I hatched this plan: Create a world of illusions. A place where I don’t have to always be “right.” Where I can claim my omniscience. Or not. A place where I could sleep in every now and then.

And that wasn’t all. It would have to be magical and enchanting. Hinting everywhere of truth. With Masai Maras, Himalayas, and jambalaya. Crashing oceans, heaving mountains, and vast oceans. And importantly, reflections of myself in all living things.

And for its crowning glory, life would have to be so extraordinarily easy, manifesting one’s dreams so effortless, and success so inevitable that there would always be those, from every walk of life, who would be able to prove it. Shining examples for all the others who had not yet noticed.

How do you like it so far?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Most people quickly forget car types, brand names, and who could throw a Frisbee, BRANDI, but forever remember the broadly smiling, animal talking, tree hugging eccentrics they befriended.

Go for the latter.

Putting the "U" in Unforgettable,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you realize, BRANDI, that those now in your life—who are dreaming, scheming, explaining, denying, laughing, or crying—are all influenced by your expectations of them?

And that this is a really good thing?

You influencer,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, life is like a game...

To win, dream and go with the flow.

To come in second, dream and resist everything to the contrary.

You’re there to win,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Remember, BRANDI, you're always granted lots of leeway, wiggle room, and tolerance when engaging life's magic.

You pretty much just need to have a dream and show up, then wands start waving all over the place.

Abara-shazam!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you know, BRANDI, that there's always someone here, who loves you more than words can say, at your side with you there?

Oh, ooh, wow…

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Just because learning never ends, BRANDI, doesn't mean there is any such thing as a "mistake."

Because no matter how things appear, you live in a world where everything that happens makes everyone more, forever and ever.

Win/win/win/win/win…

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There are only two types of people, BRANDI:

Those you now love.

And those you will love.

That’s what life’s for,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Peculiarly, BRANDI, did you know that the single most effective piece of advice ever given to anyone who wanted a life partner is the exact same single most effective piece of advice ever given to anyone who wanted to live in prosperity?!

Which also happens to be the single most effective piece of advice ever given to anyone who wished to discover their purpose, foster peace on Earth, improve their health, Finish the cotbons book, or dance Gangnam Style?!

“Be happy now.”

Whoop! Whoop!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes, lifetimes are chosen to be with friends.

And sometimes, BRANDI, one friend agrees to be off balance and the other balanced.

One teaches stability, the other teaches spontaneity.

Gets kind of wonky though, if either starts thinking they're more important to the other than the other is to them.

You know?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Miracles don't really require a belief in magic, BRANDI, just a disbelief in limits.

At which point there's little you can do to stem their tide.

Cool, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
For all things and non-things that you may ever want, BRANDI, understand that sometimes the fastest way to get them is to forget them and to focus instead on just being the most amazing human being you can be.

At which point all your heart’s desires, spoken or unspoken, will be drawn to you more powerfully than a magnet is drawn to steel.

Have an amazing day,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The real trick, BRANDI, for confronting boredom is to ask more questions.

For tackling loneliness, it’s to take more action.

And for easing sadness, it’s to think more of others.

Then we dance,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Let's get back to basics, BRANDI…

You live in a dreamworld where all things are possible.

Your mere existence is the undeniable proof.

Hallelujah,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In the adventure of life, at first, no one “gets it.” So help is sent.

Then, over time, some start getting it, but no one lives it. So more help is sent.

Soon, some start living it and even more start getting it, and an upward spiral ensues.

Eventually, of course, everyone is getting it and living it...

So the question to ask yourself these days, BRANDI, is, "Who shall I help next?"

You so get it,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you can just remember where this is all going, BRANDI, no road will seem too bumpy, no night will seem too lonely, and no price will seem too great.

Meanwhile, your high vibes will bring peace to babes and nations.

Careful now,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
True life mastery, BRANDI, is more a function of knowing what to want than knowing how to get what you want.

What?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The Top 10 things about time and space, BRANDI, that are easiest to forget…

1. You chose to be here and you knew what you were doing.

2. There are no “tests” and you’re not being judged.

3. Everyone’s doing their best with what they know.

4. You already have whatever you’re looking for.

5. You are of the Divine, pure God, and so is everyone else.

6. Religion needs spirituality; spirituality does not need religion.

7. You’re naturally inclined to succeed—at everything you do.

8. You happen to life, life does not happen to you.

9. Order, healing, and love belie every moment of chaos, pain, and fear.

10. Following your heart is the best way to help others.

The truth shall set you free,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A Dream-Manifestation Workaround for those tired of visualizing, giving thanks, and acting “as if,” BRANDI, is to love your life so greatly—exactly as it is—that you become a total magnet for MORE! MORE! MORE! of ALL ELSE you could ever love.

You magnet,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you can make just one person smile today, if only by giving them one of yours, BRANDI, it just might change their entire week, which just might change their entire life.

I know these things,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
How adventurous would life be, BRANDI, if you were “challenge free”?

If you had the perfect body, perfect self-esteem, everyone loved you, and you won the lottery every week?

Now what if, painful as they may temporarily be, you could choose a lifetime during which challenges would arise whenever your thinking needed expansion, on the sole condition that every one of them could be overcome no matter how daunting they seemed?

Everything makes you more,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Don’t worry about your “negative” thoughts, BRANDI. They’re par for the course in the jungles of time and space. Change them when you can, but when they overrun you, let them run.

Because no matter how persistent they are, you can always spend just 5 minutes a day in a quiet place, doing your best to imagine your dreams as if they’ve already come true, seeing yourself happy, laughing, and smiling from ear to ear. This will be enough, it’s always enough, even if while you’re imagining, the negative thoughts creep in. After 5 minutes, leave it alone.

You’re in time and space for one reason: to thrive. There’s no 50/50 about it. You are OF the Creator, BY the Creator, and now a Creator yourself, alive on a stage YOU designed for your own adventures. You were not an afterthought, and you didn’t design it to simply eek by.

All the elements are beholden to you; you summoned them, you dreamed them into place, and now they conspire endlessly in your favor. “On a dime” your life can improve for the better with the slightest effort on your part, no matter how insurmountable the odds, nor how futile your thoughts and deeds may seem.

You are “the prodigal child.” In a heartbeat, you’re welcomed back into the fold. In an instant, you can be carried along by life’s current once you stop struggling against it.

And for these reasons and many more, it’s as if your positive thoughts are 10,000 times more powerful than your negative thoughts; 10,000 times more in alignment with the magnificent tidal wave of energy that you are; 10,000 times more likely to become the things you want than the things you don’t want.

Coolness -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, do you know why you are you?

Because no one else could be.

Thank you,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
