Have you noticed, BRANDI, how all your life I’ve been using you to help make other people’s dreams come true?

Cool.

Just didn’t want you to think I haven’t noticed it too.

Talk about karma,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
For every setback, disappointment, and heartbreak, BRANDI, ask yourself:

“What does this create the opportunity for?”

And therein you will find its gift.

Everything has a reason,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The entire world now spins in the palm of your hand, BRANDI.

A Create a lasting legacy is not asking for too much.

Come on, let’s go -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Too often, BRANDI, the only difference between HAVE and HAVE NOT depends on whether or not the initial request was followed by a thank you, yee-haw, and action rather than a question mark, timidity, and more scrolling on your phone.

Don’t ask. Give thanks. Bust a move.

Yo -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Life? I kind of see it like this, BRANDI:

Second after second, illusion after illusion, miracle after miracle… an unending parade of opportunities to catch yourself in the act of creating.

Gotcha!

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The secret to every success, BRANDI, lies not in what or even who you know, but in clearly “seeing” where you want to go.

And going.

The power to have it all,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if everything that’s happened so far, BRANDI, was just practice for when things get really, really good?

Really, really soon -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The one thing all famous authors, world-class athletes, business tycoons, singers, actors, and celebrated achievers in any field have in common, BRANDI, is that they all began their journeys when they were none of these things.

Yet still, they began their journeys.

You are so poised for greatness,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, I just wanted you to know, once and for all, that:

At ease,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Reality is big, BRANDI, but your dreams are BIGGER.

Literally,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Straight from The Zippy Handbook for Faster Manifesting in Any Time-Space Continuum:

“When you want your really gigantic dreams to come true, BRANDI, it helps to keep busy and stay happy.”

Actually, I added your name, BRANDI.

Busy being happy,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What I most want you to dream of, BRANDI, are possibilities that thrill you.

What I most want you to feel is happy.

And what I most want you to know is that you’re loved.

Always,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's not from the known, BRANDI, but the unknown that creativity and inventiveness are born.

Turn away from the predictable, cliché, and reliable. Brave the void where the darkness is greatest. Trust the quiet, find the stillness, feel the calm. Then steadily think, speak, and move as if you were led. Behave as if your vision were clear.

Anticipate the emotional rush that will come with your triumph. And as if by magic, as you raise your pen to write, you'll find the words have already been summoned, flooded in light that was there all along, in a world that has just as anxiously anticipated your arrival.

Just don't let them worship you, BRANDI.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Hey, BRANDI… It's OK. Everything is fine.

You've always been guided. Even now you are watched and held and adored.

You've made great stuff happen, and you will make more great stuff happen. You've changed lives. You've changed your own. You've moved mountains and done the impossible.

You've been scared and you overcame. You've been knocked down and you rose back up. And you've been lost, or so you thought, only to discover it was just the calm before another storm of creativity, love, and fun.

Humbled like the rest of 'em –

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Usually the most beautiful people, the most popular, the most followed, the “in” and chic, the cool and hip… are the last ones to ever wonder about life, how it really works, manifesting change, and making a difference.

BRANDI, you totally beat the system.

Ever proud,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, Your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If one hangs out in time and space long enough, BRANDI, they’ll inevitably learn it’s through the twin gateways of persistence and patience that masters become masters.

Of all things,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, Your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Remember, BRANDI, if something, anything, ever seems difficult, there’s something you’re missing.

Feel better?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, Your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
For you, BRANDI, it's never really been all about the cottage at the beach, a multimillion-dollar bank account, or the adoration of fans, has it?

Okay, sure, you could roll with it…

Instead, it's been about having a life that allows for the expression of your creativity and exchanging your rare and special gifts with the world. To be yourself, no matter the cost, laughing often, and knowing to your core the meaning of love, friendship, and hot chocolate on a freezing cold night.

Just wanted you to know that I know this about you. And I think it's just great how you're imagining the latter when you visualize these days. Especially the laughter and love.

Pretty much got you pegged, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, Your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Every act of kindness, BRANDI, gets the nod, opens the heart, dampens the fear, turns the page, ups the ante, tips the point, heightens the joy, changes the world, rows the boat, adds to the love, and, if you’ve been rather extraordinary lately, turns Thursdays into Fridays.

See?

The Universe

messages.subject: From an idea… to 4 billion emails  - THANK YOU! ❤️
messages.body:
Dearest BRANDI,

The very first Note from the Universe ever sent said:

Your Attention, please... Your Attention Please...

BRANDI, this is the Universe and today I'll be recording your every thought, word, and deed. No matter how generous or stingy. No matter how helpful or hurtful. And everything I record for you will be played back as some type of manifestation in your life.

Thank you, that is all.

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, Your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you knew for absolute certain, BRANDI, that every little thing you did today would later be scrutinized, literally moment by moment, by a future you and future friends, as well as anyone else wanting to learn and grow…

And that you’d all be paying super close attention to your patience, kindness, and love, given or withheld…

How might you treat the very next person you see after reading this Note?

Yeah,

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, Your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Generosity and gratitude, BRANDI, turn good into great.

Thank you, you’re welcome -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, Your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, you’re dre-e-e-e-aming…

And whenever dreaming, it’s wise to remember that no matter what may ever happen, the dreamer is always greater than the dream.

You’re the greatest -

The Universe

messages.subject: BRANDI, Your Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if, BRANDI, EVERYONE in your life was really just an actor or actress secretly there just so that YOU might live, love, and learn?

And the script that they read from... was actually written by you?

Word,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, what would you call a "place,"

Where "melodies divine" haunt the air,

Crowded with angels,

Showered in unconditional love,

Loaded with second chances,

Adorned with impossible beauty,

Bursting at the seams with magic,

Where everything is possible, all are ONE, and never has a mistake been made?

How about "Here and Now"?

You, BRANDI, of all people, deserve the heavenly days before you.

Your Comrade in Adventure,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Actually, BRANDI, the less you think about how you can get something—like money, love, or laughter—the faster it will come.

Walkin' on sunshine,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
"Where" you are, BRANDI, is never "who" you are.

You're always more.

Infinitely more,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
While one's capacity to dream great dreams is truly infinite, BRANDI, the capacity to do great things is mightily dependent upon one's ability to do little, baby, trite, mortal, dull, and sometimes silly things.

Yeah, easy for you, huh?

Whooohoooo,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
And the day will come, BRANDI, when all the gold in the world will not appeal to you as much as being who and where you already are with what you already have.

If it hasn't already.

Thank you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Are you hearing a lot more "I love yous" lately, BRANDI, or is it just me?

Actually, I wouldn't have asked if the answer wasn't so obvious, but it is fun to point it out.

Get it on,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Actually, BRANDI, it's not that we don't have celebrities here.

Everyone is one.

Yet still, all eyes are upon the stars now learning that their thoughts become things.

That's you -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Aim with your heart, BRANDI.

Steer with your baby steps.

And know that it always works.

Love you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, do you think anyone else could really shortchange you, physically or emotionally, without placing the world in your debt?

And don't you think that all such debts must be repaid in this magical, mystical, and, above all else, fair Universe?

You’ve volunteered for this because you knew the upside.

You are wiser than you now realize -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A Universal Rule on Decision Making…

Don't make them, BRANDI, until it's time to make them.

Unless you already know what you want… in which case, there’s no decision to be made.

You know,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A THANK YOU from the Universe.

Bravo, BRANDI, and congratulations! You did well for yourself in the past 12 months. Very, very well, indeed.

As a thank you for your persistence, particularly with the challenges you chose, I've decided that in the following 12 months the "cards" of life will be stacked in your favor, wildly.

For every dream you dream, I'll scheme. For every claim you stake, I'll pay. Basically, you call the shots, and I'll shoot… but you gotta call the shots… you have to call the shots.

Then I suggest you duck (out of my way) -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A main "Criterion of Consciousness" within the human experience, BRANDI, is never having all you want.

For as one dream comes true, another swiftly takes its place.

Not having all you want is one of life's constants.

And learning to be happy while not yet having what you presently want is the first "Criterion of Joy."

Nail it, and for the rest of your life people will be asking what it is about you.

Desire, BRANDI, is a beautiful thing -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
All that you need to have all that you want, BRANDI, will be provided—as if by magic—once you know what you want and you consistently do something about it.

I love watching you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Arguing and getting angry, BRANDI, doesn’t work.

Understanding and loving always works.

Of course, the work at hand, BRANDI, is your own happiness.

Another day on the J.O.B. -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A few words on perspective:

In all of time and space, BRANDI, there is no challenge, pothole, mountain, chasm, hurdle, or foe larger than you. Not even close.

Although if all you use to size them up are your physical senses…

You have more sense, and senses, than that.

Yes?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Of course you're strong enough, BRANDI.

Or what would be the whole point?

Go forth,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Don’t worry that some seem not to notice your refinement, illumination, and sashay, BRANDI.

They’re still learning from you in their own way.

Yours,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Big dreams come true, BRANDI, as easily as little ones.

Rich dreams come true as easily as poor ones.

Friendly dreams come true as easily as lonely ones.

And you and I will be together until the end of time.

So…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Turn the jungles of time and space into a patio garden, BRANDI…

By realizing that their many mysteries actually conspire on your behalf.

Hoe,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Hunches, instincts, and intuition are priceless, BRANDI, because they throw you into action.

Right?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, put yourself deep into the picture of your dreams.

Feel, hear, see, taste, and smell the differences in your life.

Imagine the many wonderful and surprising side effects of their manifestation… and see if I can't connect the dots.

This is how I roll,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Be at peace, dear BRANDI, rest easy, relax, coast, and luxuriate to any degree that you can allow yourself, for the day will inevitably dawn when you'll understand all the “reasons” that now elude you, bless the darkness that now seems to separate you, and celebrate the ancient choices that once made you.

Just as we do.

Trust me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Visualize, show up, happy dance.

BRANDI, you can do this.

Dip,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
With self-confidence, BRANDI, the world bows to greet you and coincidence becomes your partner.

Self-confidence comes from loving yourself.

And loving yourself comes from knowing that you are, still, exactly who I most want to be.

I so do,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Fear, BRANDI, like joy, usually means that you're exactly where you should be…

Learning what you're ready to learn…

About to become more than who you were.

Whoohoo!!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you think about it just a smidge, BRANDI, I'm sure you'll see that you have always been exactly who I most wanted to be.

Nothing else would make any sense.

And you still are,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When suddenly the unexpected happens, BRANDI, it’s always me...

Just getting everything ready for the time of your life.

Love you, mean it -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, giving tells the Universe that you believe you are provided for.

The act of giving is a demonstration of faith that you will remain whole, that your coffers will be replenished, and that love is what matters most.

And for whosoever believes these things to be true, it shall become their reality, and abundance shall be showered upon them unceasingly, as if the heavens had opened up.

Adventurers 9:19 -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
For the record, BRANDI, life is not fair.

Your thoughts become things, your words give you wings, and legions lie in wait at your beck and call.

Life is way more than fair -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It totally flips me out, BRANDI.

People talk to me, they ask me stuff, they show me things... yet so rarely do they ever expect a reply.

Can you hear me now?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if every unexpected delay, postponement, or redirect, BRANDI, only meant that at the very last second, right before the scheduled manifestation, I had an even better idea?

It happens.

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, what if all the people in your life, every single one of them, even the disagreeable ones, asked to be there so that your light might brighten their way?

That’s how it works,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Want to know who you really meet in heaven, BRANDI?

No… after the parade.

No… after the breakdancing and hula-hooping.

No… BRANDI, after you meet the good souls who invented rainy nights and sleeping late.

Yes… the other parts of yourself who were too afraid of losing themselves in time and space; of forgetting their divinity, power, and reach; who shuddered at the thought of even momentarily believing in goodbyes, loss, and loneliness.

And you shall make them whole again.

You trailblazer -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A happy moment, BRANDI, will seed ten thousand more.

Hoe,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, everything is easy when you live in a dream world.

As long as you know that you're dreaming.

You do and you can -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Actually, BRANDI, your dreams and desires come from a future dimension where they already exist, and the dreamers of such dreams have future selves who now live there and are oh-so-anxious to show you what is truly possible.

Fade out… to the sound of crackling, rolling, happy thunder on a clear, sunny day.

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
No more "supposed-tos," OK, BRANDI?

You're not supposed to work harder, look better, be quiet, talk more, run faster, be happier, stay longer, leave earlier, negotiate, settle, start, stop, move, try, win, shake, rattle, or roll.

Other people made all that up.

I love you the way you are,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Dream it, BRANDI.

Show up.

Boom!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Cool, huh, BRANDI? Being among the very first to "get" what's going on.

To sense the promise, dare the dream, feel the power, tempt the fear, know the truth, rise above, and be a light to billions who will follow.

Except, of course, it's sometimes lonely.

All hail,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You know what makes the darkest of times bearable, BRANDI?

Remembering that the world you live in is fleeting and illusionary; a playground for angels to rediscover their power. Where everything that happens bears a gift and that no matter what happens, comebacks and upward spirals are only ever a few new thoughts, words, and baby steps away.

And remembering that "somewhere back home," each dreamer sleeps comfortably in the palm of my hand, often with a cheshire grin, a hint of giggles, and, while quite rare, a spot of drool.

Nice wings,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, every little thing you think, say, or do—or don’t—makes a BIG difference.

This is how you roll -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, the beginner scorns criticism.

The old soul carefully considers it.

And the Master says, “But, of course!”

H-m-m-m-m-m-

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The main reason some can move mountains, win friends, influence people, amass a fortune, or make anything else happen, BRANDI…

…is because they thought they could.

You can do that -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you hide your power, BRANDI, feign your innocence, and generally fret that your confidence will rub some folks the wrong way, it’s no wonder misguided young souls will try to walk all over you.

Be proud of your magnificence.

Loving you till the cows come home -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Perception is not like a flashlight in the dark, illuminating whatever it’s aimed at.

BRANDI, it creates what it’s aimed at.

Praise be -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Yeah, there are times when I'm HOT, BRANDI, and there are times when I'm just plain, smokin' HOT.

And the latter happens when you not only visualize with emotion, but you then physically move with your dreams as if you knew of their imminent, inevitable arrival.

Thoughts become things,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, trusting that which you cannot touch, taste, hear, smell, or see is ultimately how you'll touch, taste, hear, smell, and see the most.

And we're talkin' all that glitters, giggles, and gallops, for starters…

Giddy-up,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Through the night comes the light that brings the day.

Through your mind goes the thought that forms the clay.

And every single chance I get, BRANDI, in every single way I know, I'm pressing out all that I have to you in exactly the amounts you've imagined.

Rolling like thunder,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
No matter how things seem, BRANDI, hope is near and love is present.

In the house,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you know the number one way to avert chaos, BRANDI, in one’s own life?

Right!!! "What chaos?"

To the mall,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, you don't have to, nor can you, figure out all the "hows"!

Besides, you opted for the “Surprise me often!” life package.

Brace yourself,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Thinking is your only true point of contact in the world, BRANDI, your only mode of influence to the circumstances of the world.

Good thing it's so easy -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Nothing you will ever do, be, or have, BRANDI, no matter how stunning and spectacular, will ever compare to the achievement of your life, here and now.

Trust me, “achievement” is the right word.

All bow,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, for 10 seconds please do not think of the color red… not even quickly. Do not think of red.

BRANDI!

OK, so, happily red is cool and we weren't talking about anything you don't want, don't need, or don't like.

World peace rocks and so does being rich -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The reason for all challenges, BRANDI, is so that you can finally learn that none are bigger than you.

Winner,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You do realize, BRANDI, that your batting average is 100% when it comes to prevailing in adversity, setbacks, challenges, and recessions?

No wonder you have so many followers here.

Mwah, baby -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Plan the celebration now, BRANDI.

Sweep the floor. Clean the slate. Pick a date.

Window shop, buy a few things, go out on a limb.

Rearrange the furniture, pick some flowers, take some time off.

No, no, BRANDI. Not necessarily because a tipping point has been reached... but because this is how you reach it.

How's today looking?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, it's within you: the answers you seek, the direction you want, and the power to be whoever you want to be.

Your dreams are not yours by mere whim. They've been meticulously matched to the gifts you're now developing. Designed to lure you within, where your true power lies, and then out into the world, beyond imagined limitations and fears.

Trust yourself. Listen to your heart. You have the right stuff, you know what to do, and it can all be yours.

Hosanna in the highest,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Now, as the Universe, I don't like telling anyone what they should or shouldn't do.

But when the urge arises, I proceed in the most delicate, gentle, and loving way possible:

BRANDI, you look radiant this morning!

Did you enjoy our dreams last night concerning the Earth changes and manifestations you truly desire?

Have you had a chance to paint a lovely picture in your mind of the "end result"?

Are you moving toward what you want, however you can, whenever you can?

Are faith and expectation part of your daily constitution?

These things are really quite important, you know. Actually, to effect any kind of change at all, honey, don’t even think there might be another way.

XXOO,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Generally, typically, and most of the time, BRANDI, it's those who consider themselves to be the least spiritually mature who are the most.

And vice versa.

Holy cow,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Tell me, BRANDI, do you really think you can become lost, end up lonely, or fail, when all you have to do to change absolutely everything is help another?

Your GPS of love,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Psssst.....! Quick!

Do you know that once-every-blue-moon-secretly-happy kind of feeling?

That beaming-floating-purring kind of feeling?

That oh-so-rare-please-don't-let-me-be-dreaming kind of feeling?

BRANDI, you can choose it right now.

Purring,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, would a loving parent ever give a child a story to read that didn't have a wonderfully happy ending?

No. Never.

But they might add, "Whatever you do, don't stop reading at the scary parts!"

My life-advice exactly,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
One day this will all be a distant memory, BRANDI, yet I can tell you now, with the confidence of someone who's gone ahead in time to know, that you'll look back on this life and be so flush with love and admiration for yourself and your journey that you'll wonder, as I now do, how it could possibly have escaped you then.

Maybe this will help.

Your Greater-Self,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Don’t look to the world for answers, BRANDI, look within.

Don’t go to time and space for peace, go within.

And don’t try to change events, go within.

You so can,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Giving, BRANDI, is a demonstration that reveals, reinforces, or installs an empowering belief that states, "I am provided for."

And so you shall be.

Keep on giving,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Want what you want, BRANDI.

Your desires are confirmation that you can have what you want.

Get into yours,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's not the big dreams I have trouble with, BRANDI, but the little ones.

You deserve it all -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Know those people who say, "God just laughs when we make plans"?

BRANDI, please, don't ever be one of those people.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
One of the coolest things about time and space, BRANDI, is that it's impossible to kid oneself indefinitely.

Pow,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes you wonder whether or not you've been realistic, whether or not it's within you, whether or not "it" really works.

But in your wondering, BRANDI, you've given pause to an entire Universe that never once thought to doubt and yet is still poised to deliver.

That’s me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In time and space, BRANDI, if you just look for what's right—in others, in relationships, in yourself, and in your journey—you'll always find it.

Same when looking for what's wrong.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Let’s make this really simple, BRANDI:

The better you know your “wows,”

The better I’ll know the “hows.”

Guess who goes first?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Raise your sights, BRANDI, and broaden your steps.

Because doing one without the other is the same as doing neither.

Kind of like, “pray and move your feet” -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
They went looking for you, BRANDI.

They’d heard you returned to the jungles of time and space. That you wanted to prove once and for all that thoughts become things, dreams do come true, and that all is exactly as it should be.

That where you are is never who you are, opportunity never stops knocking, and the best is yet to come.

They wanted to tell you they already knew this.

You are LEGEND -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When you get “there,” BRANDI, little else will matter more to you than wanting to help others achieve as you have.

Who will you first reach out to?

Yeah… I’d say it’s time.

Proudly,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Act the part, BRANDI.

You will Finish the cotbons book. It's a done deal.

I've already sent out the party invitations.

Act the part,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There's nothing quite as demoralizing in the human experience as trying to use your brain to calculate the logistics of a dream’s manifestation. However tempting, it can’t be done.

You just need to define what you want in terms of your desired end result, BRANDI. And then get busy doing what you can, with what you’ve got, in every direction that feels right, while insisting upon no direction.

Then you trust me to connect the dots between all your baby steps, and the resulting masterpiece will blow you away.

I’m always with you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, if you understood the extraordinary gifts that every single challenge in your life makes possible, even inevitable, you'd celebrate your challenges, new and old alike, as the omens that they are of new beginnings and spectacular change.

Perfect for where you are, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You are now the greatest, BRANDI, you have ever been.

Which makes me the greatest I've ever been.

You’ll see,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you ever wondered, BRANDI, why most people have less trouble with walking and not falling down, talking and making perfect sense, and breathing without stop, than they do with dieting, finding love, or getting rich?

It's because with walking, talking, and breathing (which, incidentally, are far more complex than the latter), they engage the magic with intent and expectation, lean into them, and then, with faith, they turn the rest over to me.

I rock like that,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, you know that feeling when all of a sudden it seems like everything you ever wanted to happen starts happening at once?

And every day some new magical realization hits you.

And you've never felt so much happiness in your entire life.

And you finally understand all the tough times, slow days, and phases when it seemed like absolutely nothing was happening were just getting you ready for this.

And you even wonder what it was that used to trouble you, and how it could have seemed so real, or how it could've seemed bigger than the beauty you now face.

So you just shake your head, knowing how perfect everything is, how perfect it's always been, and how perfect it will always be. Giving thanks with your hands over your face, tasting the salt of your tears, knowing that this feeling, more than anything else you've ever experienced, was so meant to be.

Well… you will.

In the meantime, you now have a new script for your daily creative visualizations.

BTW—this is just a tiny, little taste of what it feels like to be the Universe, at all times.

Yours truly,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
To clear up a little something, BRANDI:

When it comes to your every cup overflowing…

…it's a self-service "bar."

Cheers,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, is it my imagination, or are you receiving guidance from within?

Well then, may I suggest you act on it, as if nothing else mattered?

I LOVE OUR LITTLE TALKS!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, to put this as gently as possible... If you don’t start preparing for all the fun changes that are about to take place in your life, I just don’t know what might happen.

But I know what won’t.

I’m not from the IRS, but I’m here to help.

Ding-dong,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A Life Coaching Tip from The Universe:

The time will come, BRANDI, and it will be sooner rather than later, when your greatest admirers and protégés will look at your life—your achievements, possessions (especially your Create a lasting legacy), and passions—frown a little and sullenly say, “Yeah, but for you… it was easy.”

At which point you should conceal any yearning you have to either object or laugh hysterically.

Instead, lovingly look them in the eye and say, “Yes, and it can be easy for you, too.”

Get used to it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, of course there are “things” you want that you don’t yet have!

They’re why you’re here.

What a coincidence -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Heaven forbid!

Do you really think I’d let you go somewhere you couldn’t find new friends, laughter, health, and abundance of every sort?

Where you couldn’t be happy about something every single day?

Where you would be limited, stuck, or unable to change your circumstances?

Do you even think such a place might exist?

Not in a zillion years, BRANDI.

Your Michelin Tour Guide to the Cosmos -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Birds only know their “is-ness,” BRANDI, trees only know their “is-ness,” and planets only know their “is-ness.”

That’s their only “business.”

Let it be yours.

Knock, knock?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Hearts don’t actually break, BRANDI, but sometimes they’re ready to grow so fast it feels like they have.

Sorry about that,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Part of your life’s freedom, BRANDI, is to either:

a. be flipped out, awed, and tickled by the day-to-day splendors of your life as you live it. Or…

b. be floored by them in hindsight.

I know what I’d choose (besides being you) -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you look closely enough, intent upon understanding those things that cause you pain and consternation, BRANDI, ultimately, I promise, you’ll find great joy and illumination.

Take the bait,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Action begets action, BRANDI.

Yours begets mine.

Let’s roll,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, at this very moment, as you so clearly see, the winds of change are howling.

Prepare, yet be patient.

Because if you can enjoy your just-before-everything-got-so-easy time, BRANDI, your autobiography will sell ten times more copies.

Patiently,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Thinking that the past or present, BRANDI, somehow forecasts the future neglects the otherwise obvious facts:

❤️ that one of the greatest certainties of all time and space is that things always get better,

❤️ that no matter how challenging any given setback is, eventually it will make possible the attainment of even greater heights than were previously imaginable, and…

❤️ that you knew exactly what you were doing when you once said, "Time and space? I'm totally there, dude!"

You always were hip -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if it was your downtime, your lounging-in-bed-too-long time, your walkabout time, and your blow-Friday-off time that made possible your greatest achievements?

Would they still make you feel guilty, BRANDI? Or would you allow yourself to enjoy them?

About time -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you know what the former-living celebrate the most, BRANDI, when they consider their earlier times in space?

Not homes bought, cars driven, mountains climbed, or islands hopped, but fears faced, hearts mended, faith restored and love bared.

A hearty crew -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You have many gifts, BRANDI, extraordinary gifts.

Gifts of perception, insight, and creativity.

Gifts of preferences, leanings, and inclinations.

But there is one, just one, that while often overlooked is the most sublime and profound of all, availing you of wonders beyond wonder and the power to wonder some more.

It is, of course, to think. To focus. To see the world however you like… and to experience it accordingly.

I mean, what else do you give someone who wanted it all?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
OK. I confess.

No matter what you're after in life, BRANDI, getting what you want always boils down to at least a little bit of divine intervention.

But then, I'm talking about yours, not mine.

Bada-boom,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When you consider all the faces, in all the places, at all times, BRANDI, do you see every one of them as students of love?

It helps.

True,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if today, BRANDI, was your day?

The most amazing day of your life, so far?

A day that would change everything for the better? What's already good would become great. What's already great would become amazing. And what's already amazing would become the stuff of legends.

And all you had to do to take advantage of the good and wonderful things about to happen for you was treat folks with a true and eager kindness, think mostly of those things that please you, and go out in the world, just a bit, where you could meet and mingle, loved and in love, one baby step after another?

How much would you be clucking right now?

Beam, gush, preen…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Whenever something doesn't work out the way you thought it would, BRANDI, instead of thinking that something went wrong, see it as something that went unexpectedly well but for reasons that are not yet apparent.

Everything plays to your advantage.

Score!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
As you know, BRANDI, for many already alive in time and space, their lives are all about finding love and making money.

Yet not so long ago, while awaiting their turn, BRANDI, breathing would have been enough.

So much air, so little time -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Here's a hint on figuring out the very next step to take down the path of living your wildest dreams:

BRANDI, it almost never lies behind the doors marked, "WOW," "SEXY," or "GLAMOROUS."

See you on the red carpet,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Who will you re-fall in love with today, BRANDI?

Whe-e-e-e-e-e…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
To be loved like you've never been loved, BRANDI, you must love like you've never loved.

Sounds pretty easy (for you) -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's all for the fun of it, BRANDI.

And for the learning.

And while the learning might not always be fun, the afterparties are.

Trust me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Neither a promotion, losing weight, finding a soul mate, writing a book, nor becoming a billionaire, BRANDI, alone will ensure happiness.

Because happiness, dear BRANDI, that's not present at the start of a manifestation journey will usually not be present at its end.

Après vous,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Wild, huh, BRANDI, how the entirety of living deliberately can be summed up in just three words?

Thoughts become things.

Of course, beliefs are important too, but your thoughts can change what you believe.

And words are important, they're your thoughts that will become things the soonest.

And taking action is critical, it’s usually how your thoughts become things.

Spread the words,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Well, actually, BRANDI, you were different.

You didn't want a perfect life, a typical life, or even a normal life.

You wanted a one-of-a-kind life.

How we doing?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
OK, BRANDI, go ahead and think of the one "thing" that really scares you, bothers you, or challenges you the most right now…

Come on. This won't work if you don't think of something…

Then repeat after me:

"This is better than winning the lottery! What a gift! Because as I use it to understand why it affects me as it does, even though I remain literally cloaked in miracles, powerful beyond measure, and utterly free in this very moment to think and feel and manifest without limit, such new insights, perhaps more than any others I've gleaned from my entire life, will make me happier, healthier, and wealthier than I even knew I could hope to be. All because of this gift! Hallelujah! Lucky me! I'll miss it when it's gone… sort of."

You really will -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, the reason that some of your thoughts haven’t yet become things...

...is because other thoughts of yours have.

How’s that for great news?!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The thing about making it big and doing it fast, BRANDI, is that invariably the first steps will be small and slow.

Which oddly, for too many, is reason not to take them.

You know better, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Only in hindsight, BRANDI, will the miracles become obvious, will you see you were guided, and will you find there was order all along.

"Otherwise," as you once said, a long, long time ago, "it would all be too easy."

We agreed,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
All you may ever ask for, BRANDI, will still be far less than what you already have.

Me too.

Thank you, BRANDI -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The hardest thing for most to understand about manifesting major life changes, BRANDI, is that it can be so easy.

Expect it to be so,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, should you ever, suddenly, round a bend on the road of life and see before you an enormous uncharted mountain with towering cliffs, jagged rocks, and seemingly impenetrable walls, please consider it a sign that your dream is considerably more worthwhile than you had previously imagined, that you’re exactly where you should be, and you’re about to get to the very best part.

Just sayin’ -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Of all the things that really and truly matter, BRANDI, getting more done is not among them.

Chill,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Here are a few techniques learned from children, BRANDI, that will help anyone take their game, or their life, to a whole new level:

1. Once a day, playfully imagine that you're already living at that new level.

2. Frequently speak in gratitude as if you've already arrived.

3. Occasionally, do something you never would have done at the old level… like praise yourself, reward yourself, or cluck a few times with thumbs under your arms.

I won’t tell a soul,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What makes you richer, BRANDI, is the picture that you hold in your mind.

You have the power,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's not that your life totally rocks, except for a few tricky spots, slippery slopes, and challenges, BRANDI.

It’s that your life totally rocks, in large part, because of the tricky spots, slippery slopes, and challenges.

Stranger than fiction,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Here’s a little story about how the sacred jungles of time and space were born, BRANDI.

First, there were a few thoughts.

Then, there were a few things.

But after eons and eons the novelty wore off because absolutely nothing ever changed.

Until suddenly, one day, there were new thoughts!

Get the picture?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Never underestimate your importance, BRANDI.

To the world today…. worlds to come… and to me.

Truly,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Living in time and space, BRANDI, is one of the scariest, loneliest, and sometimes most heartbreaking paths an angel could ever choose.

Until, of course, they realize that being scared doesn't mean they can't make a difference, feeling lonely doesn't mean they're alone, and broken hearts can still love just fine.

Then they'll laugh a little angel laugh and dare a new dare all over again.

Love your new halo,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, it never fails to amaze me.

Create a paradise out of the ether. Throw in some wildlife, volcanoes, and windstorms. Some iguanas, koalas, and waterfalls. Come back a few billion years later, and just when it looks like the whole place is going to implode—with pollution, disease, and war; famine, fatigue, and fright—there are still those who see the beauty. Who act with kindness. And who live with hope and gratitude.

Actually, they carry the entire planet.

Who'd have thunk?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
For a long time yet, BRANDI, there will be things not to like in time and space… unkindness, suffering, to name a couple.

But realize, only while you're there can you do anything about them.

We can only watch.

You’re getting warmer,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You can choose to go, do, be, and have, and in the end you'll exclaim, shocked and bewildered, that because of all the synchronicities in your life, all the "clicks" and "coincidences," and the many happy "accidents," your bounty and good fortune must have been your destiny.

Or, you might choose to wait for a miracle, a savior, or divine intervention, and in the end you'll exclaim, shocked and bewildered, that because of all the synchronicities in your life, all the missed chances and disappointments, and the many unhappy accidents, your lack and misfortune must have been your destiny.

BRANDI, do you see what the difference is?

It ain't me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Everything is optional, BRANDI, and every option holds a promise, and in every promise there's a plan for the "best of your life."

So, whatever you chose, or may yet choose, celebrate it.

To the conga line, "HEY!" -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Usually, BRANDI, miracles actually happen before you see their effects.

Sometimes even months go by, or a year.

Like meeting someone who later introduces you to someone else who changes your life.

That first meeting was part of the miracle.

Which means some miracles that have recently happened will soon be known by all.

Act surprised,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When it comes to setting aside a little time each day to visualize, BRANDI, look at it like this:

No matter how distracted you become or how confused you are about the process, the simple fact that you gave your dream this time and attention means you did it correctly, you did it long enough, and that by the time you open your eyes, already in the unseen, huge wheels have begun turning.

HUGE.

You think I’d make it hard?

Your humble servant,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The world is filled with colorful characters, BRANDI, and many would be absolutely thrilled to play along in any drama you’d care to create—romantically, socially, financially, heroically, comically—any.

You just have to let me do the casting.

Absolutely thrilled,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you considered, BRANDI, that in all my years, I’ve never once worried about anything?

Now think of the many reasons why that might be…

And then remember to see yourself like me…

It’s easy,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Truth be told, BRANDI, it takes so very, very little to be happy.

Be present.

Here and now -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The more you find good in another, BRANDI, the more you’ll find good in yourself.

No matter who that “other” is.

Love you so,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Fear, BRANDI, usually means you’re exactly where you need to be.

Smooth,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, what part of “visualize” do you think most people misunderstand?

Or don’t they do it, just once a day, for a few minutes, because they’ve yet to realize that whatever it is they most want lies only a little thinking away?

Can you hear me now?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, can you believe it’s already January?

That it’s Wednesday again?

That as you read these very words, somewhere in the world there are waves crashing, eagles soaring, lilacs blooming, and friends laughing so hard tears are streaming down their faces?

That your life has been changing so swiftly?

That you’re absolutely gorgeous, inside and out?

That your new Create a lasting legacy came so quickly?

That others who now want to Create a lasting legacy emulate how you did it?

That peace, love, and happiness are flourishing around the world?

Yeah, BRANDI, I thought you would.

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You know what they’re going to do, don’t you, BRANDI?

And you do know what they’re going to say?

Once all your visualizing, affirming, and baby stepping completely transform your life, they’re going to look at you from the corner of their eyes and say, barely loud enough for you to hear, “Must… be… nice…”

Just warning you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You can change how you feel in the twinkling of an eye, BRANDI, if you just change what you view as important.

Your eyes are twinkling,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, to perform like a star, steal the show, and party with the “Gods”:

Take the stage, do the dance, and invite yourself.

Be the spark,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Talk about magical rendezvous, BRANDI…

Right this very moment on a distant farm, there basks a fig, a nut, or a berry whose very life force will soon be your own. And that’s not all…

Right this very moment, there’s a gorgeous home on a splendid property with a spectacular view, whose roof will someday give you shelter. And that’s not all…

Right this very moment, there are beautiful souls on your beautiful planet who you do not yet even know, who through your meanderings and theirs, paths will cross, love will be shared, and eternal friendships will be created. I’m still not done…

And nothing you do can prevent these serendipities… and so, so many more.

Rock me Amadeus -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The great thing about feeling deep, profound, earthshaking love, BRANDI, is that you can start with anyone.

Next,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Earth, BRANDI?

Where every day you get a fresh start… and where every thought brings you closer, every word makes you more, every decision plays to your advantage, every baby step makes it easier, every smile makes you happier, and every tree knows your name.

Crazy, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if, BRANDI, the coolest person on the planet didn’t know they were the coolest person on the planet, because of a few self-doubts, a few trace fears, or the occasional twang of inadequacy?

Or because they somehow thought fame, or wealth, or popularity mattered?

Or because they just didn’t know the effect they had on others?

It would be a pity, huh? A travesty. And, of course, telling them wouldn’t achieve much because they’d never believe you. They’d be too modest to accept it. Too naïve to see it. And… too cool to think it mattered.

So… well… ah… let’s just leave it at that -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
To what extremes would you go, BRANDI, to boldly live life on your own terms, to manifest your greatest desires, and to bring about your heart’s fondest wishes?

OMG! Did you just say visualize daily and take baby steps?!

Speechless,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you know, BRANDI, that whenever you say, “I think I’m onto something HUGE, I’m so excited, I love my life, I have total clarity…” it’s like hitting an “ON” button that throws countless supernatural, invisible mechanisms into action that gradually begin physically rearranging the props and events of your life so that they’ll soon yield something HUGE, generate excitement, inspire love, and provide clarity?

And that whenever you say, “I don’t know what to do, it’s all so hard, I hate my life, I don’t ever want to return here…” it’s like hitting an “OFF” button.

Of course you did,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes, BRANDI, even for me, predictions are tricky business.

Really tricky.

But I’ve discovered that one of the very best ways of forecasting the future comes from listening to what people tell themselves and close friends, in casual, conversational tones.

Shhhhhh…

Not that I eavesdrop -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Your thoughts are the key.

You can do it, BRANDI.

Whatever you want, you can have it.

Just think it, feel it, and physically move towards it.

And with persistence, tipping points will be reached, critical mass formed, and the most outlandish serendipities arranged.

The world you now live in was created this very way, and through "thinking" you perpetuate the celebration. You are a nonstop manifesting machine. You are pure "cause."

Your thoughts are the key.

Infinite love,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A super-secret, double-reminder for all fearless flowers:

If you but soak up the sunlight you’re given, drink each drop of water I send and strive only to be yourself, life shall quicken in your roots, spirit shall raise you to the light, and your bloom will inspire the world.

You see, BRANDI, I do all the hard stuff.

Be here now (and take baby steps) -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Go for it, BRANDI, not once, but again and again and again.

Do whatever it takes.

Because in the end, with arms held high in absolute rapture, beaming with joy, feeling as light as a feather, crying your eyes out, you'll see how fantastically disproportionate the rewards are for the effort expended, the risks taken, and the price paid—no matter how many false starts you endured.

And you'll be astounded by how quickly you made it, even though, when the going got tough and your spirits ebbed, you thought you'd never, ever "see the day."

Beaming with joy,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, no matter what your faith is or is not, no matter where in the world you are, I want you to know that during this special time of the year I'll be with you…

In the eyes of every child and the melody of every song.

I'll be the glimmer in the ice crystals, the rays in the sun, and the stars at night.

And with each smile you see, every hug you receive, and every laugh you hear, I'll be there reaching out through another, with blessings and tidings to last you the year.

Because I love you, I always have, and I always will.

Duck—Snowball :)

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Give with a truly glad heart, BRANDI, for the sole purpose of the good it will do, and whatever you give shall return to you, multiplied, as if on wings (upon unicorns, over rainbows).

Richly,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Everyone gets to take as long as they want before waking up to the realization that life, BRANDI, is a love game.

Your roll,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You know, BRANDI, I think a big reason I like the holiday season so much, is because it's one of the few times during the year when masses of people take it upon themselves to "be the difference" in the lives of others… without asking me to do it for them.

Which gives me hope that the day's not far off, when they'll do as much for themselves.

Tally-ho, ho, ho -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If people could only glimpse the unimaginable depth of the great love they were born of and in which they now reside, BRANDI, and they realized that their choice to be "here" was made from the zenith of their intergalactic brilliance, and they understood how much more their lives have made possible for others who will follow, I do believe they'd cut themselves a bit more slack, smell more flowers, and hold more hands.

I got you, babe -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, I know what it's like. I've seen it played out a zillion times:

You're waiting for that magical day when someone makes the connection and recognizes who you really are.

Maybe they'll first notice that look in your eyes.

Or perhaps they'll marvel at your insights and the depth of your spirit.

Someone who will help you connect the dots so that you can believe in yourself and make sense of it all. Someone who will understand you, approve of you, and unhesitatingly give you a leg up so that life can pluck your ready, ripened self from the branch of magnificence.

Ahhhhhhhhhhh...

Well, BRANDI, your wait is over.

That someone is you.

Behold God,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
No matter what you want, BRANDI, you have what it takes.

Not to mention me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There isn't a moment in any day, BRANDI, when someone, somewhere, isn't better off because of something you've done.

And no matter what you do, or don't do, with the rest of your life, you cannot now comprehend the amounts of love, joy, and personal assistance that are already being pressed out to you in gratitude.

Must be nice,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
For simply giving thanks, BRANDI—when you lie down to sleep each night or, from time to time, for no reason or rhyme—you'll begin to move with life instead of against it.

You'll be shown that life could not possibly be more beautiful than it already is. You'll see that you are the fountainhead of your experience. You'll remember that you transcend all things time and space, and thus are their very master. And you'll find that you live in a paradise where the only thing that truly seems impossible is how powerful you really are and how much you are loved.

Thank you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, do you know what your thoughts did last week?!

They became the things and events of this week. The things you thought would be difficult became difficult; easy became easy; boring became boring; and fun became fun. Where you thought there might be surprises, you were surprised. And where you thought there might be difficulties, there were.

You can add last week to the long list of your most creative accomplishments.

Now, can you guess what your thoughts this week are going to do?

You are awesome,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Was that you, BRANDI?!

I was just tinkering with some time-space elements when a familiar voice rang out, "OMG! Thank you so much for this day and every second of it! Exactly as it is, exactly as I am…"

Almost dropped my chocolate in my peanut butter.

You're welcome, BRANDI, you are so welcome -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes, BRANDI, when things take longer than you thought they would, it's just a gentle reminder that you have more time than you thought—and that there's a journey to enjoy.

Enjoy every minute,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you say you know when you know, BRANDI, you will know.

If you say you don't know when you know, you will forget.

And if you say you know when you don't know, it will come to you.

Yeah, that last one was my point.

En garde,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Wake up, BRANDI!

Remember what excites you! Think of those things, those friends, and the adventures that can be yours! Focus. Care. Fantasize. Imagine. It's all so near.

Speak as if you're ready. Paste new pictures in your scrapbook, on your vision board, and around your home and office. Physically prepare for the changes that you wish to experience in your life. You've done this before. You know it works. You're due for an encore. It's time to amaze. That's why you're there.

And it's why I'm here,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if, BRANDI, you first got to decide how you'd like to feel—happy or sad, hurt or mad, approving or jealous—and then I had to go out and rearrange all the people and circumstances of your life to make it so?

You'd like that, huh?

You'd choose happy, eh?

Done -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, living the life of your dreams is a lot like sailing.

You pick your destination, hoist up your sail, make minor adjustments while the journey is underway, and let the wind do all the hard work.

In other words, imagine the end result, do what little you can, make minor adjustments while the journey is underway, and let me blow your mind.

W-e-e-e-e-e-e!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, whatever you think someone else is thinking, they're probably not.

But they are receiving signals about what you think they're thinking, BRANDI, and these signals can change what they’re thinking.

So connected,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Whatever it is you want, BRANDI, think about it.

Think and think and think.

And as surely as day follows night, as you continue showing up in the world, that which you have thought about will be drawn into your life—be it answers, friendships, health, abundance, or love.

It's the law,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You might call it spiritual logistics, BRANDI, but sometimes you have to move away to get closer.

Or you might just call it weird.

Either way, it helps to remember it from time to time.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When you see things that pain you, BRANDI, that sadden you, or that make your heart ache, remember… you're not seeing all.

I hope you never need this one.

All love,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you do what you can, BRANDI, all that you can…

I'll do what I can, all that I can.

Just as I did for all those who now have a Create a lasting legacy.

(They were just practice. Shhhh!)

Let’s do it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Some people just have big hearts, BRANDI.

And with this gift they're very often able to feel, offer, and show far more love than they receive from those around them.

Which, at times, is a heavy load to bear.

So today I'd like to remind them, and especially you, that the sun asks not that the moon and planets help brighten each day but relishes her role as a keeper of the light and a bringer of the dawn.

A role much like your own.

From the Sun and Me -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The light is getting brighter, BRANDI.

The path is getting clearer.

And you are getting closer.

That's all I'm saying,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
As if the most accomplished amongst you didn't have their own piercing doubts, fears, and worries.

Didn't have spells when they believed they were inadequate, lost, and dependent.

Hadn't at times felt downhearted, discouraged, and all alone in the world.

Yet still, BRANDI… you know their names.

You are no less,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
How you feel, BRANDI, is more important than anything else.

And this is something you get to choose, moment by moment.

Supercoolhappy works for me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Neither worthiness, effort, skill, intelligence, talent, timing, connections, looks, popularity, blood, sweat, or tears will make the difference, BRANDI.

More than anything else, living prosperously, loved and in love, and having the freedom to Finish the cotbons book whenever you want is simply a matter of knowing that you already do.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, do you know why dogs are so quick to wag their tails and cats are so quick to purr? Even the ones that have been lonely, abused, and betrayed?

Because, as is true of all sentience, they were instilled with the distant awareness that no matter what the world shows them, they're still deeply loved and needed, that their presence alone has made a difference, and that in just the shake of a leg, seemingly without reason or rhyme, everything can FANTASTICALLY change for the better.

As is true of all people… except sometimes they tend to forget.

Purrfectly,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Believing you can, you can. Though you might not.

Believing you can't won't change that you can. It just hides it.

Whereas simply getting started, however timid your first steps are, BRANDI, and consistently moving in the direction of your dreams day after day, will eventually create such unstoppable momentum, you'll find it nearly impossible to believe that there was ever a time when you wavered.

Let's give them something to talk about -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Your invisible limiting beliefs, BRANDI, are only invisible when you live within their limits; when you keep on doing what you've always been doing.

So push yourself, BRANDI. Dare yourself to think bigger, to reach, and to behave as if a dream or two of yours has already manifested. Then invisible limiting beliefs will pop out of the woodwork, as if painted florescent orange, loaded to the teeth with logic, imploring you to turn around and go back to safety!

Do something, do it today, something you wouldn't normally do. Like maybe… take off early from work… or go for a walk in the rain … or write to an old friend.

Aha! Did you just see a couple of 'em?!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I do believe, BRANDI, that if people would just start by saying:

"It's fun," when it seems hard...

"I'm happy," when they feel sad... and

"I know," when it seems they don't…

They'd finally discover that it really is, they really are, and they always have.

Works for me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
People who do all they can, with what they've got, from where they are, BRANDI, no matter how puny their actions, how tiny their steps, or how futile it may seem, simply have more fun… and move more mountains.

Coffee, tea, or a brand-new Bentley?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The great perfection, BRANDI, lies in the fact that no matter what happens next, you'll be richer for it.

Much richer,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When was the last time you pleasantly surprised or even shocked someone, BRANDI, and remained anonymous?

Well, it just may be the most fun one can have in time and space.

Let's play,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What do blaring trumpets, cartwheeling angels, harping harpsichordists, and celestial hoedowns all have in common?

The Pearly Gates? Welcome "Home" parties? Gods gone wild?

Actually, BRANDI, they play at every earthly sunrise and all of the moments of every day and night that follow.

Duck!!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Don't just see the magic, BRANDI, engage it!

Challenge it!

Dare it!

Dream big, with every expectation that your dreams will manifest.

Be the wand,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Be there, BRANDI. Go there now and never leave.

Imagine that your dreams have already come true. Live your life from that mindset. Predicate your behavior on that reality, not the illusions that now surround you.

Filter every thought, question, and answer from there. Let your focus shift and be born again—because dwelling from, not upon, the space you want to inherit is the fastest way to change absolutely everything.

See the difference?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
One's ability to succeed, BRANDI, is always proportional to one's willingness to fail.

Besides, all failures are temporary, all tigers are paper, and life is a many splendored thing.

Go for it, BRANDI -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The good news, BRANDI, is that really and truly there's never, ever been any such thing as bad news. And you'll see this one day, if you don't already.

Not that you weren't one heck of a rebounder when you thought there was…

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
First, BRANDI, completely forget about who, how, and when.

Second, decide only upon what you want, your desired end result, with as much clarity as possible.

And then I'll shuffle the deck, the magic show will begin, and jokers won't be all that are wild.

Gosh, you're so much fun to watch when you read these things.

Deal,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you knew how much you have in common with every single person now living in time and space, BRANDI, in terms of your deepest hopes and dreams, fears and worries, you'd wonder how I manage to tell you all apart.

And from this day forward you'd likely think of every single one of them as "dearest," just as I do.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When something difficult or painful happens, BRANDI, always look to see what it makes possible that wouldn't have otherwise been possible.

Like a new adventure, a closer friendship, or chocolate in your peanut butter.

Everything makes everything better,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The odd thing about inspiration, BRANDI, is that it often comes after, not before, a new journey is started.

Yippee ki-yay!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
One of the greatest things about finally reaching the "top of the mountain," BRANDI—gazing about at the magnificence of life through tears of joy, thoroughly understanding every inch of your climb and its many unexpected setbacks, and grasping the dazzling perfection of it all—is looking back down at those still climbing, still struggling, still lost and confused, and realizing with absolute certainty that they, too, will reach the top, in just a whisper of time.

Thank heavens,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You can change a great many things, BRANDI.

Or you can change.

Same-same,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you know what we used to call you before you leapt into the jungles of time and space, BRANDI?

"Gutsy."

Do you know what we call you now?

"An example."

Do you know what we'll call you when you return?

"Master."

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you're at least visualizing enough to wonder whether or not you're doing it right, BRANDI, you're doing it right, and you're way, way farther along than you’re giving yourself credit for.

Yeee-haaaa!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
For every physical adventure, BRANDI, there's the possibility of loss. That's what makes it an adventure.

For every spiritual adventure, there's only gain. Which totally spoils the adventure. But it’s why you choose to forget that all physical adventures are really spiritual adventures.

Everything makes you more,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Never compromise a dream, BRANDI.

But always compromise on how it will come true, with whom, and when.

Knock on every door,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Would you ever take a journey, BRANDI, if you knew ahead of time that you'd become hopelessly lost, have your heart broken into pieces, and sometimes wish you'd never been born?

Now, how about if you knew ahead of time that on that very same journey you'd later find yourself, fall passionately in love, and live happily ever after?

Yeah, I know, you made the same choice a long, long time ago.

Que bueno,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There will always be people, BRANDI, who see you as a target, who wish you'd be satisfied, or who want to control you.

They’re the same ones who are learning the most from you.

“Light worker problems,”

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Expecting "end results"—such as wealth and abundance, health and harmony, friends and laughter—in broad brushstrokes is part of the secret formula, BRANDI, for manifesting the life of your dreams.

Expecting your path to follow a certain route to be your deliverance—is just plain messing with the “cursed hows” and severely limits my options.

Cool?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Every desired change, BRANDI, must happen in thought first. This, of course, is the “hook” to living in time and space.

Anyone can think happy thoughts when they're happy, wealthy thoughts when they're wealthy, healthy thoughts when they're healthy. It takes someone highly unusual to imagine things differently than how they now find them; not that it’s hard to do, but it can seem so futile and ineffective that most won’t ever bother.

You crafted the stage you’re now on so that you’d be pushed forward to discover your power, with dreams worth living and the passion to care. Ultimately learning that success comes fastest when you see through life’s illusions to that which gives them rise: your thoughts, beliefs, and expectations.

BRANDI, this is what you most need to know. There haven't been any accidents, you haven't made any mistakes, and the perfection of everything now happening in the world and in your life will one day soon boggle your mind.

Close your eyes and visualize, every single day -

The Universe
