messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Now, I have to admit that among inventions, the "Undo" button is right up there with the very greatest of all time, yet it'll never compare to the "Do" button, from which worlds are born.

BRANDI, this is your chance!

Just do it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Ever have that feeling, BRANDI, that your life, your true work, has not yet begun?

Ever feel like you're here for something more than you've yet found?

And that a billion eyes are upon you, just waiting for the prophecy to unfold?

Have you ever wanted something so badly that all your wishing, hoping, and praying kept you from seeing that you had it all along?

Precisely,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
After all these years, can you believe most people still think time is real, space is cold, and matter is solid?

If there's anything you want to change in your experience, BRANDI, imagine it changed.

Real this,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
For millennia, BRANDI, the path to enlightenment has been made up of many steps.

Most commonly, it begins with festering misunderstandings that lead to pain.

The pain then leads to growth, the growth then leads to clarity, the clarity then leads to fun, the fun then leads to joy, and the joy then leads to true illumination.

May I recommend skipping to the fun part?

Love you forever, BRANDI -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Think of the one area of life that brings you the most discomfort, BRANDI, and know that's where you're ripe for growth.

Never fails,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if funky, confusing, gray, lonely days were just part of a "system" that, in turn, created bright, rich, happy, friendly days?

What if they were just meant to give deeper elements of your creativity a rest?

What if they were deliberately crafted holidays, of a sort, devised by your inner psyche to relieve you from the pressure of unimportant expectations?

Would you still bemoan them, wonder what's wrong with you, or fear that they'll never end? Or, BRANDI, would they kind of tickle you pink?

You party animal, you -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Know how to tell, BRANDI, whether or not your dreams are coming true?

Well, if the sun came up today, things are looking pretty good.

If the sky is still blue, high above the clouds, I'd say keep doing what you're doing.

And if, somewhere, there are eagles soaring, tulips blooming, and falls cascading… could it be, BRANDI, most of them already have?

Running with the big dogs now -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
At first, BRANDI, we thought it would be really cool if only your "positive" thoughts became the things and events of your life.

But then we couldn't think of any things or events that wouldn't eventually be considered "positive," so we decided to just leave you "turned on" all the time.

B-z-z-z-z-z-z-z-z…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Your dreams are not yours by accident, BRANDI.

They are to remind you of all you can still do, be, and have.

You’re welcome,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Having a dream, BRANDI, is more important than having it come true.

Just a little oddity to spin the wheels of your mind.

Ciao,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
One day, BRANDI, you're going to wake up and feel so much joy for your life, exactly as it is, that you wouldn't trade anything in your past for anything.

So just think, right now, today, you get to live that part that you one day won't trade for anything!

Talk about blessed,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, the trick is learning to maintain an unwavering focus upon your desired end result, your completed dream, the "finish line," without insisting upon or contemplating its means of attainment or who else will be involved, no matter how logical, obvious, or tempting it may seem.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you know, BRANDI, that you are entitled to as many miracles in a day as breaths you take? And that those you don't use carry over?

And that presently, in dog years, it's impossible to use all yours up? And in human years, if new ones stopped accruing, which they won't, you'd be hard-pressed to use yours before your swinging 600s?

And that all you have to do to cash one in is expect it?

You crack us up,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, in case you were wondering what might happen next, how this week will unfold, who you will become tomorrow, and so on, it all boils down to one thing:

Expectation.

Yours.

Whoohoo,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, can you imagine me settling into a human body?

Oh, it would be a grand one! Not just any body! Only a gorgeous body, with all the bells and whistles that really count. Capable of BIG dreams to remind me of what I'm capable of and the strength to spin the world in the palm of my hand.

That's why I picked yours, and a few others.

BRANDI, if you knew of the power you possessed, at this very moment, you'd cry and cry and cry. And then feel light as a feather.

Om-m-m-m-m-m-m…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Low days exist to remind you that you still have choices.

High days, BRANDI, exist to remind you how fast you rebound… among other things.

Boing,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Even now, BRANDI, as so many dreams of yours are in the midst of coming true, know that I have dreamed even BIGGER and BETTER for you than you can now imagine.

And my thoughts become things, too -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Now let me get this straight, BRANDI:

You want things that you don't yet have, people in your life who you don't yet know, and events to take place that haven't yet occurred, so that once these "things" come to pass you'll feel happy, confident, and fulfilled; accomplished, desired, and appreciated; treasured, adored, a-beautiful-sight-to-see?

But… weren’t these the rationale for all your earlier dreams that you’ve already manifested?

Green light!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Yes! BRANDI, you can have it, do it, and be it!

But it’s not going to visualize itself.

Whoa!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Never underestimate yourself, BRANDI.

Your estimations create the blueprint for your manifestations.

Be the ball,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, what if I told you that your every conflict, disappointment, struggle, or challenge with others, and self, was merely a manifestation of what's going on within your own thinking. Would you go there first to fix, mend, and allay?

Yeah, you might miss the drama -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes, BRANDI, instead of running from something scary in your life, it's easier to learn not to be scared of it.

Let it stay. Pull up a chair. Have a tea.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
First, choose from the options that thrill you.

Then, choose the ones that will also teach you.

And from these, BRANDI, choose the scariest.

Butterflies in your tummy are good,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Probably, not necessarily, BRANDI, but probably, the shortest distance between here and there—between today and the life of your wildest dreams—runs through joy.

As much of it as you can possibly stir up.

But that's only if you're in a hurry.

Zip, zap, zoom -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Great big, innovative, world-changing ideas are plentiful, BRANDI.

People who take tiny little baby steps toward them are rare.

You are so acing this life,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
They surround you even now, BRANDI. They see, hear, and feel what you see, hear, and feel.

They trade vantage points, study possibilities, and learn to think bigger. They brag about you, compliment you, and laugh at your jokes. They only ever squabble over who loves you the most.

Of course, I'm talking about the teachers who prepped you for time and space, who've now become your students.

Shhhh… they're reading this…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if, BRANDI, loneliness was simply a feeling of impatience, telepathically sent to you by friends you've yet to meet, urging you to go out more, do more, and get involved, so that life's serendipities could bring you together... Would you still feel alone?

What if illness was just the signal a healthy body sent to urge clarification of your thoughts, feelings, and dreams... Would you still, at times, think of yours as unwell?

What if feelings of uncertainty and confusion were only reminders that you have options, that there's no hurry, and that everything is as it should be... Would you still feel disadvantaged?

What if so-called mistakes and failures only ever happened when your life was about to get better than it's ever been before... Would you still call them mistakes and failures?

And what if poverty and lack were simply demonstrations of your manifesting prowess, as "difficult" to acquire as wealth and abundance... Would they still cause you to feel powerless?

Well, whatever you feel, BRANDI, I still consider you my only begotten, my champion, and my equal.

Are we close, or what?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
So many claim to believe, BRANDI.

So here's what I'm going to start asking them: If you really believed you were guided, wouldn't you begin listening?

And if you really believed you were powerful, wouldn't every true desire be followed by action?

And if you really believed your life was about to be transformed, wouldn’t the celebration have already begun?

That should stir up their coffee, huh?

Let's rock-and-roll,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The courage to wonder about life-perspectives other than your own, BRANDI, bridges divides, fosters handholding, extends bear hugs, and warms the heart.

Plus, all things shall be added unto you.

Holding your hand,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Whenever feeling utterly bamboozled or bored by life, BRANDI, seek a higher perspective.

Because being bamboozled or bored means there is one.

Yeah,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's working, BRANDI! Every day you're getting closer!

Everything you've ever wanted is being pressed toward you. Everything is clicking. Don't let the illusions trick you. Don't let events dampen your spirits.

In fact, things couldn't be any better than they now are. You couldn't have more reasons to celebrate.

Continue! Press on! The hard part is done! Keep showing up, be present, open every door and let events unfold. Life is your stage. This is your parade.

Together we can do anything.

I love it when you're hot,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Taking massive action on massive dreams amidst massive uncertainties, BRANDI, is pretty much where anyone who's ever done anything massive had to start.

And then things get way easier.

Massive love,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you only knew, BRANDI, how normal you were when you thought you were weird.

How strong you were when you thought you were weak.

And how ready you were when you thought you weren't.

You'd think again, oh Great One Revered by All in the Unseen -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Slayer of dragons… Matador of all time and space… Rightful heir to heaven on earth... Don't be afraid, BRANDI, not even a little.

BRANDI, your dreams are merely whispers from a place they already exist, from which you also dwell. Yet not knowing this, they dare you towards the light of remembrance. Into illusions you unknowingly create so that you will sooner know of your dominion over them.

Don't be afraid,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you really need someone else's permission, acceptance, wink, or nod, BRANDI, or are you ready to give these to yourself?

I say, "Ready. Now."

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, if only you would look inside...

The truth you seek could no longer hide.

You know it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Oh, you're going to laugh all right, BRANDI, but not just at the funny clothes you wore, or how naïve you thought the animals were, or by the unrecognized angels in your midst.

But at how close you were when you thought yourself far, how much strength you had when you thought yourself weak, and how easy your path was when you thought it hard.

Stitches…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Last night, BRANDI, I was dreaming of you, again.

Light beamed in every direction from the core of your essence. You were radiant and confident.

Music followed you, angels serenaded you, and everyone was elevated by your presence.

Wisdom shone from your eyes. Kindness emanated from your touch.

Your power was simply awesome.

And you looked, well… pretty much exactly as you do right now.

Wow,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Please believe me when I tell you that our 2nd most important mission over here, BRANDI, is to see that smile on your face and to hear your laughter in the wind.

Oh… Mission #1?

Just having our own kind of fun.

Cowabunga!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Whatever you have to say, BRANDI, say it with love.

Love you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When people see, for the first time, how everyone else on the planet is just another version of themselves—the same spark of God except for the pressures and desires unique to each life—some laugh, some cry, and some laugh until they cry.

May you live your life, BRANDI, so that when this day dawns for you, you're among those who laugh and laugh and laugh.

Tallyho, ho, ho -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There are absolutely no worldly circumstances, BRANDI, under which you can't or shouldn't be making the very best of things.

Including right now…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Whether you see it, feel it, or know it, BRANDI, right now you're being provided for.

And you always will be.

Got it?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Simply put, BRANDI, the reason there are things you want that have not yet appeared in your life is because you're not yet used to thinking of yourself with them.

Just keep practicing,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, have you heard about the "Bewitching Hour"?

Actually, it's top secret, so I'll whisper.

Every single morning, ever since time began, before the sun even rises, the drums start beating, the choirs start singing, the energy starts rising, and every single soul who has ever lived scurries around the plane of manifestation as a chanting begins... and gets louder and louder... and goes faster and faster, until... a feverish pitch is reached and the skies part with a clap of thunder, revealing billions upon billions of the most beautiful angels you have ever seen.

Flying down from the heavens, some with wings outstretched, others with wings pointed back. Darting, diving, banking, and rolling—some so fast they're only a blur—while others seem to float by as if catching what remains of a midsummer night’s breeze.

Every one of them a reflection of the greatest, the loveliest, and the highest I've ever imagined. Every one of them a messenger of hope, and peace, and joy; healers and teachers, comforters and creators. And every one of them about to greet a brand-new day in time and space with a morning yawn, sleepy eyes, and the power to ROCK THE WORLD.

This is the "Bewitching Hour." Shhhh...

And if you listen real hard, you can you still hear the drums.

Hosanna in the highest,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
True, you can’t see what you can't see, BRANDI, you can’t hear what you can’t hear, and you can’t feel what you can’t feel.

But you can always know that you're not alone, that you're adored, and that absolutely everything will continue to work out for your very best, as it always has.

It’s built into your DNA -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Whatever your problem or challenge may be, BRANDI, laugh at it.

Laugh long and hard.

Because you are forever and it is temporary.

Love you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Every day, BRANDI, someone new falls in love with you.

Sometimes many more.

You can't deny it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Whenever conferring with another, BRANDI—either face to face or across the miles—whether a human being, departed spirit, or sentient tree, always speak to the highest within them.

It makes such a difference.

Amen,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's being alive, BRANDI, that makes you rich.

So easy to forget,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I know you already know this, BRANDI, but the only way one can find their way is to first be lost.

To make it big, start out small.

To fall in love, first feel none.

Yet when these adventures begin and the dreamers suddenly find themselves lost, small, and alone, you should hear the "French"!

So, look at it like this: Any such feelings of lack are simply a sign that you've made a really, really big and daring "wish," and its manifestation has already begun.

Foxy, clever, wry -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Ironically, BRANDI, those who label others as selfish are mostly concerned with their own well-being. And rightly so.

Which simply means they haven’t yet understood the virtue of a life lived self-fully, as I like to call it.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The reason old souls enjoy spending time alone, BRANDI, is because they never really are.

Much love from your invisible friends,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Anything worth having, BRANDI, is worth thinking about, every day, for 5 minutes, in a dark room, while wearing a huge smile.

Bunny slippers optional.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Indeed, BRANDI, there are Masters among you.

Scattered throughout the continents to shine their lights as brightly as possible, simply by being themselves, living mostly "ordinary" lives. Until, with enough of them walking the Earth, a tipping point will be reached at the deepest energetic levels so that all others will be raised ever higher into the light, simply for being in their midst, as if through osmosis.

Of course… there's always been the risk that these Masters, once immersed in a sea of limited thinkers, might mistake their "ordinary" lives as simply ordinary lives, think they're simply one of the herd, and therefore not appreciate their unique perspectives, grasp their mission, or love themselves as they are, no matter how others behave, and the whole osmosis thing won't work.

How you holding up, BRANDI? Loving yourself?

Just checking,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I understand, BRANDI, that you must wonder, sometimes to the point of bewilderment, at what you're truly capable of doing.

Yet, therein lies the "problem," because living the life of your dreams is far more about what I'm capable of doing.

Surrender,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
To put a few "non-things" into a time, space, and material perspective, it's as if all the love that now bathes the world, BRANDI, comes from a heart 8 zillion times larger than your sun.

Your "guardian angel" is so gigantic, her halo would reach into the clouds.

And your ultimate happiness is so assured, BRANDI M REGER, we've been celebrating your life since the day you were born.

Yeah, you insisted -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you ever noticed how folks instinctively know that creating wealth is much more fun than spending it, yet they dream more about spending it than they do about creating it?

Could it be, BRANDI, they've momentarily forgotten that they're supernatural, that they can have whatever they want, and that life is but a dream?

It's all yours, baby -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Those who achieve great things, defeat long odds, and become legends, BRANDI, don’t have anything you don't have.

They just kept showing up, expecting a miracle, long after everyone else got practical.

Here comes a miracle now!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if, BRANDI, you're already doing everything right, even though you're not sure?

And the surprises along the way have only sped things up, even though it felt like they slowed you down?

And all that you want is now barreling toward you, even though you can't see it?

And when it arrives it'll exceed your every expectation, even though your dreams were huge?

Wouldn't you be making some really weird noises about now? Whoohooing, howling… maybe even whoohoo-howl-barking?

Well?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Please, BRANDI, don't ever settle for less than what you really, really want.

Including right now, today.

Just in time, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
WARNING, BRANDI! There’s a major imbalance in the Universe!!

Just the slightest good you do, or even think, comes back to you exponentially.

Little actions make BIG differences, and little thoughts can pry open the floodgates of wealth, abundance, friendships, and laughter. The same is true of little words and little deeds.

Just so you know,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's like you're a fabulously complicated jigsaw puzzle piece, BRANDI, with stunning colors, wildly serrated edges, oceans of emotion, mountains of possibilities, worlds of talent, and complex energy mixtures, but for as long as you see yourself as just human, you'll never quite know where you fit in.

Just say "No" -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Think that it's fun, BRANDI. That you're guided. And that all is well.

That there's time, that life is easy, and that the best is yet to come.

Think that the reasons that now elude you will one day catch up.

That the lessons now before you will one day bring joy.

And that the sorrows that have crippled you will soon give you wings.

Think that you're important, that you cannot fail, and that happiness always returns.

And think that you're beautiful, BRANDI.

I do,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Of course, the human anatomy has countless built-in performance enhancement mechanisms: You sweat when you're hot, you smile when vulnerable, and you know when you're being watched.

But I bet you didn't know you have the instinctual ability to instantly acclimate to miraculous life changes, avalanches of abundance, amazing new friendships, and sudden world peace.

This is by design, BRANDI. It's in your genes. Perfectly natural.

Just didn't want you to be caught off guard by your own adaptability. You'd look remarkably out of place, mouth agog, on some fancy red carpet, tanning in St. Tropez, or brokering calm between feuding neighbors.

Lovin' you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Picture if you will, BRANDI, the disciplinarian who micromanages every step in their careful dance with life. And then picture the hooligan whose only disciplines are daydreaming and showing up.

Who do you think is most likely to be heard whoo-hooing from the top of their lungs as they cruise along on some winding mountain road, top down, shades up, singing "I Did It My Way?"

Whoo-hoo!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Each person in your life is there for a reason, BRANDI, and that reason always has something to do with love.

Like me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Every fortune, gold medal, and trophy...

Every comeback, triumph, and celebration...

And every kiss, hug, and hand held, BRANDI…

Were first a thought, a whisper, a dream.

Go, BRANDI, go…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
"Reality," BRANDI, is not that you are weak and dream of becoming strong. Poor and dream of becoming rich. Alone and dream of having friends. But that you're already strong, rich, and among friends. Yet, at times, dream that you're not.

You are adored,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you know that whenever you whisper, "I'm sorry,” a great healing begins?

Did you know that whenever you whisper, "Thank you," lots more is sent?

And did you know that whenever you whisper, "I love you…" you begin to heal all of humanity?

In each case, BRANDI, I meant in addition to your fans going wild in the unseen.

With just a whisper…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, you could call me your friend, but that's not quite enough. You could call me your guide, but there's more to it than that.

You could call me your conspirator, your helper, or your agent; your coach, counselor, or confidant; your father, mother, or child. You could call me the sun, the moon, and the stars; the wind, the sky, and the rain; the past, the present, and the future.

But really, what I'm getting at, the purpose behind all these Notes, and perhaps what I'd most like to hear one day, is you calling me "yourself."

O-h-m-m-m-m-m…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I still don't get why people are so surprised that the turtle beat the rabbit over the long run.

Consistent effort, BRANDI, no matter how small, sparks magic, fills sails, butters bread, turns tides, instills faith, summons friends, improves health, burns calories, creates abundance, yields clarity, builds courage, spins planets, and rewrites destinies.

No matter how small,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you noticed that the more you hurry, the slower you go?

The more you wait, the longer it takes?

The more you worry, the less you dream?

But the more you live, love, and laugh, BRANDI, the more you live, love, and laugh.

Weird?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes, BRANDI, having more fun and being happier comes from looking for each in unexpected new places, instead of waiting for them to come from where you've found them before or where others are now finding them.

And I do mean unexpected. Not just from the old standbys of travel, adventure, and romance, but from stretching, reaching, and growing. Accepting new responsibilities, accepting other people for who they are, and accepting that you don’t ever have to figure out the “hows,” “whos,” “whens” or “wheres.”

Did you expect that?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you noticed, BRANDI, that all great accomplishments require four things:

A dream, action, patience, and a whole bunch of miracles?

The miracles part is on me.

1, 2, 3, Me -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You know what's kind of wild, BRANDI? At this very crossroads of time and space, more than ever before, there are so many billions of people yearning to awaken, study, and understand the truth about themselves, their divinity, and the magic.

You know what else is kind of wild? Just as this need arose, all over the world, there’ve appeared the greatest teachers. Those who are actually living these truths, leading with the example of their lives, and healing those in need through simply being observed.

Want to know something even more surprising? That you consider yourself to be more of the student.

You are legend,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
How do you know when you're illuminated, enlightened, and, spiritually speaking, totally on fire, BRANDI?

Whenever you’re choosing to be happy,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In a way, BRANDI, life itself tracks a person's generosity, much like an airline tracks frequent flyer miles.

The more you give, the more you earn, the higher you fly, and the further you go.

Coffee, tea, or a curved TV?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The difference between how you sometimes see yourself, BRANDI, and how I always see you could be summed up like this:

You wonder, at times, what it is you might do that you'd be wildly successful at.

And I wonder, at times, how you seem to miss that you already are.

Crazy wild,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Can you imagine an astral plane somewhere "out there," BRANDI, where very old souls rendezvous to practice and perfect their most highly developed manifestation techniques?

A members-only kind of place, where whatever they think about comes to life in the most vivid colors and sounds and as the most intricate plots and circumstances?

Where the only limits that exist lie in their challenge to imagine what they've never imagined and to find the so-called impossible?

And best of all, being astral, no harm can come to them; they're completely untouchable. Nothing is real, yet everything matters.

Yep! Exactly like this astral plane.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What do you now fear, BRANDI?

What is this fear now telling you?

You're welcome,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you noticed, BRANDI, that…

…a person who can point to their own kindness is not necessarily kind;

…who can point to their own thoughtfulness is not necessarily thoughtful;

…and who can point to their own generosity is not necessarily generous.

But those who are truly kind, thoughtful, and generous always attract lots of kind, thoughtful, and generous people into their own lives.

You have it made,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The easiest way to avoid letdowns and disappointments, BRANDI, is...

No, it's not lowering your standards. That's quitting.

No, it's not releasing expectations. That's an old wives’ tale.

And no, it's not relinquishing all mortal desires. That's an ancient religion.

BRANDI, it's never tricking yourself into thinking that your happiness is dependent upon the things and events of time and space or what other people think, say, and do.

So go ahead, aim high, expect a miracle, and want it all…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Think back to a happy time, BRANDI, a really, really happy time in your life. Go back as far as it takes to a time when you felt so light you thought you might float.

Do you remember it? The carefree feeling? The acceptance of the moment, of yourself, of life? Feeling unfettered by thoughts of the future and oblivious to the past?

Feel it a little longer…

Very nice.

Yours,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The BIG THING, BRANDI, rarely happens when you ask for it, nor does it typically come from who or where you expect.

It usually comes a bit later, from someone you didn't even know when you first asked, as a result of some weird turn of events that were impossible to foresee.

So, chill. Be patient. Enjoy the moment. And let your friends, employers, and partners off the hook. Besides, they're going to have enough to deal with when the BIG THING does come, if you know what I mean.

Won't be long,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Baby souls see what's wrong.

Young souls see what's right.

But old souls, BRANDI, feel only love.

You lover,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Ever wondered why so many people, sometimes virtual strangers, tell you their deepest secrets, BRANDI?

It's because when they look into your eyes or feel into your heart, they find me.

And sharing their secrets with me, as you, reminds them that no matter what they have to say, my love is so much bigger.

We're quite the team -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Yo! Ho! Ho! BRANDI, it's time for more good news and bad news!

The bad news is that there are going to be a few more challenges.

RIGHT! That's the good news, too!

Each proving that you're even greater, cooler, and more lovable than you now realize.

You're welcome,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Big ideas almost never seem like big ideas at first.

So, BRANDI, be on the lookout for little ideas that seem kind of ho-hum, ain’t no big “thang,” let-me-floss-first kind of ideas.

Really,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Finding the frog before he turns into a prince, BRANDI, or Cinderella before the ball, or a ground-floor-opportunity still on the ground floor are all the result of:

A. Astute observations, keen intellects, logical thinking, and lengthy preparations?

OR

B. Someone with a desired end result held clearly in mind, followed by timid, self-doubting baby steps, enabling me to work "backwards" from the vision impressed upon the unseen to the facts and circumstances of their life today; blending all of their evolving circumstances through a series of accidents, coincidences, and surprises that appear so uncanny, people everywhere are utterly stupefied by their luck?

Hint: Rhymes with "me" -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you can dream it, BRANDI, we can do it.

Notice the "you" and "we" bits, and where they apply?

Go!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
To better understand yourself, BRANDI, find out why you want what you want, getting to the emotions you’re after.

To go even deeper, ask yourself why you think you can't feel those now.

Oh,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you know what the one question is, BRANDI, that we hear the most from those who've made big dreams come true?

You know, once the floodgates burst open, torrents are unleashed, and they're swimming in laughter, friendships, and dinero?

In the same moments that it seems the entire world is beating a path to their door with more love, appreciation, and opportunities than they've ever known?

"What on earth did I ever do to deserve so much?"

And we're usually, like, "Dude, you visualized."

Beginners.

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If given just one wish, BRANDI, knowing that you could wish for anything at all and whatever you wished for was GUARANTEED to come true… would you wish for all things to be EXACTLY as they now are?

Me too.

We bad,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Customized Abundance Advisory and Relativity Alert for BRANDI M REGER:

Soon, for you, BRANDI, hundred-dollar bills in forgotten blue jean pockets will be as plentiful as singles are in your wallet today.

Earning an extra five thousand for lending a hand will only be as challenging as earning five hundred today.

And then, before you can even ask, "Who let the bucks out?!" you'll have as many millions in the bank as there are meters in a mile, popes in the Vatican, and stairways to heaven.

Yet still, you'll be loved most for being a great friend.

That's just how you roll,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Just to be extra clear, BRANDI, there is absolutely no connection between the global economy and inflation and your freedom to think as you please.

Nor is there any connection between either and my ability to shock and delight, suddenly and without warning.

I think that pretty much takes care of everything -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you know what most people wish for, BRANDI, when it comes to improving their own life?

More stuff.

Because they think having more stuff will contribute to their overall happiness.

But do you know what most people wish for when it comes to the lives of the ones they most love and cherish?

Happiness, peace, creative work, fulfilling relationships.

Because they understand that once these things are in order, more stuff will automatically take care of itself.

One of these two things doesn't belong with the other….

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
By the way, BRANDI, the Law of Happy states that your happiest days ever still lie before you.

You're so good for me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you know, BRANDI, that it's perfectly OK, even highly ideal, to claim all is well amid doubt and confusion?

To be happy in spite of challenges?

To laugh at problems?

Dance without a partner?

Sing without a rhyme?

Talk to inanimate objects?

Oddly, most don't.

You SO rock,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What…?

BRANDI!! Of course you can!

YES, this year!

And even so much more.

Whoooo-ha!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You know, BRANDI, it's only after umpteen lifetimes, a dramatic ascension into peak vibrational levels of light and awareness, and only after "the way" has been meticulously prepared and tests have been passed that a soul can even hope for the kind of life you're now living.

You overachiever.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if, as much as I am the Alpha, the Omega, and everything in between, BRANDI, I am also your thoughts?

Not just in them. Not just riding upon them. Not just what they manifest. But I am actually your thoughts?

Would it be easier for you to see how far you can send them? How unlimited they are? How dependable? Nonjudgmental? Infallible? Supreme? And how potentially healing, nurturing, and magical they are?

Would it be easier to see how powerful you are, BRANDI?

Pucker-up, buttercup -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Yeah, I know it sounds like a good idea to the new-agers, god-squads, and holy-rollers to turn all things over to "the Universe," but I’m a little concerned that something important has been lost in translation.

BRANDI, how 'bout you just turn over the "hows" to me and have yourself a little field day choosing your "WOWs!”?

Hope I got to you before they did,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Those who are needy of attention, BRANDI, hide from themselves their greatness.

Those who are needy of opportunity, BRANDI, hide from themselves their power.

And those who are needy of love, BRANDI, hide from themselves what's already there.

But boy, are they in for a wild ride.

Love you like crazy,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You don't even have to know what you want, BRANDI.

I'll take care of that.

Just enjoy that you received another day, and 10,000 miracles along with it.

They’re on me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Life, BRANDI, is not what you see, but what you've projected.

It's not what you've been told, but what you've decided.

It's not what you've experienced, but how you've remembered it.

It's not what you've forged, but what you've allowed.

And it's not who's appeared, but who you've summoned.

And this should serve you well, beloved, until you find what you already have.

Yeah,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Hi, BRANDI, I’m doing a little bookkeeping here, and I see you signed up for the "Everything Package," but I've hardly given you your share.

Tell me… Are you coming to me for these things? Allowing me to do the heavy lifting? Enjoying the journey?

I.O.U. -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The reason others think they need you, BRANDI, is because they don't yet fully believe they already have all that it takes to have all that they want.

So they pretend you hold the key.

And sometimes, vice versa.

Higher!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You know, I never could have parted with you, BRANDI, if time and space were real. Or even, for me, if they seemed real.

Sometimes, I don't know how you do it.

This is just to let you know how I feel and to remind you that you’re far more than you’ve ever imagined.

Humbly,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The thing is, BRANDI, life's magic isn't a substitute for networking, socializing, and “working.”

To the contrary, these are some of its greatest incubators.

To the office,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Could there really be any such thing as a mistake, BRANDI, when you're only dreaming? When you live forever? When the best is yet to come?

No, darling, there are no mistakes -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Some things don't sound like they look.

Others don't look like they sound.

There are friends who don't act like friends.

And enemies who'd never dream of hurting anyone.

But, BRANDI, do you know what the strangest thing about time and space is?

Your thoughts will never betray you. They will strive to become things. You can always change your circumstances. And where you've been has no bearing on where you can still go.

Zoom, clink, hugs -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There's so much time in a day, BRANDI.

You could have breakfast, lunch, and dinner on 3 different continents.

You could outline the book you're going to write, start the screenplay adaptation, and watch Gone with the Wind, before the sun even sets.

Spend a day at work, and still have 16 hours left over.

Or you could just think 60,000 different thoughts as you tool all over San Antonio.

Hey, the record for climbing Mt. Everest is under 9 hours, leaving 15 to nap and go Yeti searching.

There's so much time in a day, BRANDI. So much.

You're rich,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Eternity is a really, really, really long time, BRANDI.

I think we'll be able to squeeze everything in.

Relax.

Peace and blue jeans,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It’s always better to try something new, BRANDI, than to wonder what might have been.

You can’t get it wrong, there’s no such thing as failing, you’ll still love and be loved, draw nearer to ever-expanding horizons, and eventually realize that you could have dreamed even bigger to begin with and will do so on subsequent adventures around the sun.

Or, you could just go for it this time, BRANDI, which is a lot easier to do (and say).

Ain’t it so?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Little is more impressive, inspirational, or sexy, BRANDI, than watching someone in the throes of action, driven by purpose, oblivious to all but their aim.

Today has your name all over it -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, today don’t think or say, “I’m tired,” “I’m hurt,” “I’m angry.” Don’t even think or say, “I’m happy.”

Instead, think and say, “I’ve chosen to be tired, hurt, angry.” Or better still, “I’m choosing to be happy.”

You don’t get “hit” by feelings, you feel them based on your perceptions, and you perceive based on your beliefs, and you believe as you choose.

You are your words,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Everyone in your life, BRANDI, was specially summoned to help you think and feel things you have never thought or felt before.

It's working, huh?

Crazy rascals,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
So what if you don't have it yet, BRANDI?

It's coming. You're gonna get it. You're gonna love it. And then you're gonna forget there was ever a time when you didn't have it.

Like always,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Upon confirmation that you would soon be living on planet Earth at this wild and crazy time, as BRANDI M REGER no less, there was utter jubilation.

And one of the many reasons you were so happy was because you knew there would never, ever be any shortage of people you could help, smiles you could spread, and love you could give.

You’re like me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Changing what you have, BRANDI, comes from changing who you are.

And changing who you are comes from changing what you think.

Which is why I made the latter so easy.

Visualize,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes, BRANDI, one of the most helpful things you can do for another is to let them learn stuff for themselves, at their own pace.

It's also one of the most helpful things you can do for yourself.

Let’s help someone,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Just wanted to remind you, BRANDI, that sometimes success is better measured in smiles received, giggles heard, and hands held than in dollars earned, deadlines met, and kilos shed.

And I must say, you've done well for yourself.

Yeah us!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Can I give you some advice that you won't take the wrong way?

Buy something special for yourself, BRANDI.

Be proud. Flaunt your style. Love yourself. Daydream, wonder, and make a few mistakes.

Stay up too late every so often and sleep in too long. Sometimes wake up crazy early to doodle or journal or go for a walk. Play music loud. Celebrate everything. And when no one is looking, as often as you can remember, kiss the back of each of your hands in quick succession.

Happy love affair, gorgeous…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
One of the trickiest things about life, BRANDI, is that, at times, it… happens… so… slowly.

Yet… if… it… happened… any… faster… you'd… already… have… everything… you… ever… wanted… without… learning… to… enjoy… the… ride.

Beep, beep!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Everything matters, BRANDI, but rarely for the reasons you think.

Talk about training wheels,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What people rarely give themselves credit for, BRANDI, is that their giving continues giving, even after they've forgotten giving, and even when they didn't know they were giving, forever and ever and ever.

At least I'm keeping score,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I bet you could do something for someone today, BRANDI, who'd remember it for the rest of their life.

In a good way.

On your mark, get set…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You just never know, BRANDI, who in the crowd, standing beside you in line or passing you in the street, might be raised in spirit, or even lifted from despair, by the kindness in your glance or the comfort of your smile.

But they may never forget.

Supersize me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you're really honest, BRANDI, you have to admit that things today, in your most amazing life, at this most amazing time in history, are far better than they've ever, ever been.

Well done,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You can look at life like this, BRANDI:

If you're not yet surrounded by laughing friends, on amazing journeys, and constantly choosing between lots of fun things to do, it's simply because you haven't gotten to that part yet.

Whooohoooo,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There will always be people in your life, BRANDI, who hold you back, who cost you too much, and who fail to see all you've done for them.

And they need to be there until you finally learn that you do have time, you’re still rich, and that your own acknowledgement is all that ever mattered.

Nicely played,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
However long your dreams take to come true, BRANDI; no matter how prickly, thorny, or bumpy the path; and whether or not you even remember these words, if you stay the course, I can promise you this:

1. They will come true.

2. You'll recall the entire journey with fondness.

3. You're going to miss shopping in complete anonymity.

Sure as sugar.

I know you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Although there are a few exceptions, BRANDI, the more you do, the more you'll get, by huge margins. HUGE.

So unless an exception applies to you, I say do more.

Huge,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In the end, BRANDI, not that there really is an end, it's ALL going to be about how much you loved.

Today counts too,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
One of life's great ironies, BRANDI, is that very often the "stuff" you're trying to avoid right now is the same "stuff" you're going to miss most once you move on.

Ha, ha… oh, my -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You are the right person, this is the right time, you've paid your dues, you're thinking the right thoughts, you're doing the right things, and at this very moment, you’re exactly where you're supposed to be... poised for the greatest breakthrough you have ever had.

Dang, BRANDI!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
While it's often thought, BRANDI, that happiness may spring from having some serious "bucks," it actually works best the other way around.

Your celestial financial planner –

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's perfectly normal, BRANDI, that when waiting for a really BIG dream to come true that seems like it's taking forever, you wonder if you're doing something wrong, and you feel like you should just be happy with less.

But I promise you, no matter how long it takes, once it happens it'll seem as if time flew, you'll wonder how you ever doubted yourself, and you'll feel like you should have aimed a little higher.

Aim a little higher, BRANDI –

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Everyone, BRANDI, lives the life of their choosing.

Not just what they chose, but what they're choosing.

Game on,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you want to know why I have an issue, BRANDI, with compromising, economizing, and settling for less?

I have to work just as hard whether the bar has been lowered or raised.

Yeah, "Poor me..."

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Ask not, BRANDI, for what is already yours.

You know.

Whoot,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The difference you make in someone else's life, BRANDI, will always be smaller than the difference it will make in your own.

Dang, you gotta love your power -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, not even I know how a dream will come true, until it does.

But if you just keep showing up, even when confused, they always do.

Big-Love-Hug,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, do you think if someone deeply believed that they and I were one—that I stirred in their heart, ran through their veins, and shone from their eyes—they'd wait for the part of me that existed "outside" of themselves to make their dreams come true?

Or would they seize each moment of every day, assured of their inevitable success?

Phew!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The path to enlightenment is not a path at all, BRANDI, it's actually a metaphor for the time it takes for you to allow yourself to be happy with who you already are, where you already are, and what you already have… no matter what.

Just do it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Insecurity, BRANDI, is the greatest social piranha in the pool of human existence.

Yet remembering that no matter what anyone else thinks or does, you can still choose your own thoughts, do your own things, and manifest your own happiness… instantly makes you the bigger fishy.

Hook, line, and sinker -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, long weekend?

I get it… politics, chaos, a polarized world.

You probably won't believe this, but I'm as powerless as you when it comes to living other people's lives.

On the other hand, you are as powerful as I am when it comes to living your own.

Don't give away this power waiting to see what happens to the rest of the world when you can decide what will happen in yours.

In awe of you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Very simply, BRANDI, the more you accept responsibility for, the more power you have.

Doesn't that rock?

Whoa!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You're not in time and space to graduate into higher realms of existence, BRANDI; that’s where you came from.

And back then you could think of no adventure greater than falling in love with yourself all over again, having new dreams, facing great challenges, with total amnesia of your magnificence… lest it all seem too easy.

Show off.

You’re in a breed of your own,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The more you lean on me, BRANDI, the stronger we become.

The stronger we become, the bigger we dream, the higher we fly, and the bluer the sky.

Lean on me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, it's your degree of faith, your belief in benevolent powers, and your physical demonstrations that summon the magic… either in huge gobs or in drips and drops.

Go for gobs, costs the same.

Ka-ching,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Believe it or not, BRANDI, of all the types of happy "yeehaa!" and "whoohooo!" that exist, the greatest are those derived from helping others because it’s what you most wanted to do.

Especially when you help yourself along the way by choosing approaches that tickle you. It most certainly won't hurt if you have fun, crank up the music, shake-shake-shake, and scarf a new Create a lasting legacy while you're at it.

In fact, maybe we could use your Create a lasting legacy as we help others…

Shake-shake-shake,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The greatest trick and most subtle secret to doing anything really, really well, BRANDI, is loving that you get to do it at all.

And I'm pleased to say, you get to -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When you say "me," "myself," or "I," BRANDI, do you remember to think of yourself as an intergalactic, supernatural, indomitable, unstoppable, joy-bound, eternal flame, gladiator of love, matador of illusions, and supercoolhappylovething?

Good.

The force is with you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you could actually stand in someone else's shoes, BRANDI, to hear what they hear, see what they see, and feel what they feel, you would honestly wonder what planet they live on and be totally blown away by how different their "reality" is from yours.

You'd also never, in a million years, be quick to judge again.

Just sayin' -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The top 10 things dead people want to tell living people, BRANDI, are:

1. They're not dead.

2. They're sorry for any pain they caused.

3. There's no such thing as a devil or hell.

4. They were ready to go when they went.

5. You're not ready.

6. They finally understand what they were missing.

7. Nothing can prepare you for the beauty of the moment you arrive.

8. Don't try to understand this now, but life is exceedingly fair.

9. Your pets are as crazy, brilliant, and loving here as they were there.

10. Life really is all about love, but not just loving those who love you…

In their own words,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, your sheer resilience in the face of defeat, courage in the face of fear, and determination in the face of temptation have humbled the strongest among us.

You’ve literally moved mountains, BRANDI.

Please remember this, always -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In the end, BRANDI, all you have are memories, and usually the ones you have with friends are the ones you treasure most.

I got you, babe -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
As you always have, BRANDI, you're going to find, again and again and forevermore, that the hard and difficult stuff only ever seemed hard and difficult before you began it.

Bet you feel better now, huh?

Begin it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Valentine Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If everyone really knew how much they were loved, BRANDI, not only from "above," but by everyone now in their life, there'd be little hearts drawn on everything from wheelbarrows to skyscrapers to jumbo jets.

And I so look forward to that day.

Big heart,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
My wish for you, BRANDI, is that you succeed beyond your wildest imagination.

That you find love in unexpected places.

And that you have friends who call you "just because."

I dream that you go barefoot more than you wear shoes.

That you play as hard as you work.

And that you laugh more than you cry.

I want you to set the bar high, but not too high.

To reach for the stars, but with your toes on the ground.

And to never, ever stop dreaming.

But most of all, BRANDI, I wish for your happiness.

These dreams of mine are what started it all.

Besos,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you know, BRANDI, that you can interpret any and all of the past events of your life as ones that have unfolded in your greatest favor?

I say do.

Love you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, your balance of wit, charm, and intelligence…

Your measures of endurance, strength, and stamina…

Your depths of sensitivity, passion, and leanings…

Were not proportioned accidentally. They were planned by me, so that I might go where I have never been.

Road trip!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's truly a sight to see, BRANDI, when the inhabitants of any planetary civilization cross the tipping point and begin to individually accept complete and eternal responsibility for their own happiness.

Yet, this hardly compares to the mountain-quaking, body-shaking, polarity-flipping, hero-making occurrences that transpire when such inhabitants graduate to accepting complete and eternal responsibility for their every twinge of unhappiness.

Brings tears to my eyes,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Which sounds like more fun, BRANDI: Being showered with miracles just because I love you, or being showered with miracles because you dared, stretched, went out on a limb, raised the bar, threw down the gauntlet, faced your fears, and grew into more than you ever knew you could be?

Dare ya,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, it's a matter of switching gears, never looking back, and being the person today that you've always dreamed you'd be.

Entertain every thought, say every word, and make every decision from their point of view. Walk the way they would walk, dress the way they would dress, and spend your free time the way they would spend theirs. Choose the friends they would choose, eat the meals they would eat, and love and appreciate yourself the way they would.

After all, that person is who you really are -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
By all means, BRANDI, quantum physics totally rocks. Just don't let its search for the unifying equation of the cosmos distract you from using it.

I mean, one needn't know trigonometry to use chopsticks, eh? Gravity was gravity long before Newton, huh? And between now and the time they reveal their little theorem, your thoughts will unceasingly become things, as the entire world spins in the palm of your hand.

Aren't we amazing?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If someone wants "A" to happen, BRANDI, yet they prepare for "B," they will always get "B."

Prepare for "A" -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, there are some folks who think that life isn't fair, and to them I say, "Touché!"

Obviously, they recognize that their thoughts become things, giving rise not only to dreams but to worlds. And they appreciate that their very existence in time and space proves that they're loved beyond imagination.

These spiritual hipsters must deeply understand that the cards of life are stacked wildly in their favor.

N'est-ce pas?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Be still, BRANDI.

Stop thinking.

Feel.

Visualize.

Take action.

Repeat.

Yours,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Love even more, BRANDI.

Everything else is resistance.

Love,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When your dreams or "end results" are stated generally, in broad brush strokes, like wealth and abundance, friends and laughter, health and harmony, then please, by all means, BRANDI, attach yourself to them. Attach, attach, attach. There’s no limit to what you can have and no reason to expect anything less.

But when your end results are specific, like the ultimate car, a hot date with someone specific, or a home on a certain street, do not attach, do not attach, do not attach.

Details and specifics are only a tiny piece of a grander picture and are never important in and of themselves. They're "cursed hows" disguised as end results. Steps disguised as destinations.

By all means, imagine the details, put them in your scrapbook or on your vision board to fuel your excitement and remind yourself of the kind of possessions and adventures that are your birthright. But do not give them importance, through attachment, greater than what you are truly after: a fuller, richer life with all cups running over, the details of which will take care of themselves by the time your ship sails into view.

Bok choi, baby -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Don't be afraid to go where you've never gone and do what you've never done, BRANDI, because both are necessary to have what you've never had and be who you've never been.

Be the ball,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Perception Management for Very Advanced Souls (a.k.a. BRANDI)

The next time someone upsets you, think, "Thanks for pointing out that I've begun depending on your approval. Time I lose the expectations."

And the next time someone doesn't take your view into account, think, "That's okay, I was once like that."

And if someone steals from you, think, "It was nothing, my supply is the Universe."

Or lies to you, think, "I'm sorry you feel that need."

Violates you, "All for my growth and glory."

Is rude to you, "Cheer up, dear soul, it'll be okay."

Judges you, "Thanks for sharing your truth."

Drives by you like a bat out of hell, "Be careful, my friend. You’re loved."

And the next time someone greets you with a smile, smile back, like you're sharing a secret.

Headmaster,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Isn't it your triumphs over adversity, surprise rebounds, and stellar comebacks that you look back on with the most fondness, BRANDI?

Far more than the predictable cake for breakfast and pajamas in the afternoon kind of times?

Fondly,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
For your information, BRANDI, it really is an itty-bitty world you live upon.

To me, anyhow.

And if you can see it like that too, just watch how your challenges shrink.

Ah, the magic of a chosen perspective, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The shortest distance between you and your Create a lasting legacy, BRANDI, is thinking that you already have it and acting like it.

New math.

Love you like a calculator,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Young souls learn to accept responsibility for their actions.

Mature souls learn to accept responsibility for their thoughts.

And old souls, BRANDI, learn to accept responsibility for their happiness.

We-e-e-e-e-e-e-e,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Should you choose to go, do, and be, BRANDI... at the end of your life, shocked and dismayed, you'll likely exclaim that because of all the uncanny events, wild timing, weird coincidences, and chance encounters, all of your life's good fortune must have been your destiny.

Or, should you choose to wait, wish, and hope... at the end of your life, shocked and dismayed, you'll likely exclaim that because of all the uncanny events, wild timing, weird coincidences, and chance encounters, all of your life's bad luck must have been your destiny.

BRANDI, do you see what the difference is?

It ain't me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Somewhere, over the rainbow, BRANDI, there's a world where birds sing into every night, flowers bloom across every land, each problem has 10,000 solutions, and people live lives only to love and be loved…

Just like under the rainbow.

Ain't life grand?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You only ever have to do what you're capable of doing, BRANDI, because by design, no matter how things appear, you'll always have enough time to do it, you'll do even better than you thought, and life will get even richer than you imagined.

Much, much richer -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI! How totally cool! Last night we were dreaming together!

Do you remember? Soaring in and out of mile-high clouds. Walking upon lazy lakes and raging rivers. Manifesting gold coins from our blue-jean pockets. Reaching out to the many who are only just now discovering that thriving is their natural state, that abundance is their birthright, and that friends, guides, and admirers are only ever a nod away.

Too bad. You were right. You said you wouldn't remember a thing.

Well, that's okay. I was right, too. I said that those you helped would never forget. Just like here.

See you tonight,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, has it struck you yet that answers come before questions? That healing begins with illness? And that you can't have a dream come true without a time when it hasn't?

Shoot, isn't it all so perfect? Everyone, no matter where they are on their journey, can be happy.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Every burden bears a gift, BRANDI, every challenge brings a treasure, and every setback hides a blessing.

Is it just me or does time and space sometimes seem far too good to be true?

Hallelujah,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brilliant, civilization-changing ideas are a dime a dozen, BRANDI.

Physically taking action to implement them, however, beginning with baby steps that seem to accomplish very little, is what gets the crowds here screaming like raving lunatics.

In the good way that lunatics scream.

Peanuts! Popcorn! Cotton candy! It's the show of a lifetime!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It goes like this... Whatever you're capable of summoning, imagining, and moving toward, BRANDI, however feebly to begin with, I am capable of delivering.

In expectation,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Life? I kind of see it like this, BRANDI:

Second after second, illusion after illusion, miracle after miracle... an unending parade of opportunities to catch yourself in the act of creating.

Gotcha!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
One way to defeat invisible, limiting beliefs, BRANDI, even ones you may not know you have, is to simply dream of a life so grand that they couldn't possibly make sense.

And then start living that life today, however humbly at first.

En garde,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I distinctly remember the conversation, BRANDI. We were having triple-chocolate brownie Fudgsicles, listening to Beethoven’s “Fifth” before he even was Beethoven, overlooking the galaxy, when you mentioned how neat you thought it would be to one day have dreams you didn’t know you’d inevitably manifest, to have challenges you didn’t know you’d inevitably overcome, and to have friends you didn’t know you’d inevitably meet.

And as I leaned forward in total awe, all agog, wanting to learn more of your genius and courage, I almost fainted when you added, “And should it ever appear as if I could use your help, before I even begin helping myself, back off or you’ll ruin everything.”

You memory-maker you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What one little thing could you do today, BRANDI, within your means and your comfort zone, that would make you feel like a supercoolhappylovething?

Get down on it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Isn't it rather mind-numbing, BRANDI, that for everyone, always and forever, they have 10,000 more things to be thrilled about than not?

U R blessed,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
With the vista of a new year still dawning, is it my imagination, BRANDI, or is someone out there forgetting that the "hows" are my domain?

That when it comes to manifesting change, their real job is to focus upon the end result.

And that simply doing what they can, with what they've got, from where they are, will always be enough to move heaven and earth?

I didn't think so -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Ask, yet expect.

Surrender, yet prepare.

And miracles will abound, BRANDI M REGER.

You slay me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you were able to look back at your most brilliant successes, stunning comebacks, amazing catches, and smokin' ideas, BRANDI, and you were to find that virtually all of them seemed to materialize out of thin air when you least expected them, and that they all exceeded even your greatest expectations at the time, how excited would you be about the new year and whatever else I've got up my sleeve?

Hubba, hubba -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, I didn't give you the power, the glory, and the Kingdom so that you could just eke by, be selfless, and make sacrifices. I didn't give you dominion over all things so that just a few of your dreams might come true.

BRANDI, I gave you these things so that you could have, do, and be whatever you want.

So be it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Every compliment, criticism, promotion, setback, good vibe, cough or really long line you have to wait in, BRANDI, is a gift that was meticulously designed to make possible your becoming more than who you once saw yourself to be and, ultimately, happier than ever before, as we dance into forever.

We've only just begun,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, you've literally been performing miracles your entire life.

Consciously, deliberately, and with calculated precision.

You get that from me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Oh, yes indeed, BRANDI, another holiday season is upon you, as it is here, so I bet you're wondering what I'd like as a present. Right?!

Well, since there's already peace on earth (for those who look), since there's already goodwill toward all (mine and yours for starters), and because BRANDI M REGER's already in the world (took long enough), how about we talk a little more often? You lean on me a bit more? You expect a few more miracles? And you begin seriously planning to Finish the cotbons book?

It's good to be you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When little things start to bother you, BRANDI, it might be because you need more big things in your life.

Happily, there's a super-easy spiritual fix: Get out more.

It's all spiritual,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Just as the acorn existed within the oak, even when the oak was a seedling;

and as the oak existed within the earth, even before there were trees;

and as the earth existed within the galaxy, even before there were planets...

there has never been a time, dear sweet BRANDI, when you did not exist within me, during which we dreamed all else into being.

Far out.

Love you.

Happy everything,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if, BRANDI…

Every "no" meant "not yet"?

Every loss meant "even more is on the way"?

And every disappointment meant "pucker up, buttercup"?

Yeah, precisely -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A super-secret money insight from your magician friend, the Universe...

While great joy inevitably yields great abundance, BRANDI, rarely does this relationship work in reverse.

But hey, at least you'll be rich.

Whoop-dee-do,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
To set the record straight: However cool you think it might be to have an out-of-body experience, BRANDI—floating over your house, flying through space, traversing the past, present, and future—let me tell you, it'll never be as cool as being in the one you have now. Walking barefoot in the grass, floating on a sun-drenched pool, or dancing alone in the dark.

You so "fly,"

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When you understand why something really hurts, BRANDI, it stops hurting.

When you understand you have options, you take action.

And when you get that no one can ever stop you from loving more, you feel the love you had earlier denied.

It’s time to get it on,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Laced throughout every day of your life, BRANDI, are hidden highways of opportunity, invisible crossroads of time, and avenues for great personal transformation that, if only traveled upon, would reveal the extraordinary, the sublime, and the unexpected.

Yet most slip by undetected until there is first a childlike wonder at the ordinary, the routine, and the expected.

Hot diggity-dog,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In case you haven't noticed, BRANDI, the sun doesn't always rise in crimson.

The wind doesn't always blow from the south.

The rains don't always fall on the plains.

And so must you allow for your own rhythms in time.

Always in love,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, your dreams are like postcards from your future self, revealing what already exists in another time and space.

If they can find you in the past, you can find them in the present.

I’m just the mail carrier -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Let's see, BRANDI...

The elements conspire on your behalf.

Everything works out in your favor.

There are always even more reasons to be happy.

Millions of lives have been touched by yours.

Things just keep getting better.

You can have anything you dream of.
