You’re a forever-part of me.

And I'm just getting warmed up,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You're simply the best, BRANDI. You blow my mind. We're all in total awe. How you hold together under pressure. How you face up to your challenges. And your rebound ability totally rocks. You're driven, persistent, and strong. Playful, silly, fun. Compassionate, sympathetic, understanding. You’re just plain unstoppable. And you always have time for others. What a package. Soooo…

How 'bout cutting yourself some slack every now and then?

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The plans have been laid.

Your angels are in place.

Even the orchestra is cued up.

Now simply be moved by your heart, BRANDI, day by day, and December will be your month of miracles, transformation, and new beginnings.

Yo! Ho! Ho!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What really matters? What's really important? Why bother? Who cares? What's it all for?

You, BRANDI, it's all about you. What you like and dislike. What you want and don't want. What makes you smile and laugh. What makes you learn and grow.

Selfish? How else could you shine your light? How else could you possibly hope to lift the world? How else could you be all that I dreamed you might be?

Selfish of me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, if you just think what you know to think, say what you know to say, and do what you know to do, you'll blow all the little minds.

Cool?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's precisely when in the throes of activity, giving 100%, focused and concentrating with all your strength and might, BRANDI, that it's easiest to forget I exist at all. Even though that's precisely when I can do the most, with just a nod from you.

Like right now, perhaps?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you know, BRANDI, there have been a lot of decisions you've made and followed through on, under the most trying and difficult circumstances, that have actually become textbook examples of taking the "high road" for wannabe rock stars here in the unseen?

We've sold tons of "your book,"

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Just curious, BRANDI, when was the last time you looked into a mirror and addressed yourself as "Gorgeous," "Magnificent," or "Sublime"?

It matters.

Here's looking at you, Gorgeous -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A "Holiday Shopping" tip from your friend, the Universe:

During the merriment of your retail adventures, BRANDI, should you ever have to ask the clerk, "How much?" always follow their reply with raised eyebrows, a slight gasp, and a disbelieving, "That's all?"

Santa's watching,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
So much to be thankful for, huh, BRANDI?

Yet so little time.

Let me start with you -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If I were to explain to you, BRANDI, how life, your life included, was meant to be… at first, you wouldn’t believe me.

Because, BRANDI, you’re already there, living as you were meant to live. You’re exactly where you’re "supposed" to be, learning what you wanted to learn, loving who and what you wanted to love, while absolutely adored by all who know you, in an adventure without end.

Stranger than fiction,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I always knew I could count on you to uncover the truth, BRANDI, when others just played "follow the leader."

I wasn't surprised at all to find you standing by your principles when the going got tough.

And there was never any doubt in my mind that when faced with a fork in the road, you'd take the path less traveled.

I just had no idea you'd have such expensive taste.

You so rock,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Remember, BRANDI, you’re only ever a few small adjustments away from prevailing, triumphing, and soaring.

As per our original Time-Space Agreement -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you think most realize, BRANDI, that what they're really after is more "living," not more rewards?

Yet by conditioning the former upon the latter, they have a tough time with both?

Yeah, not yet. But one day they will.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, the root of every "evil" is looking to time and space for meaning, solutions, or identity; for friends, love, and laughter; for wealth, health, and harmony.

The source of all material things is spirit, which is molded by your thoughts and then, without judgment, forms into matter. Trying to get what you want by looking to time and space is like trying to change your reflection in the mirror without its source.

Instead, go within. You can create anything you want by imagining what you truly want as if it already existed.

You are pure source energy,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When the external begins to define the internal, BRANDI, instead of the internal defining the external, one begins living as a mortal rather than as a god.

Trust me, as a god is better.

Boom,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Let's just say, BRANDI, you're driving down the road listening to some hip-hop, happy kind of music.

Then, after a while, you decide you want to hear something else, maybe classic rock. Would you just hope that the hip-hop station starts playing rock? Would you visualize it, and say, "YES! I believe in the magic!"?

Or, after thinking about what you wanted, would you physically change the station?

Good. Just checking.

Born to run,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Release me, BRANDI, release me to do your will, to move heaven and earth, to orchestrate the players and summon the circumstances that will transform your life, by doing your all out best with today.

That's all the leg-up I need,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Wheels are turning, BRANDI, circumstances are brewing, players have been called, serendipities imagined, miracles planned, and witnesses gathered… all to see how much more you will love and learn today.

You never stop surprising us,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Pretty much the only thing that slows me down, BRANDI, is when someone forgets to include me.

Which is almost like forgetting to read the P.S. at the bottom of these Notes…

Je suis chic et magnifique,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Would you believe, BRANDI, that there are some people who actually think they can change their life through "pretending it better"?

We call them masters.

In awe of you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, it's supposed to be easy. Everything is supposed to be easy. Everything is easy. You live in a dream world. You're surrounded by illusions. And the illusions change when you change your thinking!

Tell yourself it's easy. Tell yourself often. Make it an affirmation. Eat, sleep, breathe it, and your life shall be transformed.

It's supposed to be easy,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you ever feel nostalgic for the good old days, BRANDI?

Like before this life began? When you buzzed with happy talk, walked on happy feet, and loved with happy friends obsessed with the possibilities, the challenges, and the adventures; the scares, the dares, and the comebacks; the glories, the miracles, and the triumphs that would all be made possible once you became… BRANDI M REGER?

Welcome to the highest heights,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Please tell anyone who wants to know, BRANDI, that a dream not followed by consistent action, however humble or small the actions may be, points to either a huge contradiction or a gigantic misunderstanding.

Because when people are clear and they realize just how powerful they already are, wild horses can’t stop them from taking baby steps, every day.

Eeeeee-hee-hee,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Accepting full responsibility for every little thing in your life, BRANDI, is what opens the floodgates to joy and power.

Or to what we here call "joypower."

Every little thing,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You absolutely will not believe who was at the party last night!

As round and jolly as ever, handing out presents to all who'd receive, our dear friend "Abundance"! Lovely soul. Oh, and "Time" was there, along with "Space"; they're truly inseparable. You should have heard the tall tales they were spinning—about near and far, here and there, now and then.

Oh, and guess who was asking about you? Again! Uh-huh, you know who... "Gratitude." Told me you've been hooking-up lately—you go, BRANDI! But better be careful or the next thing you know there'll be good and plenty running around the house—or houses.

Fear was there, too. At least no one paid it any attention, and then, poof, it vanished as quickly as it arrived. Never fails.

So tell me, where were you hiding? Was that you in the conga line? Funny how it just flows when everyone lets go of the "Hows" and the "Shoulds." They're such a pain, those two, always trying to lead the way when just one step at a time and you'll be astounded at the places you go.

Did you see those pesky "Limiting Beliefs" get thrown in the pool? Serves them right. Imagine attending a party like that and then turning invisible! Happily, during their vanishing act there were traces of them everywhere—frightened guests, bad vibrations, and, yep, cookie crumbs—clumsy clods. They're never really that hard to spot if you just look for their trail.

Now, why am I telling you all of this, BRANDI? It was your party! As they all are.

Toga!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Next time you overhear someone say they're only human, BRANDI, be compassionate.

And maybe remind ‘em it's only temporary.

Your call,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
People who give, BRANDI, are given to.

People who care are cared for.

And people who love… age slower, run faster, jump higher, eat healthier, tend to live in cottages, are as happy with friends as they are alone, climb more trees, skip when they could walk, kiss when they could talk, take the odd Friday off, experience faster manifestations, and are really popular with animals.

Love, baby -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you know, BRANDI, that your little computer already has about 416 powerful options, shortcuts, and functions you don't even know about that could make your life simpler, happier, and zippier with just a few clicks?

Cool.

And did you know that the Universe has about 46 giga-trillion powerful options, shortcuts, and functions; friends, allies, and confidants; secrets, solutions, and answers; ideas, inventions, and dimensions; angels, wizards, and fairies; engineers, strategists, and specialists; plotters, planners, and diagrammers; nooks, crannies, and hideouts; games, adventures, and thrills; stories, legends, and fables; flavors, scents, and melodies; pleasures, pleasantries, and passions; eurekas, cowabungas, and yeehaws you don't even know about that could make your life simpler, happier, and zippier with just a little visualizing?

Yeah, cooler.

You can start now.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you were to be given a few power tools, plus a hammer, chisel, and axe, to craft, carve, and shape the life of your wildest dreams, BRANDI, I'd bet you'd be really careful with each of your bangs, buzzes, and chops.

So please use the same extraordinary care and precision when using your imagination, choosing your words, and dancing life’s dance.

You’re a light worker -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you would simply think deeply, BRANDI, on the things you've loved most about life; on the things you've loved most about yourself; and of the main challenges you've faced, whether behind you or in the moment, you will know in an instant, beyond a shadow of a doubt, exactly why you chose this lifetime.

Clever you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The more you do, BRANDI, the more I can do for you.

Don't worry that your baby steps are small, mine cross continents.

And don't worry when you can't yet see what I'm doing… soon everyone will.

Look out world,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Your word, BRANDI, is one of the most powerful forces of nature.

Listen to yours to find out what you really think.

And speak them wisely to pave the path before you in gold.

So be it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I don't recommend asking for what you can have, or even for what you can give, nearly as much as I recommend asking for what else you can know.

Because there is always more you can know, BRANDI, and knowing it will radically increase all you can have and give.

Did you just ask something?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Hypothetically, BRANDI, if you were to begin asking the world—best friends, complete strangers, or natural-born psychics—why some things haven't worked out the way you wanted, how other things got so crazy, or what might be wrong with you (oh, please, no), they'd have answers. Oh, yeah.

Of course, at first they'd be taken aback that you even asked, but they'd hide this so as not to hurt your feelings, quickly accept the authority you surrendered, and then talk their little heads off with reasons, rationale, and insight… glad to be recognized and sincerely happy to be of service.

Then, you'd both be further convinced of your "issues."

So I say, let's not create such opportunities.

Always beside you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Truth be told, BRANDI, when a dream comes true, 9 out of 10 dreamers say that it was easier than they thought, happened faster than they expected, and was better than they imagined it would be.

Causing those in the unseen to wonder without end, why didn't they dream bigger?

It’s never too late -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if, BRANDI, you were so naturally buoyant, no amount of fear or worry you might entertain could keep you from moving forward?

What if, no matter how lost you felt, the path you sought always lay beneath your feet?

What if, no matter how alone you seemed, there were always adoring friends perched upon your shoulder?

Would you then begin to understand the meaning of "Thy Kingdom Come"?

Laughing all the way to the bank,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Dreams create their own pathways, if you don't try to force things.

Taking action summons miracles, whether you recognize them or not.

And, BRANDI, it's never too late in the day for breakfast.

Dream on, wild thing -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Hey, BRANDI… It's OK. Everything is fine.

You've always been guided. Even now you are watched, and held, and adored.

You've made great stuff happen, and you will make more great stuff happen. You've changed lives. You've changed your own. You've moved mountains and done the impossible.

You've been scared and you overcame. You've been knocked down and you rose back up. And you've been lost, or so you thought, only to discover it was just the calm before another storm of creativity, love, and fun.

Humbled like the rest of 'em -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you could choose between living two lives, BRANDI:

Which would you choose?

Game on,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Your mere presence has always been enough, dear BRANDI, for the birds to sing, the waves to roll, and the sun to shine.

Honestly, it's not even possible to be more than you are, in the eyes of love.

Love yourself as we love you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes when a door is slammed shut, BRANDI, people forget there are always lots and lots of other doors to knock on.

Curiously,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's not what's happening around you, BRANDI, that determines your health, finances, or hotness… but what's happening inside of you, exclusively.

You hottie,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Tell me, BRANDI, are you finding that lately the occasional stranger seems to have a crush on you? That for words you've effortlessly chosen, hearts broken too long began to heal? That eyes sometimes well up with tears when it's time to say goodbye?

Remarkable. Our findings exactly.

Psssst… BRANDI, your divinity is showing.

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Odd, isn't it, BRANDI, how folks will look back to great milestones in their life—to when they met someone, fortuitously changed careers, or were somehow found to be in exactly the right place at exactly the right time—and consider such incidents turning points?

Because the real turning points, BRANDI, of any life always occur well before such manifestations, in the moments when they finally began thinking, speaking, and behaving like never before.

Hey, it works -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, that which you most need, right now, is already at hand.

You knew that,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you know, BRANDI, that for the person who thinks abundance, speaks abundance, and acts abundantly, no matter how much they lack while performing such demonstrations, they are given an outpouring of "stuff" far in excess of what they could ever spend?

That's what I call fair.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Should you ever hear your name being called, BRANDI, only to spin around and see absolutely no one… it's most likely one of us, in the unseen, who misses you so much we've begun following you around, talking as if you can hear us, waving our arms around excitedly as we speak, and getting so carried away that we've ended up volunteering you for sainthood by blurting your name out so loud it broke the time-space barrier. Oh my!

"BRANDI!!!!!!"

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In the beginning, BRANDI, long before there were even beaches to walk along, clouds to float upon, or stars to wish on, I dreamed of you and your happiness.

And everything that has ever been added since was to that end.

Tell me you’ve noticed…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Our worlds actually have a lot in common, BRANDI.

We've got angels; you've got angels.

Our thoughts become things; your thoughts become things.

We have no limits; you have no limits.

I make my dreams come true; you make your dreams come true.

Right?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, every now and then I get this incredible urge to splurge on myself. To really indulge. To pull out all the stops.

And that's when I'll choose a lifetime like yours.

With obstacles to challenge me, people to "test" me, and circumstances that force me to see things even I have never seen before.

And I'll choose a personality like yours, which possesses faith so daring that even when lost, I still hope. Dreams so bold that even when I fall, I'll get back up. And a heart so big that even when it breaks, as all big hearts do, there'll always be room for second chances and new romances.

That's what I do.

Talk about crazy, sexy, and cool!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Without "blame," BRANDI, at least 50% of all grounded relationships would have continued sailing.

And I'm all for sailing.

Your first mate,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
From where you sit right now, BRANDI, reading this Note, you are held and supported by energies unimaginable.

All commanded by you and your choice to think big or small, rich or poor, confident or afraid, easy or hard, fun or boring, play or work, here or there, now or then, fast or slow, happy or sad.

Your call.

Love you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Time for a POP Quiz, BRANDI!!

Question: What do rich folk daydream and visualize about?

Answer: Yeah, whatever they want.

Trick question: And what do poor folk daydream and visualize about?

Answer: Yeah, whatever they want.

You’re coming along so quickly,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
See it all as easy, BRANDI.

And so it must become.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In the beginning, the price of giving great love, BRANDI, is risking that it won't be returned.

Until you understand, of course, that great love is always returned.

With compound interest,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if the word victim could be redefined into something closer to hero, BRANDI? Recognizing that the path some tread spares others from the same?

BRANDI M REGER saves the day, again -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Someone loves you very, very much, BRANDI, and because you received this Note, no matter how you received this Note, it's important that you know it.

Someone besides me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, as you've probably deduced by now, I don't think in terms of reasonable or unreasonable, likely or unlikely, possible or impossible.

I merely figure out the "hows."

Guess what that leaves you with?

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Here's the thing, BRANDI. Admission into time and space requires a belief in limits: that both time and space are real; that you can therefore have and have-not; that love can be lost and found; and that you are what your physical senses show you, no more.

Leading you to believe that you are incomplete, and therefore filling you with desire, igniting your emotions, fueling your passions, and sending you out into the world where journeys are begun, connections are made, and dreams come true… only to be replaced by new dreams as your divine sense of incompleteness persists.

This is by design, BRANDI. Feeling incomplete does not make you so. It's how legends are born, giants are made, and history is written. It's why you're here. To ever so briefly escape your true identity as you live with an unquenchable thirst that will lead you into adventures of grandeur and a realization that love is all there is.

Bowing before greatness,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, do not think you have to get "there"—wherever "there" is for you—with what you have today, in terms of money, confidence, talent, connections, whatever.

Doesn't work like that.

Once you set yourself in motion, the resources you need to complete your journey, again, in terms of money, confidence, talent, connections, whatever, will be drawn to you.

{Soft voice in the background, "Once you set yourself in motion…"}

Fade out.

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In the jungles of time and space, it's wise to remember that the best hope one has for thriving among the seen, the known, and the manifested, comes from playing off the unseen, the unknown, and the not yet manifested.

Whatever you want, BRANDI, go there in thought first.

And go there often,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI! You've got a lot of important things to do this week... so let the top of your list be a “note to self” that you’re never alone.

1. Leverage the Universe, engage the magic.

Use me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you ever just started talking out loud as if you were some future version of yourself, BRANDI, explaining what the ride to the top was like? As if you were a mentor sharing insider tips with someone you're really fond of?

"When I first started out, I had no idea of how I'd get where I am today..." kind of talk? You know, to yourself, in your car, in the shower, dowsing for water?

"But I knew better than to worry about the hows. I knew to simply define what I wanted, in terms of the end result. Visualize, as if it had already occurred. Take action, no matter how futile. And then, when I least expected it, the floodgates burst open.... That's how I got my first Create a lasting legacy. And then I thought to myself, 'Whatever did I do to deserve so much?'”

Trust me, BRANDI, no one will laugh at you. Especially not when you Finish the cotbons book.

Tallyho, amigo -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's not the size of your dreams, BRANDI, that determines whether or not they come true, but the size of the actions you take that imply their inevitable arrival.

Your greatest admirer,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Contrary to popular thinking, BRANDI, being worthy isn't something you earn, it's something you recognize.

And once you do, you won't be able to think, speak, or behave in any other way than as if what you most wanted was meant to be.

You were born worthy,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, according to my records, you've never been told exactly how powerful you are!

You, BRANDI M REGER, are almighty.

You can have or do anything you want.

You are me -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You're the kind of person, BRANDI, who saves so much time every month with wise decisions, creative thoughts, and simple kindness that if you were anyone else, you'd toot your own horn, take the next week off, and stop feeling guilty for not doing more.

Really…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, this is a community service reminder from the Universe:

Today is way more important than tomorrow.

Be here now,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you ever stopped to consider, BRANDI, that when you look out at the physical world, you’re actually looking within?

And so, everything is an inside job.

TBT,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you noticed, BRANDI, how moving toward a great dream summons from life's jungles the fiercest lions, the scariest tigers, and the grizzliest bears… who quickly turn out to be the noblest teachers, the bravest guides, and the dearest friends?

You're on your way,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
No matter how hard you work, prepare, or calculate, BRANDI, the final ingredient necessary to leap hurdles and manifest dreams will always come down to a little spark of magic that no amount of physical maneuvering can ensure.

While simply remembering that you're not alone, can.

Flick my bic,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It doesn't matter that the road's been rough, that you now have challenges, or that uncertainties loom on the horizon, BRANDI.

None of this changes the fact that for every thought you think today, worlds will come tumbling into existence. For every word you speak, legions will be called into action. And for every step you take, matter will be drawn from the ether.

Jeez -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you only knew what a beloved and celebrated character you were before this lifetime began, BRANDI, and what a beloved and celebrated character you’ll be upon your return to the unseen, you’d be smiling even more in this lifetime.

Incognito,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Most would never admit it, or they hide it from themselves, but everyone can sense God within, BRANDI.

And once admitted, they can sense God in others.

Go for it!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Actually, BRANDI, time and space is not a place you go to be taught, as much as it is a place you go to teach.

Of what heaven looks like, on earth.

Of what divinity feels like, in flesh.

And of what it means to dream in spite of darkness, hope in spite of odds, and prevail in spite of fear.

I mean, how else would I know?

Most humbly,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The baby steps in the beginning of a journey, BRANDI, always seem inadequate compared to the brilliance of the dream that inspired them. This is natural. If the dream wasn't so far "out there" and dazzling, it wouldn't be worth dreaming!

Just don't be led to think that the physical ground you cover with your baby steps is all that they accomplish. Because for every mortal step you take, another cog in a giant wheel behind the curtains of time and space advances, and with it 10,000 new possibilities.

Better than Star Trek,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Visualizing, BRANDI, works like compound interest.

You get back more than you put in.

Let’s make a deposit,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The truth is, BRANDI, you live in an infinitely kind and unspeakably wise Universe that you are a part of, not apart from; where you, yourself, are a creator. And of your countless creations, your life is one. You chose to be here. And infinitely benign and intelligent yourself, your choice was impeccable.

In this greatest adventure of all adventures, whatever you wish for is my command. I am your most faithful servant and constant companion. Whatever you once dreamed of for yourself, can still come to pass. It's never too late to come from behind, and things can literally change for the better in the twinkling of an eye—as you have so often shown us in the past.

You are a supernatural force of nature whose thoughts become things and for whom all things are possible. This, being a creation amongst your own creations, is as good as it gets, because whenever you don't like what's before you, you can recreate it, without hindrance from the past or so-called contracts you no longer remember. There are no other rules. There are no hidden agendas. And there are no unknown variables working against you in this paradise you call home, where manifesting change most certainly couldn't be any easier than getting what you think about.

Oh yeah… way better than winning the lottery.

You are your lucky numbers,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Land appeared beneath their feet where there had been none, BRANDI, because they dared to step.

Cups that had long been empty began to overflow, as they were finally raised.

And friends were drawn, as if from the ether, when the party shoes went on.

Oh, the magic -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Relax. Breathe in deep. Hold it. Let it out. Loosen your shoulders. Smile. Close your eyes. And you’ll be surprised, dear BRANDI, by how many voices you'll hear, whispering sweet encouragement into your ear.

Kissy, kissy, you can do it -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When in doubt, BRANDI, give, let them have it, surrender, make peace.

When there's no doubt, BRANDI, give, let them have it, surrender, make peace.

Did I make life too easy?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, imagine yourself on a warm summer evening before a calm, clear pond. The moon is full. The stars are shining. Whip-poor-wills are whip-poor-willing.

And I am with you.

Now, do you know how to float on water? For the most part you do absolutely nothing, at which point I can hold you at the surface, in the palm of my hand. It's simply a matter of physics, the laws of time and space, and your natural state.

Are you with me?

Okay, now you'll have to trust me, but it's the same when it comes to floating in wealth and abundance, health and harmony, friends and laughter. These are your natural state, your default settings, the "givens" in this great adventure.

These are where true balance is found. They can be yours without strenuous effort. You don't even have to visualize them. Just stop the argument that claims you’re without. Surrender in the struggle that presumes you lack. Come out from the fort that has kept you so safe, and follow your heart with abandon.

You can breathe now,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I'd like to remind you, BRANDI, that there's simply nothing you have to do.

There's no path you can't walk away from. No person you have to make happy. You don't even have to work as hard as you now work.

Yet still, you can have it all.

Ah, abundance -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sure, there may be a lot of "real estate" between here and where you dream of being, BRANDI, but the road, if you notice, happens to run straight through the middle of paradise.

Like A1A in the Florida Keys,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Act with faith, BRANDI.

Prepare the way for your inevitable success.

To the degree you can, behave as if your dreams have already come true, as if you already owned a Create a lasting legacy, as if later today you were going to Finish the cotbons book (again).

And you shall see the power you wield as the floodgates begin to tremble, the elements begin to conspire, people in your life begin to change, insights are summoned, comprehensions soar, and clarity is born.

Not to mention, BRANDI, fierce, wild animals lying down when you walk on by.

On with it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You don’t take "baby steps" for the distance they cover, BRANDI, but to put yourself within reach of life’s magic.

Just like you don’t hoist your sails to move the boat, but to put yourself within reach of the wind.

Hoist, baby, hoist, baby, 1, 2, 3, 4 –

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Time for a little refresher on manifesting change, parking spots, and a new Create a lasting legacy, BRANDI.

Think about it as if it were already done.

Keep showing up, doing all you can, every day in every way, until already done.

For complicated cases, like when dealing with invisible, limiting beliefs, negative friends, or staring down adversity: follow the exact same steps.

You've got it made,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
How is it, BRANDI, that with so many brilliant beings on your planet, so few recognize that when one's life encounters turbulence, choppy waters, or setbacks, it's always a sign that things are about to get wildly better than they've ever been before?

And by brilliant beings, I'm not talking about the dolphins (this time).

Don't fight it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Of course you don't know "how."

It's OK that you don't know "how."

To be honest, BRANDI, you're not really supposed to know "how," which is precisely when you’ll be pressed hardest to understand that I do.

To learn that only I can see the possibilities—from millions of probabilities, amongst shifting circumstances and fickle players, in a world hurling through space. This is my domain. Yours is simply to define what you want in terms of your desired end result, as you keep showing up without insistence on any path.

Which will shockingly reveal that the path you sought began right beneath your skipping feet.

Double Dutch,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Never regret love, BRANDI.

No matter how blind, it improved your vision.

No matter how foolish, it made you wiser.

And no matter how generous, it made you more.

Hubba, hubba,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The top 10 ways, BRANDI, to make friends, find love, trim down, shape up, defeat boredom, discover your purpose, make a fortune, and shine your light:

1. Get quiet.

2. Start anywhere.

3. Lean into it.

4. Open your heart.

5. Keep busy.

6. Schedule play.

7. Ask for help.

8. Don’t look back.

9. Give more hugs.

10. Feel gratitude.

You were already visualizing, right?

Today,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The trick with "thoughts becoming things," BRANDI, is remembering that they all do.

Faithfully,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
To empower another is to empower yourself.

To celebrate another is to celebrate yourself.

And to free another, BRANDI, is to free yourself.

I say empower, celebrate, and free them all -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, you know how when you visualize something every day to such a degree that you can literally taste its reality?

And you believe in the likelihood of its manifestation with all your heart and soul?

And as often as you think of it, in at least some small way, you prepare for its arrival?

Yet still absolutely nothing happens?

Right! That’s impossible!

We do marvel at you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Always, BRANDI, do what you can.

Because once you at least do what you can, no matter how seemingly insignificant, everything changes.

Ready for some changes?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Thinking brand new thoughts that you've never thought before, BRANDI, is far more conducive to creating major life changes than thinking different varieties of the same old thoughts.

Something to think about,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Let's get ready to R U M B L E!

BRANDI, what is it that you'd like more than absolutely anything? Maybe a Create a lasting legacy? Or perhaps you'd like to Finish the cotbons book? Whatever it is, just name ONE THING right now.

Why do you want it? Your answer had something to do with fulfillment, love, or happiness, right? Something to do with your feelings.

Can you feel those feelings now, without it?

Do so, and what you seek will weave its way into your life coming from the most unexpected places. Doors will fly open, best friends will arrive, and new vistas will be revealed. Your phone will ring, news will arrive; answers, hope, and solutions will appear beneath your moving feet.

Feel it first, BRANDI, and the world will spin in the palm of your hand. It has to. It's the law.

I feel what you feel,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You are simply the greatest, BRANDI.

You surprise us every single day.

This is not a test.

You have nothing to prove.

There's no one to thank but yourself.

The rest of the day, and your life, are on me.

Gratefully,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The only person you really have to make happy, BRANDI, is you.

Good thing you're so cool -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
An important reason we want to see your present dreams come true as quickly as possible, BRANDI, is because we already know a little bit about what will likely happen just beyond them.

Crazy, sexy, cool -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you only knew how many miracles you've already performed, BRANDI, nothing would ever again overwhelm you, frighten you, or seem impossible.

You are smokin’ hot,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, ever wonder why you sometimes feel like you're on top of the world?

Ever wonder why you sometimes feel safe, secure, and deeply loved?

Ever wonder why there are days when you feel invincible, unstoppable, a commander of legions in the unseen?

Actually, Your Highness, I often wonder why you don't always have those feelings.

Impressed beyond belief,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Be careful what you wish for, BRANDI, not just because you might get it, but because in the wishing you may reinforce its absence in your life.

Better to give a great, BIG "Yeehaa! Thank you! Whoohooo!" in advance for having already received it, and act as if you already have.

Whoohoooo!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Far be it from me, BRANDI, to ask about your personal life. Besides, I already know it like the back of my hand.

But could you stand a bit more "vroom-vroom"? A little more laughter? Some "high-fives," "oh-yeahs," and slow motion knuckle-to-knuckle greetings from buddies, admirers, and fans?

Hubba, hubba?

Then let these be what you visualize. See and feel the joy. Hear the laughter. Imagine the bank accounts. And these images will literally summon the resources, ideas, hows, and circumstances that will yield such manifestations as you move through the affairs of the world in the direction of your dreams.

10-4?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's really, really simple, BRANDI.

Love what you do (what you're now doing), and you'll become a magnet for all things good.

As if you needed the extra incentive.

“What you’re now doing,”

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In case they look at you funny, BRANDI, when you tell them of your loftiest dreams, desires, and a beautiful Create a lasting legacy, all you have to do is turn your head sideways, raise an eyebrow, and slowly say, "I… have… connections…."

Because you do.

Me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Explaining the difficult to explain, BRANDI, isn't necessary in order to otherwise know, beyond a shadow of a doubt, that love is always present, life is eternal, and I'm hanging ten, whoooo-hooooing, and conspiring on everyone's behalf.

All of your lives are proof.

I promise you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, the time has come.

The stage is set.

Nothing else has to happen.

Immortality is assured.

Your thoughts are like laser beams.

Your feelings are like kryptonite (the good kind).

Neither time, nor space, nor that which they contain will ever be the same.

You cannot fail,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Not everyone can say they're all-powerful, eternal, loved beyond imagination, and followed around by hordes of angels.

Well... yeah, actually, they can.

But the point is, BRANDI, do you?

Love,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Shaping, shifting, molding, making: What people do when they discover their imagination.

Spinning, curling, dipping, twirling: What people do when they discover their wings.

Beaming, glowing, basking, shining: What people do when they discover love.

Basking, BRANDI -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I'm soooooo excited, BRANDI! Everything's just about ready!

I've arranged for all the right players to appear at all the right times—big shots, little shots, and some absolute angels.

You aren't even going to believe who you'll soon be schmoozing with, or where.

I've lined up the necessary phone calls, emails, and chance encounters so that you'll be disposed to waves of loving, inspired thoughts precisely when you most need them.

I've calculated, literally to the billionth degree, the pivotal coincidences, happy accidents, and clutch plays that will blast you to heights previously unimagined.

I even took care of happily ever after!

So, if I may ask… How are things coming on your end?

This one cracked me up,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Y O U  A R E  A L I V E !

What else matters, BRANDI?

Alive on an emerald planet, in a paradise cloaked in matter, where right at this very moment, after a long dark night, waves are crashing at sunrise on a sparkling white sand beach.

Where two friends are meeting after years apart, and love is being rekindled.

Where someone ill is healing, and someone else, formerly teetering on the brink of a financial loss, is realizing for the first time that they've amassed enough wealth to coast for the rest of their life.

Right now someone emerging from depression is laughing so hard that their sides hurt, crying tears of joy.

Somewhere, a baby is breathing air for the first time since being taken off of her respirator.

And right now, YOU, BRANDI M REGER, are bathed in love… surrounded by miracles, second chances, and probable romances. In a Universe that's tirelessly conspiring on your behalf. A Universe that claims you as its own precious child, and that yearns to see your every dream come true.

Yours truly,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's one trick, BRANDI, to manifest exactly what you want.

It's totally another to bring about something even better.

Leave the door open,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It really is easy, BRANDI. You really are powerful. I really do love you.

You can have it all. You will live forever. And the best is yet to come.

You're already rich. There's more on the way. It's closer than you think.

There've been no mistakes. You've never been judged. And all things are playing out in your favor.

Moreover, as if all of that weren't enough, you're beautiful.

Mic drop,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Most don't realize it, BRANDI, and few stop to wonder, yet from the extremely limited perspectives afforded by your physical senses it’s impossible to know what you really, really want in material or circumstantial terms, because there is always "more" than you even know of that you could be asking.

Of course, you have ideas, and by all means you should want what you want, but as you knock on doors and turn over stones, it’s highly recommended that you perpetually think to yourself, "This or better…"

Oh yeah,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
However long it takes, however difficult it seems, or however lonely you may become, BRANDI, remember, you live in a dream world where everything can change for the better in an instant.

Especially when you've been visualizing.

Love, love -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When driving down the road of life, BRANDI, rarely do you know how good you have it until you see it in the rear-view mirror.

Which is not to suggest that you should look back now, but to remind you that where you are today is more awesome and amazing than you probably realize.

10-4,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Really and truly, BRANDI, there is only you, and more you.

Celebrate everyone,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Here, from where you call heaven, BRANDI, there's an ever-present buzz of joy amongst your followers.

"Fear means nothing to BRANDI!"

"Score! BRANDI is going to love how this plays out!"

"Look! BRANDI's getting closer to having a Create a lasting legacy!"

"Listen! BRANDI's talking to a tree!"

Yeah, lots of Create a lasting legacys… and tree fans here -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's an absolute law, BRANDI, that every challenge, fear, or loss you encounter bears gifts far more valuable than the price of the trouble they cause.

I think it's Law 123.ILY -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It doesn't take much, BRANDI, to surround yourself with good friends, good times, and big bucks.

In fact, it doesn't take anything at all.

Visualize.

For added effect, affirm.

And to really spice things up, enjoy the wait.

Tallyho, ho, ho -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
First, BRANDI, close your eyes and think of the magic. Its unlimited power. Its inescapable presence in your life.

See it bending and banking and rolling all around you. Inhale it. Exhale it. Feel it beating your heart, massaging your back, and tickling your toes; reaching out from the center of your being to every person on the planet, and beyond to every star in the heavens.

Then, intermingled with these thoughts, remember the sole reason it exists is to serve you. So see it doing just that, as images from the life of your dreams parade before your mind's eye.

Hallelujah,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's quite the paradox, BRANDI, but the more one pushes themselves into areas of discomfort—gently, just a bit, from time to time—the more comfortable they become.

And vice versa.

Thunk it, who'd of?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There's simply no such thing, BRANDI, as thinking too big.

Whoo-hoo!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There’s no scorekeeping, BRANDI.

No one owes anything to anyone, no matter what.

And from this, what I hope you get most, is that whatever you do next should be for the joy it brings you.

Rock on,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's rather challenging, BRANDI, for those here who've never experienced time and space to actually grasp how formidable you sometimes think your illusions are, because, quite frankly, they see the world around you as just more you.

Cool, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What you want, BRANDI, has no bearing on whether or not you'll get it.

It's simply a question of whether or not you can behave as if you already have it.

I got you, babe -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Today, BRANDI, you are a magnet…

for infinite abundance, divine intelligence, and unlimited love.

You were born “on,”

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes, BRANDI, the person whose life looks the easiest has had it the hardest, but they're just really good at not dwelling on the past, keeping busy in the moment, and rolling "like that."

And I know you know what I mean.

Proud like a farmer in the spring after it rains,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Dreams are like that, BRANDI… Most of the time you don't even know how close you are until after they've come true.

Sometimes, even, the very day before they come true, it still feels like they're a million miles away.

Something to remember.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Today, BRANDI, you will be challenged.

Challenged by the illusions. Tempted to look to time, space, and all things material for understanding; to judge your place in the world; and to make decisions about your life.

Fight it.

Go within.

You're more than your manifestations.

You're alive for greater things.

The truth lies within you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Q: BRANDI, what would you call a world where each challenge bears gifts, your enemies are ancient friends in disguise, and by simply pretending your dreams have already come true, mountains are moved?

A: Earth.

Too easy?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, wherever you are drawn, go!

It's usually just me talking to you.

And the way you can be certain it's me is that both your head and your heart will agree.

Oh how I love you -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The greatest secret of all, BRANDI, is how deeply you're loved.

You have no idea.

Always, no matter what -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I'm entering a new phase of magnificence, BRANDI.

Will you join me?

Tell your peeps, #whoohoo!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you wondered yet, BRANDI, whether or not what I have dreamt for you might exceed what you have dreamt for yourself?

And whether or not anything can stop my dreams from coming true?

Yeah,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Life, BRANDI, is purely an adventure into seeing how much bigger one can think.

And therefore love.

Big, big -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Maybe it's just me, BRANDI, but I kind of thought that to be alive in a world where every single moment of every single day birds fly, dolphins twirl, flowers bloom, snow falls, waves wave, rainbows rise, and antelopes… do whatever antelopes do would forever silence doubters, inspire dreamers, and fill one's soul with absolute rapture.

What do antelopes do?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you have any idea, BRANDI, of how powerful you REALLY are?

Do you have any idea of how far your thoughts reach?

Do you have any idea of how many lives you've already touched?

Do you have any idea of how much you've already accomplished?

Do you?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
All you have to do, BRANDI, is think about what you want often enough that you start talking about it and moving with it, even if you have to fake it.

BRANDI, your job is simple. Even if you only "attempt" to do it, you will have done it. The slightest effort on your side is leveraged 10,000 times on my side. A nod, a wink, a whisper are sometimes all I need; a demonstration that breaks the ice, beginning a domino effect of happy "accidents" and "coincidences."

If you do this, I'll do the rest. It is that easy. We are that powerful. Life is that magical.

Thinking of your smile,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if, BRANDI, your greatest success in this lifetime is to come from a completely unexpected direction?

And what if it will be made possible because you followed your heart in all of the expected fields?

Have you considered that?

It's all for you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, you are exactly as you now are—with your every mannerism, challenge, and trait; skill, talent, and strength—because before this life began, at the height of your glory, with full awareness of your divinity, reach, and magnificence, you knew best the choices that would maximize this adventure. Bad hair and all.

Trust yourself, BRANDI. You chose superbly, and though you may not see it yet, you've already mustered the courage you had to muster, faced the fears you had to face, braved the storms, fought the battles, and exceeded every expectation you ever had for being the kind of person you hoped you'd be.

Just tickles me pink,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Impatience is a sign that one has temporarily forgotten, BRANDI, to behave at all times as if their dreams have already come true.

You know, in case someone asks.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Where there is pain, there will be strength.

Where there is sadness, there will be wisdom.

And where there is fear, BRANDI, there will be renewal.

We learn from you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Hey, BRANDI, you already know this, but it’s worth a fresh look…

Those who seem to deserve your love the least, BRANDI, need it the most.

It's all about love,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It won't matter that 10,000 doors might be slammed in your face, BRANDI, because when door number 10,001 flies open, revealing pathways of jade and gardens of love with flowers dancing, fountains sparkling, friends blushing, moonbeams glowing, and abundance abounding, you'll completely forget about all the other doors.

Happens all the time,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Little tiny dreams, BRANDI, require little tiny thoughts and little tiny steps.

Great big dreams require great big thoughts and little tiny steps.

Do I paint a clear picture?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Inquiring minds want to know, BRANDI:

Have you ever felt so down you wondered whether or not you'd bounce back?

Were you later surprised by how quickly you did bounce back?

And then were you surprised by how far you went?

Did you promise you'd never forget how amazing you are?

We did.

In awe,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The wiser one gets, BRANDI, the younger they appear.

The power of a smile,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Struggling, BRANDI, trying to physically manipulate the circumstances of one's life, reveals a misunderstanding of how circumstances are actually created. And for the focus placed on them during the struggle, it actually serves to prevent things from changing.

Acceptance, on the other hand, reveals an understanding that today's circumstances arose from yesterday's focus, encouraging introspection and fueling new thought, actually serving to hasten change.

Yeah, sounds like an SAT question.

Score,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Can you imagine living in a world, BRANDI, where paying too much, giving too much, and trusting too much would all inevitably make you more?

Yeah, right, that's how this whole business began.

Your move,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When someone is so eager to have what they want to have, do what they want to do, or be who they want to be, BRANDI, that they'd rather take little, tiny, teensy steps in the direction of their dreams than face one more single day of doing without, I just can't help but open the floodgates.

It's my greatest weakness.

We bad,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I am always there. I am always helping. I never leave you.

I was there yesterday, BRANDI. And every day before that.

I'm with you now, and I'll be there every day that ever follows.

Where else am I going?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Why wouldn't everything in your life start getting much, much easier?

Why wouldn't those things you now fear, BRANDI, dissolve into dust?

Why wouldn't the rest of your life be the best of your life?

I mean, you've NEVER been as awesome, or wise, or deserving as you are today.

Huh? Huh? Huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Just a reminder, BRANDI, in case you forgot, in case you've thought otherwise, or in case you never knew…

There is nothing you can't have.

There is nothing you can't do.

There is nothing you can't be.

Okay?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, it is easy.

Just once a day, imagine the life you dream of. Believe that it can be yours in this world of magic and miracles. Choose to live as if you know of its inevitable manifestation. Don't compromise. Don't worry. Don't look for results. And as surely as spirit crafts one moment after another, so too will it fuse together the life you now lead with the life of your dreams as if they were two pieces of a jigsaw puzzle, destined to become one.

This alone determines what's "meant to be."

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, think of your life today, just as it is, just where you are.

Now think of where you want to go, what you want to do, and who you want to be.

Do you realize that getting from here to there is not something you can do without me?

And do you also realize that it's not something I can do without you?

Symbiotically,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's so tempting, BRANDI, to look at your present life situation, at whom you're with, at where you work, at what you have and have not, and think to yourself, "This was obviously meant to be… I'm here for a reason."

And, to a degree, you'd be right. But you are where you are because of the thoughts you used to (and may still) think, and so you are where you are to learn that this is how life works—not because it was meant to be.

Nothing is meant to be, BRANDI, except for your freedom to choose and your power to create.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Of all your lifetimes, BRANDI, do you know which ones you'll look back on with the fondest memories, the most pride, and the widest grin?

The ones where in spite of challenges, no matter how daunting, difficult, or painful, you pressed on.

Like a Cheshire cat,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sure, BRANDI, you can do less and have more once enlightened… but when your moment of transcendence finally arrives, and at last you realize that the world spins in your very hand, your thoughts literally become things, and there's truly nothing you can't do, be, or have… who would want to do less?

Have at it, Grasshopper -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Fear always goes away, BRANDI, once two things are realized:

First, you're a spiritual being.

Second, nothing can ever be lost or taken from a spiritual being that cannot be recreated; not pride, money, or love.

Phew!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, while someone might choose to face lack, disease, and adversity in their life, it would never be their "destiny."

These are just your own strategically placed hurdles that will sooner teach you to fly.

Fly little bird,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, when you can say, without doubt or equivocation, that "My life today is entirely the result of my prior decisions, focus, and understandings," I can then say, without doubt or equivocation, that “It's only a matter of time before your every cup is overflowing.”

Ain't life grand?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if suddenly, BRANDI, in a flash of fire and light, you got "it"!

And among other things, you suddenly understood, without a doubt, the creative power of your word.

Do you think you'd ever again utter, "it's hard," "it's not working," "something's wrong with me," or "I don't know"?

You got "it"!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's kind of like everyone's now in the winner's circle of the Universe, BRANDI, living in time and space upon the crown jewel of all creation, planet Earth. And that they earned this right through various and assorted unremembered heroics in another realm of reality.

But now, having forgotten this, instead of rejoicing at the glory of their bounty, indulging in the dance of life, and thriving with dominion over all things, they begin noticing who lives in a bigger house, drives a newer car, or has the coolest cell phone. Forgetting, even, that their simple presence in this bastion of order, beauty, and perfection is a far greater accomplishment than anything that might subsequently happen upon it.

We’re already so proud of you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's not as if the currents of life must be studied, examined, charted, explained, plied, or channeled, BRANDI, in order to be effortlessly ridden upon.

Besides, you'd get soaked.

Get it?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Often, BRANDI, the very most spiritual thing one can do is get busy.

Physically busy. Hoeing, chopping, planting. Connecting, moving, grooving. Dipping, swirling, twirling.

Especially dipping, swirling, twirling.

2, 3, 4 -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, here's a little trick to get the ball rolling.

Ask yourself, "What's the most fun I could have with my life, as it is now, before those big dreams of mine come true?"

Then do it.

A lot.

The next thing you know, those big dreams will come true.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It hasn't always been this easy being the Universe, BRANDI. Before you came along, I was a lot less.

Before you came along, there was no one who ever thought like you now think. No one who ever felt what you now feel. And what I treasure most, no one who's ever possessed your view of reality.

And all of these things have been added unto me.

Thank you, BRANDI, you've done enough. You are enough.

I am so pleased, you have no idea.

With gratitude and adoration,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It takes a spiritual person, BRANDI, to accept full responsibility for their own happiness.

It takes a spiritual giant to accept full responsibility for their own unhappiness.

Be the person you seek.

Fee-Fi-Foe-Fum,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, your thoughts become things.

The things and events of your life.

And there are no mitigating factors, no maybes, no sometimes.

It's an absolute law.

You are me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's impossible to be afraid, BRANDI, when you dwell in truth.

Cool,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Always remember, BRANDI, when it comes to climbing mountains, slaying dragons, or just plain getting what you want, you've got a built-in, double-secret advantage:

You're supernatural.

Shhhhhh… it’s a secret -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, do you want to know what the single toughest thing about figuring out time and space is? About finally making progress by leaps and bounds? The one thing that would heal every broken heart and vanquish every emotional pain? That would clear the way for infinite abundance, perfect health, and unlimited happiness?

Not relying on appearances.

Just stop it.

You so can,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In all things, BRANDI, always and forever, simply wish the best for all involved, without stating what you think that is.

And then, whatever does happen, no matter what happens, know that it was.

All the best,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Crowds are starting to gather, BRANDI. Angels are starting to whisper. Smiles are starting to broaden. And trust me, it has nothing to do with the Create a lasting legacy that's right now being secretly drawn to you… not a thing.

Shhhhhhhhhhhhh…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you have any idea how many princesses have gone unrecognized by their prince because of logic? Or how many princes have gone unrecognized by their princess because of pride?

How many dreams were dashed when the handmaiden answered the door? Or when the gatehouse was mistaken for the mansion? Or when the calm before the storm of abundance and good fortune was viewed as a sign to retreat?

Happily, BRANDI, we've got forever and ever. And fortunately, it's never too late to see what one's missed, remain focused on the dream instead of the hows, and move with unwavering faith.

Amen,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's not that folks act a certain way around you, BRANDI, but rather that you attract certain types of folks based upon your thoughts, beliefs, and expectations.

Now that is really, really good news. Huh?

Like attracts like,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you know why koalas are so cute, BRANDI? Why ospreys dance in flight? Why cheetahs run so fast? Arctic terns fly so far? Flowers smell so good? Blueberries taste so blue?

Butterflies flit? Parrots talk? Whales sing? And doves coo?

Because I was having fun… which is my greatest wish for you.

You can,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, I have it on good account that you will soon be called a number of inflammatory names…

Lucky, blessed, chosen, gifted, destined, favored, special, and perhaps, most outrageously, "not like the rest of us."

Let's give them something to talk about.

Like me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
One of my favorite things about time and space, BRANDI, is that absolutely NOTHING can ever happen there that can't be seen as the blessing it is.

Perspective rules,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Actually, BRANDI, it's not that most people don't have much and just want a little.

It's that they have it all and just want a little.

Want it all,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Having a dream... Courage.

Visualizing your dream... Persistence.

Physically moving towards your dream... Guts.

Letting go of the "cursed hows"... Wisdom.

The look on your friends’ faces, BRANDI, when they see you on the red carpet… Priceless.

Yeah, that oughta light a fire -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Would it be as much fun, BRANDI, if you never stopped laughing? If there were never any clouds? If you were never challenged? If you were never alone? If you never heard the whole truth when it hurt? If you always knew what would happen, what to do, and where to go?

Or would you be like, "Beam me up, Bro!"

Yep,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Today, we're going to make manifesting dreams really, really easy, BRANDI.

There.

Now you just go have a ball.

We love you so much,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
BRANDI, how much longer before you revel in the awareness that you are enough, that you've done enough, and that you're now worthy of your heart's greatest desires? What has to happen for you to give this to yourself?

No biggie. Just wondering. Take your time.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Isn't it wild, BRANDI?

I mean, in time and space you get to experience what you think, think what you want, and want what you don't have.

Yet so few visualize.

Think about it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
These are the times, BRANDI—when hopes are dashed and chaos abounds—that golden opportunities, prized ideas, and new friends emerge, to be seen by the few who look.

Let's go crazy,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Think not of "how," BRANDI, but only of what you want in terms of its end result.

The end, in thought, combined with baby steps in its general direction, will literally create the necessary circumstances, serendipities, players, epiphanies, ideas, and stories necessary to bring about your desire.

The hard part is done for you.

Your part is the easy part,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Anyone watching you, BRANDI?

Good. This is a double-secret exercise.

Pretend you just received a phone call with wonderful, mind-blowing, life-changing news!

As you end the call, your arms fly up over your head with joy. Pumping fists, then waving palms, like you just crossed a finish line before throngs of adoring fans. You cover your face with your hands trying to contain the euphoria, but it doesn't work, so you reach for the sky again while shaking your head in disbelief. You're grinning, crying, and just so happy! YES! Life is awesome and you feel so grateful!

Got it?

Now if someone catches you doing this, just tell 'em it was your pet psychic who called, and they'll forget everything they just saw.

XXOO,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Really and truly, BRANDI, having, doing, and being require so little when you visualize them already done.

So little,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Possessing the audacity to do the mundane, BRANDI, while expecting miracles to come from it, explains every heroic and supernatural feat known to humankind.

Audaciously,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Always, BRANDI, when you just don't know what you want, want happiness; and when you just don't know what to do, do anything.

You may begin,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Owner's Manual for a Life within Time and Space

Package Contents:

1. Thinker (BRANDI M REGER)

2. Magical Universe with unyielding principles

Instructions:

1. Think about desired manifestation in its final form (end result).

2. Physically follow hunches, instincts, and intuition—enabling movement in the direction of final form.

Expected Results:

Manifestation will slip into Thinker's life when least expected, via so-called coincidences and accidents, unless contradictory thoughts are entertained.

Manufacturer's Note:

Believing in the necessities of blood, sweat, and tears, OR sacrifice, worthiness, and years may severely impede the manifestation process, as will worrying about the "hows and means" of attaining desired final form. Additionally, as long as Thinker consistently and perpetually physically moves as outlined, contradictory thoughts will be mitigated and weakened. In other words, as long as you keep doing your part, you needn't worry that you sometimes worry.

Guaranteed results,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you were to ask me, BRANDI, I'd probably say that the number one cause of loneliness in time and space is not a lack of friends but a lack of keeping busy.

I'd even go so far as to say that nine out of ten times the solution to every crisis, challenge, or problem—in relationships, careers, or otherwise—is to get busy.

Because when you get busy, you allow me to slide whatever you most need—be it material, spiritual, or a new friend; answers, ideas, or comfort—right under your pretty nose.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Are you so sure it's not the dancer who creates the music she moves to? Or the painter who manifests the mountains he captures? Or the tycoon who builds the empire before there's a dime?

Whatever you want, BRANDI, let it exist first in your mind, imagine every nuance and consideration, let the walls have substance, the halls have depth, and the money have weight in the palm of your hand, and then whatever’s necessary to bring it to pass will be drawn unto you.

Sneaky, clever, foxy, wry -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, when you take care of the inches, I'll take care of the miles.

Your move,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You can make anything happen, Brandi.

After all, who do you think put the stars in the sky?

Who do you think teaches each bird to fly?

And who do you think I mean when I say, "Me, myself, and I"?

Life, good –

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Of course it's true, Brandi, everyone's born with a gift. One that will allow them to fill a special place in the Universe that absolutely no one else can fill. A blessing that makes all other blessings pale in comparison. A gift of incalculable value to the entire world when it's uncovered, explored, and embraced.

Yours?

Being Brandi Reger.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
As if, Brandi, you weren't among the most important people who have ever lived.

Bowing before greatness,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
10,000 "I love yous” each morning.

10,000 "I miss yous" at noon.

10,000 "You rocks" every evening.

And 10,000 "Sweet dreams, see you soon."

Just a smattering, Brandi, of what we see hitting your “inbox” here on any given day.

Can you feel 'em?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
To all those who might ever doubt the power I have to make their fondest dreams a reality, their greatest hopes manifest, and their most outrageous thoughts become things... I ask:

Have you pondered eternity lately? Did you know there are 10 sextillion stars (not to mention planets)? Have you looked into a mirror and seen the glint in your eye, the tint of your skin, or the warmth of your smile?

This is how I roll.

Pass it on, Brandi -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Expecting and preparing for their very best behavior—in terms of respect, love, kindness, and wing-a-ding-dong—guarantees nothing, Brandi. But it does maximize your chances of getting it.
