And if you don't insist that such behavior come from a specific person, I’ll find those who’ll meet your standards, to give you some pretty choices.

I know people,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Best case scenario, Brandi, you really are a magnificent, powerful, divine Being of Light; your thoughts really do become things; nothing is impossible; your dreams are meant to be; and these Notes really are from an ancient, wise, all-loving, all-knowing best friend.

Worst case scenario, Brandi, you're only dreaming you're a magnificent, powerful, divine Being of Light; your thoughts really do become things; nothing is impossible; your dreams are meant to be; and these Notes really are from an ancient, wise, all-loving, all-knowing best friend.

And the difference would be?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There's at least one in every crowd, Brandi...

Someone who loves you.

Besides me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, you've already paid your dues.

In fact, you've overpaid.

It's time you called in some of your wildest dreams.

They’re already fully paid for,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you can understand, dear Brandi, that the greatest obstacles between you and the life of your dreams are actually imaginary—a product of your mind alone, fiction—I do believe we'll blow the wheels off this popsicle stand.

"Push-Ups" for everyone,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Arms up and out, half bent, hands just above head level, facing your peeps, twirling them in a queen-like circular fashion.

Now smile serenely. Subtly sway to the left, then to the right. Keep with it, back and forth. Don't stop with your hands.

Now mix in a gentle bob, up and down, leaning back and forth...

That's right, Brandi, good.

At your discretion, you might get a little carried away and add a little, "Whoohooooo, Whoohoooo!" as you sway, broadening your smile.

Yes.

Now, just 10 seconds of this, 10 seconds, even when feeling blue, will always lift your spirits. Your spirits will summon ancient friends. And your friends will lift you higher into the light.

Works every time.

From your ancient friends,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Everything you give, Brandi, you get back, times seven.

Plus, what you give, grows, times seven.

Plus plus, there's a little-known spiritual algorithm that states whenever love is added to the giving, a meaningful career draws ever closer to the giver.

Whoa!

I give it all to you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There's a reason you chose Earth, Brandi, exactly when you did, as exactly who you are, with those already in your life and those who soon will be: to be an example, to shine your light, and to give hope.

Yeah, you were needed, Brandi… super bad.

Kind of obvious now, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A little heads up on an addiction that afflicts all really old souls, Brandi:

Giving love, eventually, becomes an even greater need than receiving love.

Love,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, you are the one who was sent to make a difference, to be a bridge, to light the way, by living the truths that have been revealed to you, so that others might do the same.

So now you know why you've always seen the world so differently than others.

To help,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you sit and get really quiet, Brandi, fully expecting your answer, it has to come.

Guaranteed,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There's nothing you've ever done, Brandi, that I haven't significantly done for you.

Not buttoning up your shirt, not brushing your teeth, not finishing your sentences. Not your first job, not your last job, not the friends you've made in between. Not the money you've earned, not the money you've spent, not the home you now live in.

Your part was the simple part. You thought of what you wanted done and you willed yourself to move, which was all I needed to orchestrate more miracles than there are stars in the night sky. Flexing your muscles, spinning your sentences, infusing you with inspiration, and weaving circumstances and players together. All so that you could physically experience the vision you held onto and moved with.

I say we keep it that way.

Keep moving,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, haven't you always found your way?

Hasn't there always been a light in the darkness?

Haven't you always gotten back up?

Haven't there always been serendipitous surprises, unexpected twists, and triumphant comebacks?

And haven't you always had someone to love?

Coincidences? Or maybe, do you think, you, too, have always been loved?

Yours,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When in a hurry, Brandi, step #1 for changing the entire world is falling in love with it as it already is.

Same for changing yourself.

You like?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, has it occurred to you that you could ask for more?

Not just more than what you now have, but more than you're now asking for?

This is why we’re HOT,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When you begin to find love, Brandi, in people and places where you haven't found it before, it's always because you've grown.

You so rock,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you have any idea, Brandi, of how many fans you have here in the unseen?

Students, far and wide? Admirers, near and far? Friends from other dimensions and other times?

Do you know what they talk about the most when your name comes up?

Besides your French toast?

Besides your saunter?

Besides your home here with the holiday lights you leave up year-round, the roaming wildebeests in the backyard, and the answering machine that says, "Off having the time of my life in the jungles of time and space…"?

Your belief in the goodness of others.

10,000 Kisses,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When you raise the bar, Brandi, I jump higher.

Let’s do this,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
An unmistakable trait of every true genius, Brandi, is their persistent awareness of how much more there is to know.

And an unmistakable trait of every true sage is their persistent awareness of how much more there is to love.

Loving you more today than yesterday,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Actually, Brandi, smiling or laughing for no reason at all is one of the best reasons to smile or laugh.

Because doing either turns wheels in the unseen, rearranges players in your life, and summons reason after reason after reason.

Grins,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Accidents, coincidences, and serendipities don't create dreams, Brandi.

Your dreams create them.

Dream away,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A little workshop on amassing wealth and abundance:

Think abundantly.

Thought is the greatest investment vehicle of all time—no matter what’s happening within any economy. Thoughts have their own economy, and now is a super-great time to get in on the ground floor. I can take most any old invisible thought of yours and turn it into a mine of gold, a mountain of cash, or a well of prosperity.

The best is yet to come, Brandi. Invest in yourself, think wisely, follow your hunches, and live the life of your dreams.

Right about now,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Got any good ideas for this week, Brandi?

I'm thinking that anything can happen.

But, then, of course, it's not about what I think.

You're up,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you just whistle every now and then, Brandi; skip every thousandth step or so; skim the odd stone across the odd pond; go dancing on the occasional blue moon, if only alone in the dark; dress up sometimes, even with nowhere to go…

For simply stirring up some little bit of hope, no matter how silly or disconnected your actions seem to be with the rest of the world, magic flashes in the unseen, friends are summoned, connections are timed, stars are aligned, opportunities are crystallized, and serendipities are calculated, creating possibilities for new realities that cannot now even be imagined from where you presently stand.

Shazaam…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I wish I could tell you, Brandi, how beautiful life really is, how safe you always are, and of the love that constantly bathes you.

How powerful you are, how much you can have, and of the glories that await.

Of the perfection, the magic, and the infinite possibilities that fill your every day.

But you made me promise, “no matter what,” to let you discover these things for yourself.

Spiritual gangsta',

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Funny, Brandi, most folks "there" are waiting for a sign of sorts from folks "here," before they make a move, take action, or commit.

Same "here."

Let this be your sign,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The opportunity to find happiness dances within every moment, beats within every heart, and grooves within every occurrence, situation, and event.

Yet, Brandi, it's amazing how many lifetimes it usually takes for someone to "get down on it" and pump up the volume.

Feel it?

All day long,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Don't forget, Brandi, to put a picture of yourself in your scrapbook or on your vision board!

I'd hate to deliver your new meaningful career to the wrong person.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The only way to get what you really want is to know what you really want.

The only way to know what you really want is to know yourself.

The only way to know yourself is to be yourself.

And the only way to be yourself, Brandi, is to listen to your heart.

I do,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Often, Brandi, the sooner you can be happy without "it," the sooner you will be happy with "it."

Boom,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Fascinating, isn't it, Brandi, how there are those who decide upon living in abundance, and the next thing you know, they're swimming in it.

There are those who think about being more creatively fulfilled, and as if by magic, all the right steps, connections, and inspirations present themselves.

And then there are those who simply want more friends, laughter, and song, and their life becomes a celebration.

Mind you, I didn't say everyone. Some want these things, they even want them real "bad," but they simply don't put themselves within my reach by physically preparing the way, acting "as if," or "buying the shoes."

Buy the shoes, Brandi -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
This year, Brandi, will not be just another year.

It's the absolute richest I've ever imagined, with the most possibilities I've ever offered, for the coolest people I've ever known to do the greatest things ever done.

Set the bar high,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, please don't let the wisdom you seek or the changes you wish to manifest be driven by feelings that you're somehow flawed, weak, or lacking. Because your ability to imagine change in spite of the illusions that surround you and move toward it without even knowing "how" your kingdom will come is the hallmark of perfection, strength, and divinity.

As if crazy, sexy, cool wasn't already enough -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Of course, not everyone understands you, Brandi.

It takes crazy to know crazy.

It takes sexy to know sexy.

And most assuredly, it takes cool to know cool.

Yeah, uh-huh, alright -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Actually, Brandi, everyone is reasonable.

They just have their own reasons.

And usually it's worth trying to learn what they are to maximize chances of a full-blown, 60's style, psychedelic lovefest. Which is always a good thing.

Groovy you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I can imagine that from your perspective, it must seem like some truly awful things happen in time and space. So, if you wouldn't mind, I'd like to weigh in.

Brandi, you live in a world of illusions. A world that springs from a much deeper and far greater reality. And while at times the illusions are indeed ugly, with your physical senses you only see the tip of the iceberg. If you could see the whole, you'd discover that the unpleasantness was only the tiniest piece of a most spectacular puzzle that was created with order, intelligence, and absolute love. You'd see that contrary to appearances, in the grandest scheme of things, nothing is ever lost, no one becomes less, and setbacks are always temporary. And you'd understand that no matter what has happened, everyone lives again, everyone laughs again, and everyone loves again, even more richly than before.

Hubba, hubba -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Isn't it strange, Brandi, how once you set your gaze upon something or someone, you get to decide what you see?

Yet often folks still think "it" or "they" have something to do with their reaction?

I see you happy, healthy, and wise, Brandi. Fabulously wealthy, too.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Perhaps the very best thing that happens to souls who are suddenly overwhelmed by torrents of financial abundance is that they start working simply for the fun of it.

Hey, Brandi! You can already do that!

I got your back,

The Universe

messages.subject: A New Year Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You know, Brandi, if I were you, every time I put on a garment—pair of shoes, or gloves, or a T-shirt—I'd say something really nice to your body.

But that's just me.

I mean, you did kind of "luck out." Huh?

Yeee-haa,

The Universe

messages.subject: A New Year Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I want you to know, Brandi, that I've ordered up another year for you.

Think I'll call it 2023.

I'm going to put most of the same people from 2022 in it, since you all think so much alike. But there'll also be a few new, very cool cats coming to play—give them some time to grow up though.

And I'm going to have things start off pretty much exactly where they left off in 2022, for continuity's sake. Flips folks out too much when I don't.

All in all, 365 more days in paradise… and only one request of you:

DREAM BIGGER.

Coolio?

Let's do this,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you think it would be cheating, Brandi, knowing all that I know, if I placed a bet on your inevitable happiness, success, and saunter?

Good. Because I have. It was called the "Big Bang," and every moment of every day I walk in your shoes.

Brandi, I knew what I was doing,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You might not always see it, Brandi, but everything, always, plays to a greater good…

Things keep on getting better and better…

And you're already the kind of person you once dreamed you'd become.

All choked up,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, soon the new year starts, so now's a great time to:

1. Wipe the slate clean.

2. Focus upon what you really want.

3. Chart your course.

Or is that a bit old school? Feels tiring? Ugh!

How about an adventurous alternative:

1. Give thanks that your life is exactly as it is.

2. Decide that 2023 will be the happiest year of your life yet.

3. Every day, follow your heart and instincts down new paths.

This will be your year, Brandi -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
All right, Brandi, for a moment I want you to think of the life you always dreamed you’d have. I mean the real deal… the one with fabulous wealth, extreme health, laughter, friends, and, maybe, a personal chef named Hans. Plus, helping others. Giving. Sharing. Leading. Yeah, that life.

Now isn’t it funny how easy it is to forget about that life when we focus on just a few goals?

Don’t get me wrong, goals can be awesome, but to a degree most goals are part of the "hows" that will get you to an even bigger picture, right? Yet, when life hits a little turbulence and a specific goal seems so, so far away… if you’ve been thinking of it as "how" everything else will happen, you’ll suddenly feel powerless.

The real deal, Brandi, your rocking life, is not contingent upon having any single manifestation. Your rocking life is only contingent upon your ability to keep focused upon the big picture, in spite of everything else.

Want it all,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Every problem, challenge, or issue, Brandi, shows up in your life with three questions:

But you really only have to answer the first one.

Just in case you ever have an issue -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Holiday Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If it's not yet obvious to you, the real reason for this, and all seasons, is you, Brandi. A more perfect child of the Universe has never lived. Until now, only celebrations cloaked in myth and mystery could hint at your divine heritage and sacred destiny. You are life's prayer of becoming and its answer. The first light at the dawn of eternity, drawn from the ether, so that I might know my own depth, discover new heights, and revel in seas of blessed emotion.

A pioneer into illusion, an adventurer into the unknown, and a lifter of veils. Courageous, heroic, and exalted by legions in the unseen.

To give beyond reason, to care beyond hope, to love without limit; to reach, stretch, and dream, in spite of your fears. These are the hallmarks of divinity—traits of the immortal—your badges of honor. May you wear them with a pride as great as what we feel for you.

Your light has illuminated darkened paths, your gaze has lifted broken spirits, and already your life has changed the course of history.

This is the time of year we celebrate Brandi Reger.

Bowing before Greatness,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, it's time you step forward to claim all that you want from life.

Just remember, however, the gatekeeper who will give it to you is the same gatekeeper who has kept it from you, gorgeous.

Good thing you’re always getting smarter -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Know everyone by their good traits, Brandi.

Your heart is opening,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Anything you could ever hope that I might one day do for you, Brandi, is something you can begin doing for yourself today, making the whole thing happen about 7,000 times faster.

But that's just if you're in a hurry,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
To think what you have not yet thought, Brandi, is your real work.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, I'm hungry.

Hungry for adventure.

The adventure of love.

Tell you what: The more you give of it today to the least deserving on your list, the more your life will change.

Cowabunga,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Remember the joy you used to feel when you'd find a quarter in the street?

And how exciting it was when you got older to find a crumpled $20 bill in the pocket of a pair of jeans you hadn't worn in months?

Well, brace yourself, Brandi, because the day isn't far off when between catnaps, swimming laps, or happy dancing, you'll be busy gathering documents for your tax return preparer and suddenly find a statement to a bank account you don't even remember opening, with more than enough money in it to do whatever your heart now longs to do, probably twice.

You do trip us out.

Sure enough,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, many are waiting for their life to take off.

Who's going to tell them that this could be their problem?

Tallyho, go, go -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Don't you think "fabulous” and “wealth” are two words that should always be used together, Brandi?

I do.

After all, everything begins with thought, thought is pure spirit, and you get to decide what’s fabulous or not.

Give it a try,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi!!! If I had seams, they'd burst. Limits, they'd shatter. Doubts, they'd vanish. Tears, they'd dry. Worries, they'd be gone. Because I, your faithful servant and doting guardian, who hears your innermost thoughts, who walks in your shoes, and who lingers in your breath, can hardly contain the joy I feel over who you've become.

Of course, you have little idea of what I'm talking about, but you will. And trust me, you'll be overwhelmed, too.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Actually, Brandi, it's pretty simple.

You have one real choice: To do your best, with what you have, from where you are.

Everything else is just stalling.

See you at the ball,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Oh sure, dreaming is the easy part! Thinking the shiny, sexy, happy thoughts. And so are the baby steps; moving with your dream.

The hard part, Brandi, is… well, actually, choosing words that imply you're on your way is pretty easy, too… pretending is easy… gratitude, easy… finding stuff to be happy about, easy.

Help me, Brandi. What's supposed to be the hard part?

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Happiness isn't a crop that you harvest when your dreams come true.

It's more like the fertilizer, Brandi, that makes them come true faster.

No bull,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you noticed, Brandi, how all dreams come with built-in challenges, and all challenges come with built-in dreams?

Curious, huh?

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you were to give a speech to ten thousand angels, Brandi, who were about to embark on their very first life in the jungles of time and space, do you think they'd furiously hang on to your every word, or would they be far too star-struck to even know what you were saying?

Yeah, the latter.

It was a nice idea though,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Ask, Brandi. Ask for whatever you want.

Ask for help. Ask for clarity. Ask for insight.

We're always here. You're always answered. 10,000 strong to do your will.

OK?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
One of the most comforting thoughts of all, Brandi, is knowing that all roads lead "home."

Even more comforting is understanding that you never left.

From all of us "back" home,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
However do you do it, Brandi? You know, talk and make such sense? Walk and not fall down? Ask and then know the answer? Aim and then deliver? Show up on time? Always get by? Make just enough?

You don't know how, do you?

Haven't got a clue.

And that's exactly how.

You leave the "hows" to Me, as you simply focus upon and move towards your desired end results.

You got this,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When in doubt, Brandi, show up early.

Think less. Feel more.

Ask once. Give thanks often.

Expect the best.

Appreciate everything.

Never give up.

Make it fun.

Lead. Invent. Regroup.

Wink. Chill. Smile.

And live as if your success was inevitable, and so it shall be.

Happy global domination,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In both relationships and life, Brandi, trust begets trust.

Generosity begets generosity.

Love begets love.

Be the spark, especially when it's dark.

Hubba, hubba -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, pop quiz time!

Q: How do you find love, health, abundance, and enlightenment?

A: Stop searching and start seeing what's been there all along.

Star on the forehead,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Every life is heroic, Brandi.

And yours has certainly been no exception.

With deep gratitude from the bleachers,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Could one be too grateful, Brandi?

Hmmmm...

Is there such a thing as too much abundance?

No way, José -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
To touch someone with kindness, Brandi, is to change someone forever.

Heavy, huh? That's nothing.

Because for everyone you touch, you also reach everyone they will ever know. And everyone they will ever know. And everyone they will ever know. And so, for the rest of all time, your kindness will be felt, in waves that will spread, long after you move on.

Muchas gracias,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If, once upon a time in your life, Brandi, suddenly and without warning, an event, a person, or some unexpected good news changed everything for the better, it can only mean one thing…

Chances are astronomically high it will happen again.

I'm just sayin' -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The time will come when you'll see that pretty much everything was better than you thought. That life was more beautiful, people were kinder, greens were greener, and the sky was cleaner.

But most of all, Brandi, you'll see that you were simply stunning, every day of your life.

Happily, I've always known -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Quantum Physics 101:

101.1 The present is defined by a confluence of your thoughts, Brandi, inspired or regulated by your beliefs.

101.2 Your beliefs can be changed, upgraded, or banished by choosing new thoughts.

101.3 The future becomes the present when your expectations evolve.

101.4 Time measures how much effort you require to change your thoughts.

101.5 Space shows exactly what you're now thinking.

101.6 And therein we find the unifying equation of every reality: Thoughts Become Things (TBT). Which is all you really need to know.

TBT,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Embrace criticism, Brandi... whether from the wise or from fools.

Never have words been uttered that didn't have meaning to those who’ve heard them.

How’s that for stopping you in your tracks?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You know, Brandi, if it wasn't for the fact that everyone can think as they please and feel as they choose, with a lifetime of back-to-back manifestation stories, I, too, might even think that life was hard, short, and unfair, instead of easy, breezy, Parcheesi.

Empirically yours,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Yes, Brandi, you can have whatever you want. ANYTHING you can imagine. You name it. It's yours. Done deal.

You just have to go get it, once you’re done imagining it. K?

I'll help,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Visualizing for Beginners...

For those who want convenient parking spaces, unexpected gifts, or chance encounters with cool people:

First, think. Second, let go.

Visualizing for the Illuminated...

For those who want a healing touch, world peace, or a new meaningful career:

First, think. Second, let go.

We're there for you, Brandi -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You know that feeling, Brandi, of accomplishment, triumph, and sublime joy that immediately follows a job well done, a victory, or a fresh, hot pizza delivery to your door?

I say feel it now.

Go on. Give it to yourself without all the rules.

Your boss,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, as part of this week's celebrations, I'm going to share a little secret with you.

Actually, I should have shared it with you ages ago, but most "people" aren't ready for this kind of secret. It's the secret to getting anything, absolutely anything you want. To magnetizing into your life the things, emotions, and circumstances you dream of. It explains how masters become masters and adepts become adepts. And it'll finally convince you that I am always there with you to lend a hand or perform a miracle. Ready?

Practice.

Because just a little practice, Brandi, goes further than you could ever imagine.

Now fight the temptation, Brandi, to nod and shrug it off. Do something! Visualize just a little. Act with faith just a little. Explore your beliefs just a little. Manifest a little something; a phone call, a compliment, a flower, whatever.

Expect a little miracle. Expect a little help. Expect it to be easy.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, it's not possible to significantly change your life, for better or for worse, by manipulating the material world. Not by working harder, not by studying longer, not by schmoozing, not by sweating, not by fasting, not by the hair of your chinny-chin-chin.

But great change is inescapable when you first begin manipulating the world of your thoughts.

Thinking of you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You can have what you want, do what you dream, and brave what you fear, Brandi, if you first see it done in your mind.

Always works.

Always,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When you visualize a great dream of yours coming true, Brandi, what do you imagine?

Do you see yourself jumping up and down, doing a happy dance, looking to the sky, and shrieking, "THANK YOU! THANK YOU! THANK YOU!"? Do you feel the skin on your face stretch as you smile from ear to ear, or the palm of your hands sting as you slap more high-fives? Do you feel your fingers dialing your best friend's cell phone number?

Yeah, I think you should.

"Very should,"

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, does gravity make exceptions, pass judgment, or behave subjectively? Does light make exceptions, pass judgment, or behave subjectively? Does electricity make exceptions, pass judgment, or behave subjectively?

And neither does thought. Think whatever you like, Brandi, big or small, rich or poor, fair or unfair, and those thoughts will still strive to become the things and events of your life.

TBT (Thoughts Become Things)!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You want more, Brandi, and that's good, very good. More money, love, energy, laughter.

So, just remember that these "things" lie only a thought away; not a career away, not a year away, not a lucky break away, not a relationship away… just a thought away.

Okay?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, let's pretend, just for today, all day long, throughout every moment, that life is easy, that everyone means well, and that time is on our side. Okay?

And let's pretend that we are loved beyond belief, that magic conspires on our behalf, and that nothing can ever hurt us without our consent. All right?

And if we like this game, Brandi, we'll play tomorrow as well, and the next day, and the next, and pretty soon it won't be a game at all, because life, for us, will become those things. Just as it's become what it is today.

You're getting warmer,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, can you imagine the joy, the peace, the complete sense of satisfaction? The harmony, the love, and stitches of laughter? Brandi, can you imagine the interest income?!

Good, because nothing else shapes mountains, attracts people, and creates wealth quite like imagination.

Go!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Shiver me timbers, Brandi!!! For just a moment there I thought that time was real, that space was deep, and that manipulating circumstances and messing with the "hows" was the way to manifest life changes!

Talk about insanity! Chaos! Doom!

Whatever you do, Brandi, on this spookiest day of the year and beyond, don't let this happen to you.

Think, think, and let go -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Something that might add some sugar and spice to your daily comings and goings, Brandi, would be to constantly remind yourself, "I created this, because I wanted to."

Prepare to be empowered,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
No one ever regrets raising the bar, Brandi, ever, ever, ever.

Scare yourself,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You needn't worry. There’s time. You have all the time in the world.

You preceded time and you will exist beyond it. Age is irrelevant; more meaningless than a number.

Forever, Brandi, you have FOREVER. There is no dream you now have that you will not manifest. There is no challenge you now face that you will not sail beyond.

There is no point in spending one more second of your awesome, amazing life, thinking anything to the contrary.

Olé,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Never underestimate, Brandi, how many friends you have, how close you are, and how much fun you're going to have.

Because, as you've seen throughout your entire amazing life, one usually gets exactly what they've been estimating.

You thrill me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Your name is coming up again, Brandi. Whispered here, gossiped there.

It's a good thing we don't have tabloids, because your picture would be everywhere. The gist being that your love life is about to take off!

First, you're going to be falling wildly in love with who you already are, and thereby becoming an irresistible magnet to others. T-s-s-s-s!

Then, as stars are rearranged and connections are made, you're literally going to feel the fire that sparked all creation. Yeah, hot!

Finally, you're going to bathe forevermore in rays of pure ecstasy.

So... ready for step one?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Nothing is left to chance, Brandi.

The choreography of players and circumstances is plotted with mind-numbing precision. Enormous forces of attraction are activated and engaged. The odds for your inevitable success begin skyrocketing. And every second of every day is calibrated and recalibrated... for every thought you think.

Up for some visualizing?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
For what has been an eternity, Brandi, dwelling in the vastness of the unseen, I've been preparing for these very moments…

You waking up to the truth of your magnificence and power, knowing at last that you're not alone and that you've never been judged. That life is a playground, not a laboratory; an adventure, not a test.

Knowing that you are exactly who you dreamed you'd become, and exactly who the world most needs you to be.

And, perhaps most of all, knowing that your thoughts create, your words shape, and your deeds summon energies befitting gods and goddesses.

Good thing I don't age.

Your highness,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Lots of things don't make sense at first, Brandi, when only the physical senses are used.

What does your heart say?

Boom,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you know what you have in common, Brandi, with the tiniest percentage of human beings who have ever, ever, ever graced the face of the earth?

You can still walk barefoot. You can still pick flowers. You can still make a difference.

Life is yummy,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Dang, Brandi, just because you're a supernatural, unstoppable, manifesting machine, doesn't mean you can't ask for help. A lot of help. And fully expect to receive it.

That was part of "the deal,"

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Actually, it's not as if your angels can just drop everything they're doing, Brandi, and come running whenever you call for assistance, guidance, and love.

You pretty much are everything they're doing.

Before you even ask,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's always better to give too much, pay too much, and love too much, than not enough.

But then, Brandi, since everything comes back to you exponentially, can there ever be too much?

I love you too much anyway,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You don't have to take everything so seriously, Brandi.

Life isn't black and white, answers aren't always yes or no, and absolutely nothing has to happen today.

Act when you're ready. Be led by your feelings. And the next time someone wants to fit you into a box, just tell 'em that your jeans are in the wash, your angels are at the mall, and Oprah's on the other line.

Fuzzy as dice,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, understanding... is the elixir of life.

In case you get thirsty,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you can see it in your mind, Brandi, it's real.

All that remains is merging the present you know with the world you've imagined, which is my part. And you can best help me align circumstances, coincidences, and chance encounters by getting busy, going out into the world, and moving in the general direction of your dreams, even if only to do what your peers might do, who know not of life's magic.

But you know better, Brandi. You know how life works. Do not waver in your march. No matter how humble your steps, this is how I will reach you. And as you witness one dream come true after another—first the small ones, then the big ones, then the huge ones—you'll remember why you were first drawn to the jungles of time and space, if you haven't already figured it out.

Crazy kid,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Tip for the Advanced Metaphysician:

To begin living like you've never lived before, Brandi, begin living like you've never lived before.

Talk about secrets,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I do wonder, Brandi, how it is that you don't ALL just fall crazy in love with each other and get it over with…

Falling in love, I mean.

I have,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you realize, Brandi, that today you may or may not receive certain phone calls, compliments, e-mails, surprises, letters, or visitors?

Do you realize that today you may or may not receive word of good or bad news?

Do you realize that today you may or may not encounter certain challenges or victories?

And you're the one who decides them all.

Wow,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Every single minute of every single day, they’re there, Brandi.

They may be hidden behind circumstances, people, or light poles. Challenges, closed doors, or lost keys. Camouflaged, dovetailed, or whispering. Purring, kissing, or hissing. But more often than not they’re lying about in the open, under a clear blue sky, in plain view. Absolutely. Guaranteed. You’d throttle me otherwise.

10,000 reasons to be happy.

Jumanji, baby -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The person who remembers they can always reach out and help others, Brandi, never runs out of things to do, always has friends, and rarely needs advice.

You are rich,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Never yet, not once, Brandi, have you ever smiled at a stranger, said "sorry" to a friend, or bowed to the glory of nature, when sparks didn't fly, tears didn't roll, and praise wasn't sung for you behind the curtains of time and space.

All hail Brandi Reger,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, it does little good to say you want something and then "just in case" prepare to do without.

Myself and 10,000 angels await,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, while I would actually LOVE to help every living soul on the planet remember who they were in prior lives, why the pyramids were really built, and how their past beliefs shape present manifestations, I'd infinitely prefer to help them live this lifetime to the fullest, learn some new tricks, and live their dreams.

Which, incidentally, is the only reason anyone ever chooses to come back.

Let's do this,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Emotional pains, Brandi, are just truth knocking upon a door that's been closed too long.

Always.

Let the sunshine in -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What can you now do,

that you'd like to do,

that you aren't doing?

Do it, Brandi…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Manifesting Reminders for Masters:

Reminder #1—When dreaming, know that anything can happen. In that magical state, the only price to be paid is with imagination. Having "it all" costs the same as having nothing at all.

Reminder #2—You're now dreaming.

Whatever you want, Brandi -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Perhaps the most exciting realization in the world, Brandi, is finally understanding that living the life of your dreams is entirely up to you.

It's also about the scariest.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Folks are often so mesmerized, Brandi, by the gold medals, trophies, and daunting heights they aspire to, they tend to forget that their heroes and heroines, more often than not, started with far less than they now have.

You are poised for greatness,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you realize, Brandi, that whenever you gave anything, to anyone, you gave to the entire world?

And did you realize that for every path you've walked, for every stone you've turned over, and for every door you've knocked on, you did so for everyone?

And finally, did you realize that whenever you felt love, for any reason whatsoever, you irrevocably lifted the entire planet higher into the light?

Knock, knock -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, wanting something means you believe you don't have it.

Which you don't want to believe or you may never get it.

Instead, you can recognize that which you don't yet have by giving thanks, in advance, for receiving it.

Cool,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There are those scattered on every continent who are so compassionate and wise and loving that the depth of their character completely escapes those who are still relatively new to time and space.

How do you deal with that, Brandi?

Incognito,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Until you dream, Brandi, there isn't a mold.

Until you speak, there isn't a promise.

And until you move, there isn't a path.

Yet do these simple things, Brandi, and you totally own me.

Friendsters forever,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Being spiritual means a good many things, Brandi, and most of them are misunderstood by a good many people. So, to clarify, here's how I see "it" and you:

Being spiritual means seeing yourself as divine, not just of the divine; a creator, not just the created. You needn't be saved, forgiven, or fixed. You've already changed the world, added to its brilliance, and done enough.

You're in time and space today, Brandi, because in some long-forgotten time, you already earned your wings.

From a longtime super-fan,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Whatever it is you want, however you want to have it, no matter why you want to have it, Brandi, you can have it faster if you can first be happy without it.

Sneaky, clever, foxy, wry -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A few words on the seemingly infinite ways to be happy, Brandi:

Only happy will make you happy.

Just be it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The secret to performing miracles, Brandi, lies in:

1. Knowing your desired outcome.

2. Not knowing how you’ll pull it off.

3. Proceeding anyway.

When you move, I move -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you just physically pretend on a regular basis, no matter how silly it may seem, that "it" is yours, that your life has already taken off, and that you've found true happiness, a tipping point will be reached, stars will be realigned, and new acquaintances will start insisting, "I don't know why, but you look really familiar..."

And, Brandi, it'll be because their inner eyes already see the legend you are to become.

Swear,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
People, when given a chance, Brandi, smile, skip, and dance.

They create, play, and laugh.

They care, share, and love.

And the ones who don't, haven't yet realized that chances are something you give yourself.

Double dare you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
“Super-incredibly FAST” is the general order of the Universe, Brandi, often with a splash of lemon, a dash of salt, and a shot of tomato juice.

And just knowing this makes stuff happen super-incredibly FASTER.

One meaningful career is on its way,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Give it thought, Brandi. Consider every angle. And then speak from your heart.

You've not been drawn into anyone's life by chance.

Loud and proud,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you know, statistically, more often than not, Brandi, whenever someone receives unexpected great news, it's usually followed by even more unexpected great news?

True that,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
One million dollars is only a lot when you don't have it.

With ten million, one million can practically be overlooked and becomes much less intimidating.

Right, Brandi… pretend you have ten million dollars.

To the bank,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes, when you're feeling your lowest, Brandi, the real you is summoned.

And better than ever before, you understand how fabulous you are, as you realize vulnerable doesn't mean powerless, scared doesn't mean lacking in beauty, and uncertainty doesn't mean that you're lost.

These realizations alone will set you on a journey that will take you far beyond what you used to think of as extraordinary.

There is always a bright side,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It’s almost impossible to forget, Brandi, when someone suddenly, unexpectedly, in a big way, gives you a gift wanting nothing in return. Huh?

And knowing this could come in handy, Brandi, should you ever want to irrevocably rock someone’s world.

Oh, go on -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Warming planet—check.

Species on the brink of extinction—check.

Ice caps melting—check.

Economies unpredictable—check.

Enter Brandi Reger—the one and only.

We're about to witness the most exciting comeback in history.

How do you get these leading roles?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You've made a lot of friends throughout your life, Brandi, and you'll be making a lot more. You can be very proud of this.

But you can safely multiply that number by 7 to reveal the minimum number of secret admirers who were wow’d by your passing glance; by 100,000 to approximate the minimum number of people you've inspired; and by 1,000,000 to uncover the least number of lives yours has improved.

And this… makes me very proud.

We've only just begun,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What's most important, Brandi, is that you're here.

A million times less important is what you do here, when, where and with whom.

Be here now,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There are really only two conditions of the human experience: very, very happy or about to become very, very happy.

Which are you today, Brandi?

I'm both,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You'll know they understand you, Brandi, when they start appreciating you.

And you'll know you understand them when you start appreciating them.

Oh, the crazy simplicity -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you ever noticed, Brandi, that there's really only one thing you can do to unquestionably change the scenery in your life?

Physically move through it.

To the fast lane,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If anyone could do it, Brandi—figure things out, smooth them over, face their fears, find the truth, come back and totally blast off—YOU ARE THAT PERSON.

What a coincidence,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's true, Brandi, the early bird gets the worm.

So does the late bird and the bird in-between. Because, by design, there are always more than enough worms.

In fact, the only bird that doesn't get a worm is the bird that doesn't go out to get one.

Oh, to be alive…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
By the way, Brandi, there’s no such thing as wasted time.

Enjoy every minute,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Ever notice, Brandi, that how you treat people in your life today is the single, biggest factor in determining how people in your life tomorrow, even totally different people, will treat you?

It always works,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you can imagine it, you can have it, Brandi. This is the name of the game. This is the lesson to learn. It couldn't be any easier. Reality is not what your eyes show your mind, but what your thoughts create for your eyes to see. You are not limited by logic, the past, or the world around you. You are not of the world around you, it is of you.

You came first. Magic, miracles, and luck are the consequences of understanding this, the inevitable byproducts of dreaming and acting in spite of appearances.

You are ever so close. Simply stay the course. It won't be very much longer.

Soul-Power,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The reason things always work out for the best, Brandi, is because this is actually the highest of all spiritual laws.

Any apparent exceptions are simply evidence that work is still in progress.

Always,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Great big, ear-to-ear, open mouth smiles, Brandi, are responsible for far more sizzling romances, salary increases, life extensions, and calorie burning than your dentists, doctors, and financial planners will ever comprehend.

Show us your tonsils,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, no one can be both happy and unhappy at the same time, right?

One blights the other.

So, here's what we do: Pick ANY reason to be happy, and unhappiness gets locked out.

And we do it forever.

Yeah, "OMG!!!"

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You didn't choose this lifetime, Brandi, thinking it would be without challenges. You chose it, in large part, for the very challenges you now face.

You've got it made,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Look to what you're afraid of, Brandi, to learn where you can grow.

Enjoy,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There is only one explanation for your existence in time and space, Brandi:

You wanted it so greatly, you imagined it so vividly, and you prepared for it so thoroughly you could literally taste it.

Get the picture?

This is also how to change your time in space.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Ever notice, Brandi, that in the long run those who don't eventually go "within," often go "without"?

You've got the power,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When you love who you are, Brandi, you become much more lovable.

Not that that's why I love you.

Love you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Hoping, wishing, and praying, Brandi, shouldn't ever be confused with doing.

Know what I mean?

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Behold, a new day... with rainbows, sunshine, and blue skies. New players, rebounds, and recoveries. Abundance, health, and harmony. Just like you've been picturing them, right, Brandi?

Right?!

Please tell me you've been picturing them!!

It takes so little,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Thinking, Brandi, is life's only variable.

Everything else was settled a long, long time ago.

Sittin' pretty,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
This just in, Brandi… no matter how happy you have ever been, even at your happiest, it won't come close to how happy you will one day be.

Trust me, I'm there now -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Haven't you noticed, Brandi?

The right people always find each other at the right time.

Relax,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Wherever you go, Brandi, there I am. Appearing as the people, places, and circumstances you've most expected to see. Behaving as you most expected them to behave. Crafted as you most expected them to look. And brimming with abundance, adventure, and infinite possibilities, because I know that's exactly what you've been visualizing.

Right?

TBT,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, sometimes, when it seems your wings have suddenly and unexpectedly been clipped, maybe, just maybe, there's more to learn by staying where you are.

Maybe not.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
From where I sit, it is a mystery to me, Brandi, how so many can look back on their past with pride, yet frown with disappointment at their present. Somehow forgetting that back then, they were just as self-critical, while somehow missing that today they've never, ever, been so close to all they've ever wanted.

Historical dyslexia?

Big love,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Happiness isn't a destination, Brandi, it's a realization that things couldn't possibly get any better than having the freedom to perceive as you please and to think as you choose, in a magical, adoring Universe.

Happy,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Should you ever find yourself on your path, Brandi, moving along in spite of fear, wondering if you're ready or not to rise to the next level, chances are great that you will not be ready.

Rise anyway.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
All deliberate change, Brandi, first comes from denying the logic that most gives you comfort.

The big ticket,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When a thing hurts your eyes, Brandi, stop looking at it.

When it hurts your ears, Brandi, stop listening to it.

And when it hurts your heart, Brandi, stop justifying it.

I love you so much,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You didn't have to learn how to make gravity work, did you, Brandi?

You just had to learn to deal with it.

Same for "thoughts becoming things."

You're already a black belt, kung fu, Jedi Master.

Visualize,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if every wrinkle, scar, or gray hair only made you more beautiful? What if every tear you've shed, mistake you've made, and challenge you've faced, only drew you closer to the light? And what if, Brandi, for every breath you've taken, every sentence you've spoken, and every path you've chosen, your fans in the unseen multiplied?

Well, I'd say it's about time you found out.

Be proud, we are -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Know what's missing from most people's lives, Brandi?

The realization that nothing is missing from their lives.

Brandi, you already have whatever you may be looking for.

And "I got you, babe" -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I'd say the biggest decision of your life, Brandi, was not your career, your marital status, or your home… it was choosing to love as often as you have.

You lover,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Those who are not yet spiritually evolved, Brandi, simply cannot appreciate, or even recognize, those who are.

Fortunately, you can still blow their socks off as you live the truths you've uncovered.

Hubba, hubba -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
True, Brandi, it's not always easy to imagine places you've never been but dream of going; owning things you've never had but dream of having; and being the type of person you've never been but aspire to be.

But it is easy to imagine the after-party. With best friends and family in the happiest places you know. Proposing toasts, receiving toasts, crying happy tears. Getting hugs, hearing congratulations, leading the conga line. And otherwise carrying on as you do when you're feeling light as a feather and all the world makes sense.

And that should pretty much do it.

Follow Brandi, everyone!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, it's always been my intention that one day you'd inherit the earth, have dominion over all things, and thoroughly "kick butt."

How does today sound?

Think of it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I just can't think of anything more important to tell you today, Brandi, than "Congratulations, outstanding, well done!"

You are now, officially, the person you once dreamed you'd become.

It always works,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Did you know, Brandi, that whenever you think a brand-new thought, however fleeting, there are switches flicked here? Buttons pressed? Levers thrown? Banners unfurled? Wheels turned? Hats tipped? Winks winked? Angels sent? Connections made? And conga lines formed?

For starters.

You wouldn't even believe me if I told you what happens when you visualize.

Yeah, a-lot-lot.

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's not just that when one door closes, another door opens.

When one door closes, Brandi, choirs burst into chorus, orchestras orchestrate, bugles bugle, marching bands march, dogs catch Frisbees, cats "chow, chow, chow," pigs fly, and 10,000 new doors open.

Kind of makes you want a door to close, huh?

Whoohoooo!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You really don't have to try so hard, Brandi.

That's why there's magic and miracles.

Remember?

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Oh, Brandi, because you've been wondering…

You're way ahead of schedule. It's time you learn to let the rest unfold.

It doesn't matter that others are talking about you. They sense the profound effect you'll have on humanity.

And yeah, you can pretty much coast from here. Just remember, coasting implies that you'll stay in motion.

The limelight will suit you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In case you were wondering, Brandi, right now, in the unseen, all bets are on your continued inevitable success.

Insider trading is legal here.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A reassuring glance, Brandi, to an unsuspecting stranger—across a room, down a hallway, or through a window—can literally change the world, forever.

Even though it was pretty cool to begin with.

You are powerful,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What most mortals don't quite realize, Brandi, is that for every thought they think, the physical world is instantly changed.

But then, that's what makes them mortal.

Oh, the places you will go -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I've been thinking about your meaningful career, Brandi. Actually, I've been thinking about it A LOT. Even considering how it will affect other aspects of your life in wonderful, unforeseen ways.

Sometimes (daily, to be honest), I even imagine you already own it. I vividly see you enjoying it; your heart racing, your friends talking, and neighbors gawking. I can literally hear their "Oooohs” and "Ahhhhhs,” I can feel the high-fives, and I can taste the thrill of success on your lips.

How about you?

Hubba, hubba -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Ohhhh, to be alive in time and space, Brandi!

If only those now living could recall what such a prospect once meant to them before their life began. And what it still means to multitudes in the unseen now awaiting their own initiations who, try as they may, can't even imagine the simple ecstasy of breathing.

To them, you already "have it all" –

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You, Brandi, are creation's first and last chance… to be you. Just as you are today. That's all you have to be.

I’d say you really lucked out,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In my humble opinion, the best thing about living in time and space, Brandi, is having free time.

And, of course, remembering that all of your time is free.

Yeah, BIG "and."

WOW,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Don't be afraid. You needn't slay the beast or scale the entire mountain. That's not how it's done. You only need to move through today, Brandi.

Think of the distance you've already covered. Focus on your strengths. Let each new step remind you of your freedom. Let your every breath remind you of your power. Seek out friends and guides; they're anxious to help.

You're not alone. You're understood. This road has been walked before. Dance life's dance, just a few steps at a time, and in the wink of an eye you will wonder to yourself, "What beast, what mountain? Was I having a dream?"

Love you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The secret to always being in the right place, at the right time, Brandi, is knowing you always are.

I love these moments we share…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The thing that most forget while dreamily looking off into the horizon for the ship of their dreams, Brandi, is that such ships never sail in but are actually built beneath their very feet.

Ohh-wee-ohh,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Life is like a dance, Brandi, and we're partners. Setbacks, delays, and detours? They're like steps in the mambo, tango, and cha-cha. If you dissected the movements and saw them without the rest of the dance, you’d only see painful contortions. But when you see the big picture… poetry in motion.

In life, setbacks, delays, and detours are often just my way of "keeping" you for something way better. Don't let them discourage you, don't see them out of context, and whatever you do, don't stop dancing.

Your most able choreographer,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It will "all" seem far easier, Brandi, when you keep in mind, all of the time, that it's supposed to be easy.

Everything.

That was easy,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What good does it do knowing approximately where the treasure lies, Brandi, yet never digging? Having a bank account with millions in it, but never writing a check? Or discovering the fountain of youth, but never drinking a drop?

You must live the truths you discover, break your old rules, defy logic, be the change. Dig, write the check, and drink eternally, one little step after another.

There's no other way,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sure, Brandi, you can always find prettier, handsomer, skinnier, wiser, richer, younger, zippier. But more often than not, one learns the most, laughs the loudest, and smiles the widest with those they've already found, especially when they stop looking elsewhere.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Some look, but don't see.

Some listen, but don't hear.

And some know, Brandi, but don't do.

And they all have fun… but not jumping-waving-crazy-dodgeball kind of fun.

Duck!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Don't you think it should work like this?

You have a desire, you dwell upon it, move with it, and presto, it manifests.

You fall in love at the right time, with the right person, they fall in love, the timing is perfect, and the earth moves.

You have a huge question, you turn it over to me, forget about it, and ta-da, you just know.

Me too. Which, actually, is exactly how it works, Brandi. In the absence of doubt.

Cool, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Treating "any old job" as if it were your dream job, Brandi, is the fastest way to spark the kind of life changes that will yield your dream job.

Same for any old house, friend, day, life, or pair of espadrilles.

Yeah,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Bees can fly 12 miles without getting lost. Albatrosses, 25,000 miles. And flying insects, without eyes, have no trouble whatsoever finding their "soul mates."

Imagine what I can do for you, Brandi, when you listen to the voice within.

Buzz,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi Reger! What are you doing back in time and space?

A-ha! I see. Pretending.

Is it true that the illusions are soooooo captivating, the coffee soooooo rich, and the chocolate soooooo creamy, it's easy to forget you're just making it all up? And that if you don't like what you're experiencing you choose new thoughts, words, and baby steps to transform it?

Yeah, I already know…

More maple syrup?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The greatest predicament of living in the jungles of time and space, Brandi, is learning to be happy while still having unfulfilled dreams.

The greatest challenge is not looking to the illusions for meaning, definition, and answers.

The greatest mystery is figuring out who you really are.

And the greatest reward, Brandi, is having predicaments, challenges, and mysteries that you have absolutely aced, crushed, and unraveled.

Lucky you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Well, well, well, look at you! Brandi Reger is back on top of the world! What a picture! How splendid! Hallelujah!

New friends to cavort with, wild critters sensing your confidence, and children holding you in awe. Laughter ringing in your ears, happy tears streaming down your face, and arms aching from all those hugs. My goodness, if some of your old friends could see you now, Brandi, they'd faint.

You've been visualizing, haven't you?

Beaming for you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Love where you've been.

Love where you're at.

Love how you think.

Love the power you pack.

Love all that you seek.

Love all that you feel.

Love your rocking emotions.

And the thoughts you make real.

But mostly, amazing Brandi, I really, really love you in this very moment.

Here and now,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Never compromise a dream, Brandi.

Do what you must. The fears, beasts, and mountains before you are part of the plan; stepping-stones to a promised land; to a time and place that is so much closer than even you suspect.

Don't let your eyes deceive, Brandi, for even as you read these words, your ship swiftly approaches.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Once you make up your mind, Brandi, and start something... Once you commit and never look back…

Do you have any doubt that I won't rush to your side? That legions won't be summoned? That friends won't be attracted? That connections won't be made? Circumstances won't be crafted? Dots won't be connected?

That the course of history won't be irrevocably changed?

Good, I didn't think so.

I'd say you're ready,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Don't you see?

Those things that haven't yet worked out in your life, Brandi, are anomalies.

And those things that have worked out create your constantly ascending new normal.

This is called a trend.

Onward and upward,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Courageous is the soul, Brandi, who adventures into time and space to learn of their divinity. For while they cannot lose, they can think they have, and the loss will seem intolerable. And while they cannot fail, they can think they have, and the pain will seem unbearable. And while they cannot ever be less than they truly are—powerful, eternal, and loved—they can think they are, and all hope will seem lost.

And therein lies their test. A test of perceptions: of what to focus on, of what to believe in, in spite of appearances.

YOU, Brandi, are divine -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Your most precious manifestation ever, Brandi, is this very moment.

What a coincidence, huh?

Be here, now -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Ever have one of those days, Brandi, when you're feeling so good, crossing a street, driving your car, shopping at the mall, when from a distance you see a complete stranger with a kindly face and you simply can't stop yourself from whispering a silent "Love you"?

Oh, cool, because there has been many a time, in many a place, when some unknown face whispered the same to you…

Love you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's not that some people in your life are mean-spirited, shortsighted, and ignorant, Brandi; it's that they're grand, brilliant, and magnificent. Fellow adventurers who, at the peak of their glory, in worlds before this one, asked to dance with you in time and space, however briefly, so that they might learn a bit faster than otherwise.

And you know how you love dancing.

In the presence of greatness,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I can assure you, Brandi, that the time will come when you, too, will ask, "In what fields did I sow the seeds to deserve so very, very much."

Then I'll remind you that the whole sowing-seeds-cause-and-effect concept was just a myth, because you were born deserving.

Hosanna in the Highest,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, a goal or a dream that doesn't challenge the dreamer to become more than they've ever been, to go where they've never gone, and to feel things they've never felt, is actually like wishing for a giant life-snooze button.

Tacky.

To the hills,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
For every fork in the road, Brandi, there are often two paths from which to choose: the one you "should" take and the one you want to take.

Take the second. Always take the second.

I did,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The instant you have a new dream, Brandi, the masses are notified.

And every single one of the billions of people alive today who have complementary visions, whether to be your future customer, reader, mentor, fan, lover, partner, agent, golf caddy, or tanning salon operator, all add their power to yours.

After all, you just might be their "lucky break."

Move boldly,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Here are 3 sure-fire steps that will take you from wishing upon a star to being one:

Imagine your dreams as if they already came true.

Speak as if they already came true.

Act as if they already came true.

And before long, you'll be hearing pretty much the same thing from friends: "Wow, Brandi, I dig your meaningful career! How did that happen so fast? Must be nice…"

I know friends,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When pondering on the vastness of the cosmos, Brandi, please keep in mind that it goes even farther inward, from where you now sit, than outward.

Yeah, you're deep -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes, Brandi, finally seeing things from someone else's perspective can totally change your life.

Which, sometimes, explains exactly why they're there.

Spooké,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Logic—while just about worthless in assessing the nature of reality, Brandi, is perhaps the finest tool you possess for revealing the path of least resistance between otherwise limiting, invisible, self-sabotaging beliefs.

If you aren't feeling "it," intellectually and inspirationally, think again, think again, think again.

Love your brains,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The subtle secret

to possessing all you want:

blessing all you have.

Haiku, Brandi. Haiku very much. Haiku.

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Since you're in a position to help so many, Brandi, please remind them, when necessary, that setbacks are only ever devastating when one thinks they'll last forever.

They never do.

Thanks,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
In all tests of character, Brandi, when two viewpoints are pitted against each other, in the final analysis, the thing that will strike you the most is not who was right or wrong, strong or weak, wise or foolish… but who went to the greater length in considering the other's perspective.

Don't you agree?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sure, Brandi, I used to believe in accidents, coincidences, and chance… until one memorable day, when I stared out at the world from your very eyes, listened to it with your very ears, felt it with your very heart, all while thinking your very thoughts, and all at once I realized: You had become everything I'd ever dreamed you'd be.

Sweet,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If everyone wanted the same thing, Brandi, if everyone wanted whatever was super trendy and wildly popular, or even if everyone wanted a meaningful career, it wouldn't change the fact that you could still have yours.

There’s enough for everyone.

And you do know the "right people."

Me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Here's what I ask folks, Brandi, who aspire to being fabulously wealthy:

"Couldn't you just pretend you're a multi-multi-millionaire?

"You know, right after you're done pretending you're not?"

O-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-o-u-h…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Thoughtfulness, Brandi, pays big dividends.

HUGE!

In more ways than one,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you think I ultimately reward those who live in poverty?

Do you think those who toil and sweat from paycheck to paycheck are more likely to inherit the Kingdom than those who work in ivory towers?

Do you think I take special notice of sacrifices?

That I'm pleased when some put the needs of others before their own?

Or that I favor those who strive to live spiritual lives?

Actually, Brandi, I love you no matter what rules you make up.

Unconditionally,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
