Brandi, you know how everyone is always talking about life being a journey, not a destination? And that it's the journey that really counts? That from it, you'll find your purpose, meaning, and true happiness?

Well, this is it.

Soak it in,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Be proud to know as much as you do about life, dreams, and reality. Bask, Brandi.

It was a long march to reach this level of enlightenment, and many a battle has been won over fear, limiting beliefs, and mass consciousness.

Don't let self-consciousness keep you from shining your light in a world that would be unimaginably incomplete without you.

This is your moment.

So proud,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you noticed, Brandi? I mean, isn't your entire life proof?

One day you're scrimping, the next you're in the money.

One day you're lonely, the next you have friends.

Lost, then found. Ill, then well. Low, then high.

And with hindsight, it becomes ever so clear that the only thing that ever really changed was your thinking.

You so have this -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Confusion, indecision, and uncertainty, Brandi, often mean that if you wait a little longer before deciding, an even better option will emerge, with such clarity it may bite you on the nose and sweep you off your feet.

The nice kind of bite.

I'd say wait a little longer,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Maybe it's not just about finding the perfect friend, partner, or tribe, Brandi, but finding the perfection in those you've already found.

Yeah, just a hunch -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The evolution of faith, Brandi, usually spanning millions of years, typically looks like this:

Not believing in "the Universe."

Believing in "the Universe," but secretly doubting it, too.

Fearing "the Universe," but secretly loving it, too.

Loving "the Universe," but secretly fearing it, too.

Realizing that "the Universe" was you, all along.

Thanks for having me,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The best way to find "love," Brandi, which, incidentally, is just as true for finding money, is to focus less on these by-products of a life well lived and more on a life well lived.

Simple is as simple does,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Here's how to view every decision you've ever made, Brandi: It was right.

Here's how to view every path you've ever chosen: It was perfect.

Here's how to view every trend, friend, and dance you've ever moved with: You were amazing.

And here's how to view the fact that you even exist at all: "I" was totally on fire.

Ts-s-s-s-s!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's human nature, Brandi, to unthinkingly project present circumstances, people, and feelings into your future, as if those you have today will follow wherever you go. Creating a future that will very much resemble today.

Which is fantastic when those circumstances, people, and feelings fill you with joy.

But for those cases when this is not true, let’s chill the unthinking part, and think again.

You can do this,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
True brilliance, Brandi, is not a function of understanding one's view of the world and finding order, logic, and spirituality in it. True brilliance is understanding that your view of order, logic, and spirituality is what created your world.

You can change anything and everything.

Shape Shifting 101,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When I survey life's majesty: the birds, the bees, and the African Tulip trees…

And when I survey life's characters: the Abdullas, the Lilis, and the Kaylas…

And when I consider life's tribulations: the setbacks, the losses, the fear…

And when I consider life's abundance, its glories, its order…

And when I... actually, I could go on forever... literally.

Do you know what shocks me the very most, Brandi?

How real it all seems.

Whoa…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It doesn't get any more beautiful, any more magical, any richer, or any easier, Brandi, than things are right now.

Until you expect it to.

At which point, I hope you have a really good broker.

Who loves you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The best shortcut of all, Brandi, to the life of your dreams, is knowing that you've already arrived.

Because you have.

Greased lightning,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You can "dance" with the illusions of time and space, Brandi, choosing your "steps" based upon things and events as they now are, or you can dance with your dreams, choosing your steps based upon things and events as they will be.

And I bet you can guess which steps will perpetuate today's illusions and which ones will bring transformation…

Shall we?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When you understand, Brandi, that your disappointment in another's behavior or choices always stems from their immaturity, or yours, rather than their unkindness, or yours, it becomes much harder not to keep skipping through life, giddy with joy, smelling the flowers.

Moreover, when you understand that with enough maturity on your end you can always find peace in all your relationships, it becomes much harder not to run down the street kissing everyone you meet on both cheeks.

Kiss, kiss -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's no accident, Brandi, that your courage often overrides your common sense.

You wanted to be programmed that way.

You also wanted it all.

Proud of you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Wait a minute, Brandi.

You're already smarter, kinder, more honest, insightful, and ambitious, even better looking, than 99.99 percent of the people who now have what you dream of having and who now do what you dream of doing.

Getting there is not about being better, more deserving, or smarter, Brandi, it's about realizing you already are, and acting like it.

As you were,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, would it help to be reminded, that there's no problem so great that you won't one day be grateful for it?

That there's no friend you've ever had, who won't always love you?

And that there's no dream you've ever dreamt, that doesn't already exist?

Not bad, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Start it; you don't have to be fancy.

Keep moving; you don't have to go crazy.

Visualize; you don't have to admit it.

See the end result; it doesn't have to be material.

Expect miracles; they don't have to be huge.

Pretend you've arrived; you don't have to dance on tables.

And above all else, Brandi, have fun.

This is why you started it, right?

Life, what a trip -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Remember when it was really fun, Brandi, to catch raindrops on your tongue, walk under archways because they were there, and roll around in the sand at the beach? To go all the way to the store for a tiny treat, lie on the grass looking for "God" in the clouds, and make scary monster faces in the mirror? To watch the stars because they were winking at you, count the flowers in the garden by the door, and put Cocoa Puffs up your nose?

Well, Brandi, I'm happy to inform you, most of it still is.

Ah-h-h-h-h-h-h-h-h…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Any and all forms of separation, disconnects, divides, partings, breakups, and goodbyes, Brandi, are temporary. Very.

You'll be together far, far longer than you will ever be apart.

Forever and ever,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Would you believe, Brandi, that there is nothing about your life today, not even what hurts, that you won't eventually appreciate, with happy tears running down your face?

Nothing.

Chokes me up just thinking about it,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I know this may come as somewhat of a shock, Brandi, but of your innumerable and extraordinary gifts, one day you'll consider your present-day challenges as the greatest of them all.

Trust me.

Wasn’t I good to you?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Of all your enumerable friends, Brandi, not one of them loves you more than I love you, right this very moment.

Xxxxoooo,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Yes! Alright! You bet! Un-huh! On it! Roger! OH, YES!

Just answering every single one of the requests I receive, Brandi. And the "Ohhhhhh, yesssss!" was for the one who didn't ask, but who gave thanks in advance.

This may be hard to believe, but I never say no.

Whatever you want,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Let the status symbols you seek most, Brandi, be self-made adventures that excite you at dawn, challenge you by day, and surprise you by night.

"Self-made" being the operative word.

Creator-hood rocks,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Help me with the lingo here, Brandi. Are people just kidding when they refer to the "holy land," "holy words," and "holy people," as if they were somewhere else?

Or do they understand that there's no land holier than that beneath your own feet? That no words are mightier than those you choose? And that no one, ever, has been more divine and revered and deserving of their heart's desires than you now are?

I do declare,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Impatience is a sign of hurrying, hurrying is a sign of worrying, worrying is a sign of fear, and fear is a sign, Brandi, that someone has temporarily forgotten that it's never too late to change their thoughts and, therefore, their "things."

Glad we could straighten that out,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes, Brandi, the one person you think can help you the least, can help you the most.

Galling, isn't it?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
At the end of the day, no matter how they behaved, no matter what was said, and no matter how things turned out, rest assured, dear Brandi, that your goodness was known by all.

You rock,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, if you only knew, just how incredibly, wonderfully close you already are to all that your heart desires… you'd be even closer.

If that's possible.

As you were,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Approach everything you care about, Brandi, as if you really, really mean it.

And I really, really mean it -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A master's awareness of spiritual laws, Brandi, directs him or her to manifest major life changes by working with their thoughts, not by working harder.

Which isn't to say they don't sometimes work very long hours, because they do; they just don't think of it as work.

Which also isn't to say they all have cool jobs that anyone would love, because they don't; they just see every task before them as a step on the path leading to happily-ever-after.

Hmmmmm…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The best way to create more free time, Brandi, is to take it.

You'll see.

Love, love -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
If you just look at all that already exists in your life, all that you already have: unlimited air to breathe, ample lighting to see, music to hear, books to read, stars to dream by, trees to gaze upon, floors to dance over, friends to cavort with, strangers to meet, enemies to befriend, woods to walk through, beaches to comb, rocks to scale, rains to splash in, rivers to float in, animals to bring comfort… you have to admit, Brandi, there's more of it than you could ever, ever, ever, ever spend.

But try anyway.

Big shot,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes it's easy to forget, Brandi, that everyone's just on their way home.

That you're all truly the best of friends.

And that this whole crazy thing kind of started as a dare… to see who might love the deepest, no matter how lost the others might become.

Gosh, how you're missed -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
As many stars as there are in the night sky, Brandi. As many grains of sand that exist on all the world's beaches. That's how often opportunity really knocks. That's how many second chances you really get. And that's how many voices whisper your name each day.

You have no idea…

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The reason most people don't recognize the miracles that are performed on their behalf, Brandi, is because there's just so bloomin' many of them.

Like this very moment…

And this one…

And this one…

Ahhh-h-h-h,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Have you ever stopped to consider, dear Brandi, that even one small drop from the sea is as infinite as all of the oceans combined?

Kind of like me and you, eh?

You are mighty,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You could pray for 1,000 nights, visualize for 1,000 days, and give thanks for 1,000 things, but it's when you physically prepare the way, dear Brandi, that 1,000 miracles will find you.

I can't help this feeling,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
So what if it takes a long time, Brandi?

So what if it's already taken longer than you thought?

So what if it will still take longer?

The day will nevertheless arrive, as it always does, when all your prior efforts, determination, and persistence will seem a paltry price indeed as you are lifted irrevocably higher, as if by chariots of fire, into realms previously unimagined, and then you'll think to yourself, "Wow, that was fast."

I can hear the music now,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
What if every single decision you ever made, Brandi, was the right one?

They were.

Legend,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You can always tell an old soul, Brandi, by how indifferent they are to setbacks.

Or, at least to what others would call setbacks.

Almost like nothing happened.

Crazy like an old soul,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Dearest Brandi, I wish for you flowers and sunshine, gentle breezes and clear skies, calm seas and rainbows. But, perhaps most of all, I wish for you the glorious breadth of experiences you are now poised to receive, so that these tidbits are mere icing on the cake of a life that's rich in adventure.

I know what is going to happen next in your life.

Happy tears,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Don't you just love all those crazy little quarks, atoms, and molecules, Brandi, that unceasingly manifest themselves into whatever you're thinking, no matter how big and daunting, small and simple, or rich and gorgeous?

Just look at 'em all right now.

Nice quarks and atoms, baby -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Do you realize, Brandi, there's something even better than having a loving Universe conspire on your behalf?

Right!

Being that Universe.

And you are.

Yours truly,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
The system works, Brandi.

Imagine it.

Move towards it.

Has to happen.

It always does.

I'd elaborate… if it were necessary,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, of all the wonderful places you'll go, of all the happy times you'll have, and of all the adventures that now call unto you, each will be enhanced and will more quickly come to pass… with your absolute immersion into today's places, times, and adventures.

Don't you just love having so much control?

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You're going to be shocked, Brandi, because one day you're going to look at yourself, your life, and your ways, and you're going to see that your every idiosyncrasy, quirk, folly, and so-called fault were among your greatest assets.

Oh my, I was having such a good day when I dreamed of you.

Mwa-a-a-a-w,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
A word to the wise, Brandi, from the wise…

Just because you can’t see it, with your eyes, doesn’t mean you can’t be it.

I can see it, Brandi -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, do you know what happens in time and space just before something really incredible happens? Something mind-blowing? Just before a really HUGE dream comes true?

Do you?

Absolutely nothing.

At least not in the physical world.

So if, perchance, it appears that absolutely nothing is happening in your life right now… consider it a sign.

All the best,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Some people bloom late. Some very late. And some, very, very, super late.

But, Brandi, they all bloom. And the longer it takes, the more spectacular it is.

Quite the deal, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
You deserve all the love, Brandi, in the world.

Done.

Helps to have connections,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I do wonder, Brandi, how some people, who upon seeing gorgeous, billowing cumulus clouds floating effortlessly overhead, don't just want to explode with joy.

Or who, upon seeing a mighty old oak tree, don't run right up to it wildly screaming, "I love you!"

Or who, upon being caught in the rain, don't blush as each drop gently kisses their skin.

Or who, upon gazing at a star-filled night, aren't paralyzed with awe.

Or who, upon seeing their reflection in a pond, don't cry the happiest of tears.

Do you know what I mean?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, have you ever thought you just might be the reason birds sing, flowers bloom, butterflies flit, puppies play, cats meow, seasons change, rains fall, stars shoot, the moon waxes, and the sun rises?

I suggest you do.

Often.

You are the reason,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Don't be angry, Brandi.

Not ever.

It's not worth it. It's not necessary. There is always a higher road.

You're the coolest,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Actually, you don't have to tell me what you want, Brandi. I already know.

You don't even have to tell me why you want it. That you do, is enough.

And please don't ask how I'm going to deliver it. There's always a way.

But I certainly wouldn't mind the occasional, "Yeeeeee-haaaaaaa, hallelujah, amen brothers and sisters!" You know, kind of a "thank you," in advance.

Thank you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Just act normal, Brandi.

If you just let anyone know about your awareness of those in the unseen doing your bidding, or the population shifts now being sparked by your very words, or the circumstances and events presently being crafted by your thoughts, you might create the illusion that you're from a not-so-distant parallel star system, possessing mysterious powers, favored by fate, here to save the world.

And, man-oh-man, you do not want that to happen.

Brandi!!!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
When it comes to the words you choose, Brandi, whether in your mind or amongst friends, let them be of what you like and love.

What you care about and cherish.

What makes you happy.

What gives you wings.

What makes you dream.

And very little else.

You make me happy,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
It's rather easy to let go of the past, Brandi, once you realize that no matter how differently things might have gone, you still couldn't be loved more than you now are. Nor could you have more to look forward to.

Don't-cha think?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I had a dream last night, Brandi, that I was you. Doing all of your favorite things, with all of your favorite people, in all of your favorite places.

I also dreamed that I was all of your favorite people.

Do you have any idea of how much each one of them loves you?

I didn't think so,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Always listen to your doubts, Brandi.

Not just because they might teach you of your fears, but because, sometimes, they might teach you of your wisdom.

Lovin' it all,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Sometimes, Brandi, I laugh so hard it starts a hurricane amongst far-off stars.

Sometimes, I grin so wide it causes earthquakes on distant planets.

And sometimes, when I feel so happy I could float, worlds are born, continents rise, and oceans surge.

But never, ever, ever, Brandi, do I lay so much as a finger on planet Earth. Because there, my work is long over, and yours has just begun.

Yo, Ho, Ho!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Disappointment, without anger, is the mark of an old soul.

Not being disappointed, Brandi, is the mark of a really old soul.

And trusting life so thoroughly that every step on its path is valued more than where it was supposed to take you, is the mark of eternal youth.

You hottie,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
For every day that goes by, Brandi, I renew my promises.

And apart from spinning, twirling, and somersaulting as often as possible, they include slaying your dragons, granting your wishes, and basically showing you a really fine time.

Really, really fine.

Your promise was to let me.

There's nothing we can't do,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Daily, hour by hour, minute by minute, second by second, you are admired by eyes in the unseen, Brandi.

You are deeply understood. Your actions and inactions are honored. Your thoughts and deeds are saluted. Even your fears and challenges are admired, along with the courage it took to choose them. (Yeah, you chose them.)

Having a connection with a soul as adventurous as yours gives all of us here reason to party like "the roof is on fire." Even though we usually don't have roofs….

Thanks from this side of the curtains,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Isn't it odd, Brandi? Of all the people in all the world who are starting to "get it," how few actually give it to themselves.

I think it's because they forget to live it.

Live it, Brandi -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Excusez-moi, Brandi, but celestial protocol usually involves either a nod, a wink, or at the very least an acknowledging sideways glance while peering over your sunglasses, whenever a life-changing miracle is performed on your behalf.

And I'm quite sure you know exactly what I'm talking about.

Oh, you're welcome.

Anytime. Anytime at all. Literally.

Tallyho,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Intention, Brandi, is your gig.

Miracles are mine.

Symbiotically,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, persistence, persistence, persistence.

On the surface it might just seem like physical flailing, but spiritually, you're speaking directly to me and this is what I hear, "Please hear me: There’s simply no way I'm doing without. I refuse to accept 'maybe,' 'sort of,' or 'not yet.' I have the power, I feel the glory, and I am the way. My words quicken the ether, my actions fulfill their prophecy, and thy Kingdom shall come on earth, as it is in heaven..."

And when confronted with such clarity... I'm like putty in your hands.

Rock on, Brandi -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Actually, Brandi, you could never spend all the abundance that's yours to spend.

Feel all the love that’s yours to feel.

Know all the peace, make all the friends, nor pass all the time that are your birthrights.

But I suggest you try imagining these things, anyway.

Your supply is truly limitless -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Every once in a while, with gaps in time that stretch for eons, someone like you comes along who instinctively trusts their inner senses more than their physical senses, the unseen more than the seen, and whose life-insights are so piercing that they unwittingly blow the entire model of spiritual evolution to smithereens.

"Gabriel, did you register Brandi Reger's epiphany yesterday? Raise expectations on all human beings another 72 gigatrons, and tell not a soul."

How do you do that?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Don't let the dazzling heights you aspire to, Brandi, scare you from getting started.

After all, few could climb Mt. Everest tomorrow, though virtually all could begin preparing.

Gopal!?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
There's nothing, Brandi, that "thinking new thoughts" can't solve, make happen, or improve.

Wow, sent that one just in time, huh?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
By embracing uncertainty with regard to the "hows" of dream manifestation, Brandi, and allowing it, not fearing it, you actually increase my options for blowing your dear mind.

Shazam!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
I've got a feeling, Brandi, that this is going to be your kind of year. That you'll be happier than you've ever been, laughing harder, smiling wider, standing taller, walking lighter, dancing crazier, hugging longer, living grander, loving louder, and if you want, selling the pictures to a tabloid to raise money for your new charity.

Can you feel it, too?

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Not events, Brandi, but outcomes. Visualize outcomes.

Not the cracking of the bat, but gliding over home plate.

Not the inking of deals, but the kind of life you'll lead.

Not the scale, the diet, or the food, but the admiration you have earned.

And not the whens, the wheres, the whos, or the hows, but the laughter, high-fives, and wows.

Not events, Brandi, but outcomes. Visualize outcomes.

Seeing you happy,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
An old soul is always prepared to admit they might be wrong, Brandi, especially when they're not.

I think.

Older than the moon,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Having preferences doesn't mean you're judgmental, Brandi; whether they're likes or dislikes.

They just ensure that as the winds of divinity are blown through your heart, the melody is unlike any other.

So have them, Brandi. Have them BIG time.

Pick your favorites of everything,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, there is no detail so small, no thought however fleeting, no word unspoken, no deed mindlessly performed, that doesn't send its vibration into the unseen, reaching my heart of hearts, where it echoes and returns as more of the same.

And as your cumulative manifestations draw your attention to the stunning and absolute power you have over your destiny, you'll come to see that, really and truly, there is no such thing as a small detail.

You have the keys to the Kingdom...

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Your wishes are what the Universe wishes for you, Brandi. Your thoughts steer the ship of your dreams. And no matter where you’ve "been," or how challenging your circumstances, right here and now is all that matters.

You are forever. Invincible. A Being of Light on an adventure of the highest order: to have fun and be happy in a magical, infinite, loving reality that conspires tirelessly in your favor; where thoughts become things, dreams come true, and all things remain forever possible.

xoxo,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, do you know what the difference between us is?

Me neither.

So, if it were me living your life, I'd think of this often.

Yourself,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Ever notice, Brandi, how on an almost daily basis, either directly or indirectly, you're driven by helping others?

I have.

Actually, all of us have.

Legend,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Special NEW YEAR Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Dearest Brandi, I was about to wish that your every dream come true.

That you find yourself surrounded by friends, laughter, and good times.

I almost wished that your every cup runneth over financially, romantically, spiritually, and creatively.

That good health be your faithful companion, peace your guarded ally, and love your perpetual guide.

When suddenly, it dawned on me that as an infinite, powerful, fun-loving gladiator of joy, with eternity before you and the power of your thoughts to help shape it… it's you Brandi Reger, who will be granting wishes this year.

I'd like peace on earth, please -

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Brandi, if there was just one thing I could tell you about living the life of your dreams, knowing that it would be enough if you understood it, I would ask you to realize that you already are.

In the presence of greatness,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
Just because you can have it all, Brandi, doesn't mean there's something wrong with you until you do.

To the contrary, it means you're smoking on fire, destined for greatness, exactly where you should be, with thoughts that become things, in a dream of your own creation, about to blast off as you become who you are meant to be.

Wily,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
All the years and all the tears... boy, Brandi, aren't they gonna be shocked when they realize that nothing was ever lost—not friendships, not opportunities, not love—nothing?

And that they already had all those things they went searching for?

That never once were we disappointed in them?

That nothing had to be proved, learned, or earned?

That all along they were, in fact, the person they had always dreamed of becoming?

Glad we caught up with you when we did!!

Whoohoo!

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
No matter what "they" say, Brandi, and no matter what they do, and no matter what they don't say or don't do, they actually love you.

I know because they told me.

I love you,

The Universe

messages.subject: A Note from the Universe ❤️ TUT
messages.body:
"The Evolution of a Dream"

Dream is implanted into brain.

Dreamer becomes thrilled.

Dreamer becomes terrified.

If no action is taken, terrifying thoughts grow into 3-eyed monsters. Dream is considered unrealistic.

If action is taken, Brandi, terrifying thoughts are revealed to be paper tigers. Confidence soars, miracles unfold, and dreamer begins to saunter.

Either way, nothing remains the same.

Gr-r-r,

The Universe
